language.name: §bPirate
mcp.TwiceDiceDescription: Player uses two dice fer their next roll. Can be unleashed on any swashbuckler.
mcp.ThriceDiceDescription: Player uses three dice fer their next roll. Can be unleashed on any swashbuckler.
mcp.RerollTokenDescription: Allows ye t' redo yer last roll. Can be cast after thar maximum trinkets per turn limit be reached.
mcp.PlayerSwapperDescription: Choose any swashbuckler t' swap board positions wit'.
mcp.GhostModeDescription: Allows ye t' move through any blocked off path on yer helm run, makes ye immune t' snares n' Stash Plunderer, n' adds 3 t' yer next roll.
mcp.CoinSnatcherDescription: Pinch 6 doubloons from another swashbuckler o' yer choice.
mcp.FireTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this snare loses 1 doubloon fer every spot passed fer thar remainder o' their time at helm. Expires after 3 uses.
mcp.ZapTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this snare gets zapped n' gives 2 doubloons t' thar snare planter fer every spot they pass until thar end o' their time at helm. This be a single use snare.
mcp.EnderTrapDescription: Any foe that lands on this snare gets sent avast t' thar start o' thar board n' thar spot landing event does not occur. This be a single use snare.
mcp.DoubleStarVoucherDescription: Allows ye t' plunder two shinin' spikers at a time when crossing thar main shinin' spiker hawker. Ye must pay fer both shinin' spikers.
mcp.TripleStarVoucherDescription: Allows ye t' plunder three shinin' spikers at a time when crossing thar main shinin' spiker hawker. Ye must pay fer all three shinin' spikers.
mcp.SpiritShieldDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation protects ye from thar next swashbuckler that tries t' steal a Shinin' Spiker or Doubloons from ye.
mcp.CandyCannonDescription: Launches ye closer t' thar Shinin' Spiker Hawker.
mcp.SandyCannonDescription: Launches ye closer t' thar Shinin'/Dark Spiker Hawker.
mcp.GoodieBagDescription: Instantly gives ye three random trinkets. Can receive any trinket in thar voyage except fer Shinin' Spiker Stealers, Twisted Tickers, Shinin' Spiker Vouchers.
mcp.MiniDiceDescription: Player can only roll 1-3 fer their next roll. Can be unleashed on any swashbuckler.
mcp.MagicDiceDescription: Allows ye t' choose how many landmarks ye or another swashbuckler will move on their next turn. Can only choose numbers 1-10.
mcp.CrazyClockDescription1: Sets thar voyage t' thar last five helm runs n' runs a high tide affair after thar current turn be over. Only one swashbuckler can hold a Twisted Ticker at a time.
mcp.CrazyClockDescription2: Increases thar number Shinin' Spikers t' plunder by 1 if a high tide affair has occurred. Decreases thar number o' Shinin' Spikers t' plunder by 1 if a high tide affair has not occurred. Only one swashbuckler can hold a Twisted Ticker at a time.
mcp.PickpocketerDescription2: Doubloons from every swashbuckler that ye pass on thar board. Expires after 3 helm runs.
mcp.TurnSkipperDescription: Strip any swashbuckler's next time at helm.
mcp.WarpToStarDescription: Teleports ye t' thar main shinin' spiker hawker, but ye still have t' pay fer thar star.
mcp.WarpToStarDescription2: Teleports ye t' thar closest main shinin' spiker hawker, but ye still have t' pay fer thar star.
mcp.AnvilTrapDescription: Any foe that lands on this snare gives thar snare planter 10 doubloons.
mcp.IceTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this snare loses half o' their current roll (rounded down if odd). Expires after 3 uses.
mcp.StarSchmooverDescription: Moves thar main shinin' spiker hawker t' a random location.
mcp.StarSchmooverDescription2: Moves thar Shinin' Spiker Hawker (furthest away from thar swashbuckler using thar trinket) t' a new random location.
mcp.StarStealerDescription: Allows ye t' steal one shinin' spiker from another swashbuckler. Bonus shinin' spikers unaffected by this trinket.
mcp.StarProtectorDescription: Secures one of yer shinin' spikers to be set in yer stone fer the rest of thar voyage. Swashbucklers can still plunder unsecured shinin' spikers.
mcp.MinionPetDescription: Summons a minion where ye stand. Swap places wit' thar minion at any point during yer turn. Land on both thar minion's landmark n' yer own landmark. Adds 1 t' yer roll.
mcp.StarShardDescription: Automatically converts t' a Shinin' Spiker when ye stash 5.
mcp.GoldBarDescription: Gives ye 15 Doubloons when cast (not when forked for).
mcp.ReverseABoardDescription: Reverses the sea current of thar map at yer helm. You move backwards at yer helm.
mcp.WeightedTwiceDiceDescription: Choose any swashbuckler t' roll wit' two dice on their next turn. Each dice be more likely t' roll a higher number.
mcp.WeightedThriceDiceDescription: Choose any swashbuckler t' roll wit' three dice on their next turn. Each dice be more likely t' roll a higher number.
mcp.PremiumRerollTokenDescription: Lets ye roll thar dice again. After rerolling, can choose t' keep yer new roll or take yer original roll. Can be cast after thar maximum trinkets per turn limit be reached.
mcp.PlayerSwiperDescription: Choose any swashbuckler t' swap board positions wit' n' steal a random trinket from worth less than 15 doubloons.
mcp.GhoulModeDescription: Allows ye t' move through any blocked off path, converts any enemies' snares that ye cross t' yers, makes ye immune t' Stash Plunderers, n' adds 3 t' yer next roll.
mcp.CoinStealerDescription: Pinch 10 doubloons from another swashbuckler o' yer choice.
mcp.InfernoTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this snare loses 2 Doubloons fer every spot passed fer thar remainder o' their turn. Expires after 3 uses.
mcp.LightningTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this snare gets zapped n' gives 3 doubloons t' thar snare planter fer every landmark they pass until thar end o' their turn. This be a single use snare.
mcp.EnderAuraTrapDescription: Any foe that lands within one landmark o' this snare gets sent avast t' thar start o' thar board. This be a single use snare.
mcp.DoubleStarDiscountVoucherDescription: Allows ye t' plunder two shinin' spikers at a time fer thar cost o' one from thar main shinin' spiker hawker.
mcp.TripleStarDiscountVoucherDescription: Allows ye t' plunder three shinin' spikers at a time fer thar cost o' one from thar main shinin' spiker hawker.
mcp.ThornedSpiritShieldDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation protects ye from thar next swashbuckler that tries t' steal a Shinin' Spiker or Doubloons from ye. Any swashbuckler that attempts t' steal doubloons will instead lose thar doubloons that they would have otherwise stolen.
mcp.CandyCannon2Description: Launches ye even closer t' thar Shinin' Spiker Hawker than thar normal Sweet Boomstick.
mcp.SandyCannon2Description: Launches ye even closer t' thar Shinin'/Dark Spiker Hawker than thar normal Grainy Boomstick.
mcp.TreasureBagDescription: Instantly gives ye three random galleon trinkets. Can receive any trinket in thar voyage except fer Shinin' Spiker Plunder'n'Dupe, Tempest Tickers, Shinin' Spiker Vouchers.
mcp.BinaryDiceDescription: Player can only roll 0-1 fer their next roll. Can be unleashed on any swashbuckler.
mcp.BigMagicDiceDescription: Allows ye t' choose how many landmarks ye or another swashbuckler will move on their next turn. Can choose any number 1-20.
mcp.CuckooClockDescription1: Select thar next turn number. Choose any turn between thar last 7 helm runs n' thar last 3 helm runs. Runs a high tide affair after thar current turn be over. Only one swashbuckler can hold a Twisted Ticker or Tempest Ticker at a time.
mcp.CuckooClockDescription2: Increases thar number Shinin' Spikers t' plunder by 2 if a high tide affair has occurred. Decreases thar number o' Shinin' Spikers t' plunder by 2 if a high tide affair has not occurred. Only one swashbuckler can hold a Twisted Ticker or Tempest Ticker at a time.
mcp.PocketPlundererDescription2: Doubloons from every swashbuckler that ye pass n' that passes ye on thar board. Expires after 3 helm runs.
mcp.TurnStealerDescription: Steal another swashbuckler's helm run o' yer choice. Yer turn will sail at their spot n' ye will move their pawn.
mcp.StarSupplierDescription1: Teleports ye t' thar main shinin' spiker hawker n' gives ye any doubloons needed t' plunder a shinin' spiker.
mcp.StarSupplierDescription2: Teleports ye t' thar closest main shinin' spiker hawker n' gives ye any doubloons needed t' plunder a shinin' spiker.
mcp.StarSupplierDescription3: Teleports ye t' thar closest main shinin' spiker hawker n' gives ye any doubloons needed t' plunder an additional shinin' spiker.
mcp.AnvilDeathTrapDescription: Any foe that lands on this snare gives thar snare planter half o' their doubloons (minimum o' 10).
mcp.FreezeTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this snare gets frozen in place, sets their roll set t' 0, n' nullifies thar landmark below it. Expires after 2 uses.
mcp.StarSetterDescription: Choose one o' 4 places t' set thar shinin' spiker hawker.
mcp.StarSetterDescription1: Choose one o' 4 places t' set thar shinin' spiker hawker.
mcp.StarSetterDescription2: Choose one o' 4 places t' set thar shinin' spiker hawker furthest away from ye.
mcp.StarCounterfeiterDescription: Steal one shinin' spiker from a swashbuckler o' yer choice n' duplicate it. Bonus shinin' spikers unaffected by this trinket.
mcp.StarSafeDescription: Secures two of yer shinin' spikers to be set in yer stone fer the rest of thar voyage. Swashbucklers can still plunder unsecured shinin' spikers.
mcp.TwinionPetsDescription: Summons two minions where ye stand. Split yer roll between two additional pawns by swapping places wit' either minion when traversing thar board. Land on both minions' landmarks n' yer own landmark. Adds 2 t' yer roll.
mcp.TrafficControllerDescription: Switches thar traffic lights n' keeps them locked that way until yer next time at helm.
mcp.EnchantedGoldBarDescription: Gives ye 20 Doubloons when cast (not when forked for).
mcp.FreeverserDescription: Allows ye to move in any direction at yer helm. You can change current tide only when ye approach a fork.
mcp.ccc: The Chaotic Cataclysm o' Thar Creeper
mcp.rpsc: Barnacle Nugget, Writin' Surface, Cutters, Run
mcp.NotEnoughCoins: You do not have enough doubloons t' plunder a
mcp.NotEnoughCoins2: You do not have enough doubloons t' plunder a
mcp.ArcaneAtollStarSchmooverDescription: Moves both the Shinin' Spiker Merchant and the Imposter Shinin' Spiker Merchant to new random seaspots.
mcp.ArcaneAtollStarSetterDescription: Choose one of 4 landmarks to move a random Shinin' Spiker Hawker. The other Seller gets moved to a random landmark.
mcp.CandyCannonReverseDescription: Launches ye closer t' thar start of the map.
mcp.CandyCannon2ReverseDescription: Launches ye even closer t' thar start of the map.
mcp.SandyCannonReverseDescription: Launches ye closer t' thar start of the map.
mcp.SandyCannon2ReverseDescription: Launches ye even closer t' thar start of the map.
mcp.music_disc_challenge_description: Ye’ll be battlin’ on the lower ledge, dead center o’ this here board. That bony bilge rat’s arrow’ll strike true ‘n drop the creeper where he stands. Line yerself up smart-like, so the skeleton fires at the creeper without bringin’ yerself too near. Mind yer steps—yer lifeblood be scarce. Take a tumble, and ye be losin’ the reckonin'!
mcp.elder_guardian_fight_description: Ye’ll be handed a mighty atlantis spear that returns to yer fist after ye hurl it. Ye’ll be ridin’ an axolotl beast, swimmin’ wherever ye be facin’. Hurl yer atlantis spear at the gray sea devil—the elder guardian—to deal ‘im a salty wound. Beware—he summons drowned deckhands now ‘n then. Keep yer distance, lest ye fancy a meetin’ with Davy Jones!
mcp.paint_cube_challenge_description: Ye’ll be handed a pair o’ leather peg-legs. Step atop a patch o’ wool to dye ‘em with that hue. Wherever ye stomp, yer boots’ll splash color ‘cross the deck beneath ye. Want a new shade? Just step on a different wooly patch. Once ye slap that start sign, a pattern’ll appear in the glass. Copy it true in under 40 ticks o’ the clock, and ye’ll beat the reckonin' and pocket yerself 15 shiny doubloons!
mcp.cannon_defuser_description: There be six cursed triggers before ye. One hides a boom-blast trap! Ye’ll be handed a diffuser tool what can disarm four o’ ‘em. Once ye step into the fray, ye’ve got 20 heartbeats to break four buttons. If one o’ ‘em hides the bomb and ye smash it proper, ye’ll earn yerself 10 doubloons for yer brave defusin’. But pick wrong, and it’ll cost ye 10 doubloons! Pro tip, matey: swing that diffuser to mine the buttons—don’t ye dare press ‘em!
mcp.picnic_panic_description: I be namin’ 7-9 treasures in the title — ye must pluck 'em from the barrel and toss 'em into the grubbin’ basket (composter). Ye can chuck ‘em in any order ye fancy. Give me another tap when ye be done, and if the basket holds all, no more, no less, I’ll be rewardin’ ye with 15 doubloons!
mcp.ctf_flag_title: Break sail with cutlass to grab it
mcp.TicketStarDescription1: This spiker be awarded to a random swashbuckler/tribe's ticket at the end of the game
mcp.GoldenStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the highest maximum doubloons held during the game at any time
mcp.EventStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the most number of storms triggered
mcp.RunnerStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the most landmarks moved
mcp.AllStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the best scallywag performance
mcp.AllStarDescriptionMinigames: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the most scallywags won
mcp.AllStarDescriptionCoins: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the most doubloons won from scallywags
mcp.TicketStarDescription2: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe with the most tickets
mcp.RacingStarDescription: This star is awarded to the first swashbuckler/tribe to complete the most round trips
mcp.CoinRobberStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that plunders thar most doubloons
mcp.ItemStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that uses the most trinkets
mcp.ShoppingStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that forks the most doubloons on trinkets in shops
mcp.PelletStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that scourages the most pellets
mcp.TransactionStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that makes the most spiker purchases
mcp.SacrificialStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that sacrifices the most doubloons into the altars
mcp.WarperStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that warps through the most pipes
mcp.LuckStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that lands on the most yellow, black, and chance time landmarks
mcp.DiversificationStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that has the highest minimum number of doubloons invested across all parcels
mcp.InitiatorStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that initiates the most dust-ups, mini dust-ups, and bloodlust scallywags
mcp.SpellCasterStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that casts the most spells
mcp.SantasHelperStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that delivers the most presents
mcp.TombRaiderStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that completes the most temple stages
mcp.ExplorerStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that visits the most unique landmarks
mcp.RedStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that lands on the most red landmarks

mcp.raw_steak_expire: Yer raw beef went bad and ye be sunk it
mcp.raw_fish_expire: Yer raw fish went bad and ye be sunk it
mcp.award_racing_star.generic.solo: be awarded t' thar first swashbuckler t' complete thar most laps on thar board. A swashbuckler be considered t' have completed a lap each time they cross thar beginning o' thar sail.
mcp.award_racing_star.generic.team: be awarded t' thar first tribe t' complete thar most laps on thar board. A swashbuckler be considered t' have completed a lap each time they cross thar beginning o' thar sail.
mcp.SpectatorVoidMessage: This scallywag be played in yellowbelly mode. Click here to nullify scallywag if need be.
mcp.DropToPractice: Drop To Astern t' Trainin' Trial
mcp.DropPracticeLore1: Drop trinket to hoist trainin' trial
mcp.ColorBeg: Ye can plead wit’ that swashbuckler t’ pick a different hue, if ye be truly covetin’ this one.
mcp.RandomColorInfo: Yer swashbuckler hue will be given by fate at the hoistin' of thar voyage.
mcp.TooManyPlayers: There be too may swashbucklers on thar
mcp.TeamsModeCheck: Rivalry Mode requires an even number of swashbucklers to be playing.
mcp.SwapThisQuadrant: Swap This Quadrant (Graze at quadrant and toss this)
mcp.SuitShufflerDescription: Swap the terretories of one quadrant of yer choosin; and a random different terretory.
mcp.SuitSwitcherDescription: Swap the terretories of two quadrants of yer choosin'.
mcp.SpectateMinigames: Arrr, ye be watchin’ the minigames, matey!
mcp.PlayMinigames: Ye be takin’ part in the minigames, aye!
mcp.YouWereAssignedTheColor: Ye be marked with the hue
mcp.RoyalStarDescription: This spiker be awarded to the swashbuckler/tribe that switches quadrant hues the most
mcp.TeamsModeCheck2: Rivalry Mode need at least 4 swashbucklers to be on board.
mcp.TrophyNote: Note: Chestplate awards 1 extra doubloon. Boots awards 1 less doubloon.
mcp.ItemRecoveryNote: Note: Chestplate gives 3% additional salvage chance. Peg-legs gives 3% less salvage chance.
mcp.SuperstarNote: Note: Chestplate and greaves give a small chance for additional shinin' spiker shards.
mcp.EnderNote: Note: Chestplate and greaves set shorter ponder time to unleash warp after acquiring.
mcp.trophy_upgrade: Awards additional doubloons for winning scallywags
mcp.bling_upgrade: Awards additional doubloons for landing on blue/yellow landmarks
mcp.speedy_upgrade: Increases bone range by 1 per fortification
mcp.superstar_upgrade: +0.5 shinin' spiker shards forged per shinin' spiker transaction per fortification
mcp.ender_upgrade: +1 landmark choice to warp to per fortification
mcp.PickpocketerDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation, steals doubloons from every swashbuckler that ye pass on thar board. Expires after 3 helm runs.
mcp.PocketPlundererDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation, steals doubloons from every swashbuckler that ye pass n' that passes ye on thar board. Expires after 3 helm runs.
mcp.ttt_task9: Lose Star or Turn o’ Sailin’
mcp.StepOnBeacon: You must step on thar buoy o' light t' teleport
mcp.ViewBoardLore: Drop to go above the board. Offhand to go into Spectator Mode.
mcp.TeleportToTurnPlayerLore: Teleports you to the player taking their turn. Drop to use.
mcp.SacrificialEnchantmentShardDescripti: Used to enhance luck at sacrificial alter
mcp.UltimateBladeOfDoomLore1: Return to Lucas in sandstone house near lava pit.
mcp.CodLore1: Return to Jeff in small oak wood house
mcp.StrengthPotionDescription: Drink potion right before pulling diamond sword in black bastion.
mcp.FireResistancePotionLore: Use to swim in lava pit safely and find lost netherite scrap.
mcp.RawBeefLore1: Cook beef using coal in any oven around the map before it expires.
mcp.SteakLore1: Return to Arnold in mud brick house.
mcp.EnderEyeLore1: Use to activate portal in end dungeon in mesa cave.
mcp.EnderEyeLore2: Reward: Double coins for blue/yellow spots and immunity from red/black spots
mcp.IronPickaxeLore: Use to mine emerald ore in mesa cave.
mcp.SacredEmerladLore1: Return to Barry on side of savana island.
mcp.BowlLore: Use with dandelion to acquire suspicious stew.
mcp.DandelionLore: Feed to brown cow, then use bowl to acquire suspicious stew.
mcp.SuspiciousStewLore1: Return to Skylar in birch wood house.
mcp.MineYourBusinessGlowInfo: You feel yourself getting brighter. So bright that you can be seen through walls.
mcp.StarFragmentInstruction: Return the star fragment to the wizard hut earn a star. Star fragment can be stolen by passing whoever has the item.
mcp.MoodHatLore: What kind of mood will you be in today?
mcp.DropToEndMinigame: Drop to end current minigame in progress
mcp.GoldRushSpeedBootsLore: Equip to get a temporary speed boost!
mcp.GoldRUshJumpBootsLore: Equip to get a temporary jump boost!
mcp.ReturnToSpotLore: Drop to go back to your spot. Offhand to go into Spectator Mode.
mcp.StarFragmentLore: Right click on Arcane Wizard to receive star
mcp.aa_brush_tick.1: %1$s Ahoy explorer. Want t' find some treasure? Ye may use this brush once. Digging sand can give ye%2$sand digging gravel can give ye %3$s Ye have one brush so choose wisely! Hold down %4$s t' brush thar block.
mcp.aa_call_phantom.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' fly across
mcp.aa_drowned_tick.1: %1$s fended off thar bog monsters n' won %2$s
mcp.aa_drowned_tick.2: %1$s did not beat thar bog monster shooting reckonin'.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.1: %1$s Shop trinkets be now 50%% off fer thar next two turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.2: %1$s Shop trinkets be 50%% off fer two more turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.3: %1$s trinkets have spawned across thar map!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.4: %1$s 5 small Coin Piles have spawned across thar map.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.5: %1$s For thar next two turns, all rolls now grant +3 landmarks!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.6: %1$s For an additional two turns, all rolls grant +3 landmarks!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.7: A shinin' spiker fragment has spawned on thar map! Pick it up n' return it t' thar wizard hut t' receive a shinin' spiker!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.8: %1$s The %2$s be now offering two %3$s fer thar price o' one only fer thar next swashbuckler that forks for one!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.9: %1$s The %2$s be extending its two %3$s fer thar price o' one deal fer an additional visitor!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.10: %1$sThe next swashbuckler t' land on yellow will receive a bonus trinket. Thar next swashbuckler t' land on black will get sent avast t' thar start o' thar board.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.11: %1$s Each swashbuckler has a new random snare spawned in a random spot on thar board!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.12: Two pairs o' teleporters have spawned fer thar next two turns.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.13: Two pairs o' teleporters be now here fer an additional two turns.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.17.8: Note: Slip To Spikers/Spiker Looters will teleport ye t' thar nearest shinin' spiker hawker regardless o' whether it's real.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.17: %1$s Thar main %2$s has moved n' an %3$s has spawned! Thar %4$s looks like thar original but doesn't trade a %5$s. It will go away once a %6$s be forked for from thar main %7$s.%8$s
mcp.aa_magenta_event.18: %1$s Shop trinkets now cost 50%% more fer thar next two turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.19: %1$s Shop trinkets cost 50%% more fer two more turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.20: %1$s For thar next two turns, Trolls have taken over! Roll higher than them t' pass or yer turn ends!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.21: %1$s For an additional two turns, Trolls have taken over! Roll higher than them t' pass or yer turn ends!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.25: %1$s Trinkets cannot be cast fer one turn!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.26: %1$s Trinkets be unusable fer an additional turn!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.27: %1$s Every swashbuckler be sunk one trinket!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.28: %1$s%2$s shinin' spiker shards have spawned across thar map.
mcp.aa_map_troll_end_roll.1: %1$sAh, ye bested me! Right this way.
mcp.aa_map_troll_end_roll.2: %1$sSorry, ye failed t' roll higher than me. Now ye're stuck.
mcp.aa_map_troll_tick.2: %1$sAyo, if ye want t' get past me, ye must roll higher than me. Or ye can pay me %2$s n' I will let ye past.
mcp.aa_map_troll_tick.3:
Right click thar troll t' continue 
or 
Drop yer %1$s t' pay thar fee

mcp.aa_next_turn.3: Thick Gold has ended! Thar 50% trinket discount be now gone.
mcp.aa_next_turn.6: Thin Gold has ended! Thar +50% trinket cost be now gone.
mcp.aa_next_turn.16: %1$s turns until thar %2$s go t' sleep!
mcp.aa_next_turn.18: The trolls have gone t' sleep!

mcp.aa_parkour_tick.2: %1$s beat thar dripleaf parkour n' won %2$s
mcp.aa_pass_spot.1: %1$s Ahoy adventurer! Need a quick way across thar water? I can help ye wit' that fer thar mere cost o' %2$s golden smackers.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.2: %1$s Sorry, I cannot offer ye a ride. Thar phantom be on thar opposite side o' thar lagoon.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.4: %1$s Ahoy adventurer! Need a quick way across thar water? I can help ye wit' that fer thar mere cost o' %2$s golden smackers.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.5: %1$s Sorry, I cannot offer ye a ride. Thar phantom be on thar opposite side o' thar lagoon.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.7: %1$s Ahoy traveler. With me magic, I can build a fragile dripleaf parkour. Reach thar top, grab thar %2$s n' come avast t' plunder them. Thar water be toxic so make sure not t' fall in. Also, thar dripleaves stay up fer only 1 second after stepping on them, so be quick!
mcp.aa_pass_spot.8: %1$s Ahoy matey! Those bog monsters be after me loot again! Here be a crossbow wit' 5 arrows. Use it t' take care o' them. But ye can only miss one shot. And their arrows kill ye in 1 shot, so be careful! Kill them fer me n' I will reward ye wit' %2$s
mcp.aa_pass_spot.9: %1$s Ahoy adventurer! Can I hook ye up wit' some trinkets?

mcp.approach_wizard_hut.1: %1$sWelcome t' me wizard hut where ye can cast a variety o' spells. Step right up n' choose one o' three spells ye want t' cast by pressing thar button.%2$s
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.2: %1$s Shop trinkets cost 50%% less fer thar next 2 turns.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.4: %1$s 5 Doubloon piles spawn worth 4-7 doubloons each.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.5: %1$s Swashbucklers' rolls increase by 3 fer thar next two turns
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.6: %1$s Shinin' Spiker Fragment spawns on thar board. First swashbuckler t' bring it t' thar wizard hut earns a shinin' spiker. Ye can steal thar fragment by passing thar owner o' thar fragment.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.7: %1$s Next shinin' spiker forked for from thar main shinin' spiker hawker earns a free additional spiker.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.8: %1$s Next swashbuckler t' land on yellow receives a bonus trinket n' next swashbuckler t' land on black gets sent back t' thar start.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.9: %1$s Every swashbuckler gets a random snare placed on thar board in a random spot.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.10: %1$s Two pairs o' teleporters spawn on thar map fer two turns.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.11: %1$s Three swashbucklers (other than thar current turn swashbuckler) will swap positions wit' each other.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.12: %1$s Main shinin' spiker hawker moves n' a new fake one spawns that does not get removed until a shinin' spiker be forked for from thar real seller.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.13: %1$s Shop trinkets cost 50%% more fer thar next two turns.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.14: %1$s Three trolls spawn across thar map fer a turn. Ye must roll higher than them t' proceed or yer turn ends.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.15: %1$s For thar next turn, trinkets be unusable.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.16: %1$s Each swashbuckler loses one random trinket that they own.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.17: %1$s%2$s Shinin' spiker shards spawn across thar map.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an Overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.2: %1$sArcane Atoll be a board on a magical island.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.4: %1$sThis board has 15 unique spells that can be cast. Each spell changes thar voyage in ways that can be beneficial or detrimental t' swashbucklers.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.5: %1$sEntering thar %2$s hut gives ye thar option t' choose one o' three random spells t' cast fer free.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.6: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark will cast a random spell.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.7: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that casts thar most spells. Spells cast through both thar %3$s hut n' from landing on %4$s count fer this %5$s.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.8: %1$sPay a %2$s a visit n' fer thar cost o' 7 %3$s, they will call on their phantom t' transport ye t' thar opposite island. Beware that ye can only ride thar phantom if it be on thar same island as ye.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.9: %1$sDig up a sand or gravel block in this reckonin' n' ye may find yerself some hidden loot.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.10: %1$sDefeat thar Bog Monsters in this reckonin' as they try t' take over a shipwreck n' ye will be rewarded wit' 10 %2$s.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.11: %1$sIf ye beat thar Dripleaf Parkour Reckonin', %2$s will reward ye handsomely wit' 10 %3$s.
mcp.arcane_atoll_description.1:
%1$sThis board has magical spells that can make gameplay chaotic. Spells be unleashed by passing thar Wizard Hut where ye can choose one o' three spells or by landing on a %2$s where a random event spell will occur. Spells can do all sorts o' things t' impact gameplay such as changing thar price o' shop trinkets, spawning trinkets on thar board, increasing swashbuckler rolls n' much more.

%3$sThere be three reckonin's on thar board that ye can attempt t' earn doubloons.%4$sPass by them n' they will send thar mystical phantom t' carry ye over thar lagoon fer a cost o' 7 doubloons, but thar phantom can only be on one side o' thar lagoon at a time.

%5$sThe bonus shinin' spiker fer this board be thar Spell Caster Shinin' Spiker n' be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that casts thar mosts spells either through thar wizard hut or magenta landmarks.

mcp.balance_beam.1: Move along thar beam without falling off.
mcp.balance_beam_rules.1: Watch out because gravity will try t' push ye off thar beam.
mcp.balance_beam_rules.2: The direction o' gravity goes towards thar light beneath thar beam
mcp.balance_beam_rules.3: Gravity changes every 10 seconds, so be careful.
mcp.balance_beam_rules.4: Step over white glass t' reach anchor points.
mcp.balance_beam_rules.5: First swashbuckler t' complete thar course wins! Otherwise thar rumlin be determined by thar first swashbuckler t' complete thar most anchor points.
mcp.battle_minigame.1: It's time fer a bloodlust Scallywag!
mcp.battle_minigame2.2: Everyone pays into thar pot half o' their doubloon earnings from thar last 3 scallywags that all swashbucklers participated in.
mcp.battle_minigame2.3: Let's see how much each swashbuckler will pay into thar pot.
mcp.battle_minigame2.4: %1$s has put %2$s doubloons into thar pot.
mcp.battle_minigame_pot_finish.1: Everyone pays %1$s doubloons into thar pot!
mcp.bat_blast.1: Bats wit' doubloons on top o' them will spawn randomly in thar arena.
mcp.bat_blast.2: They will be flying around in thar air randomly changing direction.
mcp.bat_blast.3: Hit thar bats wit' yer bat t' stash thar doubloons that they be carrying.
mcp.bat_blast.4: Golden bats (highlighed in yellow) will reward ye wit' two doubloons fer hitting them!
mcp.bat_blast.5: A new bat will spawn every few seconds.
mcp.bat_blast.6: Every doubloon ye stash be yers t' keep.
mcp.bat_blast.7: The swashbuckler that stashs thar most doubloons wins.
mcp.bew_reselect_player.1: %1$s I cannot offer ye me services currently.
mcp.big_dice.2: Players will now roll a Titan-Sized Bone!

%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.big_magic_dice_select_player.1: %1$s The %2$s event be active. This will add 3 onto yer %3$s Roll.
mcp.big_magic_dice_select_player.2: %1$s Yer %2$s be active. This will add %3$s onto yer %4$s Roll.
mcp.big_magic_dice_select_player.3: %1$s Ye have one or more trinket(s) active that increase yer roll. This bonus will get added on t' yer %2$s Roll.

Can be acquired from %4$s landmarks, free trinket pickups, or forked for from thar shop.

mcp.black_event_7.1: %1$s has be sunk all o' their trinkets!
mcp.block_search.1: Hiders will disguise themselves as blocks.
mcp.block_search_rules.1: %1$s will search fer thar hiders by looking at blocks. Thar crosshair will appear on thar hunter's screen if looking at another swashbuckler's block.
mcp.block_search_rules.2: %1$s will search fer %2$s while %3$s will search fer %4$s. Thar crosshair will appear on thar hunter's screen if looking at another swashbuckler's block.
mcp.block_search_rules.3: Each swashbuckler gets a list o' thar blocks that hiders can disguise as in their hotbar.
mcp.block_search_rules.4: The hunter will get an ability every 30 seconds t' locate thar nearest hider by listening t' ticks. This ability can be used by dropping thar sword.
mcp.block_search_rules.5: %1$s must find all o' thar hiders before thar time runs out in order t' plunder.
mcp.block_search_rules.6: Whichever swashbuckler finds thar opposing swashbuckler first will plunder fer their tribe!
mcp.block_search_rules.7: %1$s must outlast thar hunter by disguising n' blending in wit' thar environment.
mcp.block_search_start.1: You can choose t' hide as any block in yer hotbar by dropping thar trinket. Stay in one place t' solidify.
mcp.block_search_start.2: If ye hit a hider's block, ye will hear a crunching sound. Hiders that be eliminated will appear in chat. Once yer crosshair appears, then ye be looking at a hider. Ye do not need t' spam swing yer cutlass.
mcp.block_search_tick.1: You can now use yer ability (Drop Sword t' use)

mcp.board_setup.2: Let's determine the order of helm control! Each swashbuckler will roll a bone to determine the helm control order!
mcp.board_setup.3: Turn order will be decided by fate.
mcp.board_setup.4: Turn order will be decided by fate wit' tribes alternating.
mcp.board_setup.5: The swashbuckler wit' thar highest roll will go first.
mcp.board_setup.6: The sailing order will alternate between tribes n' thar swashbuckler wit' thar highest roll will go first.
mcp.board_setup.7: You can roll thar dice by dropping thar dice block (by pressing %1$s) in yer inventory.
mcp.board_tick.2: Adjust thar music volume in thar %1$s sound port
mcp.board_tick.3: Changes your viewing gamemode to spectator. Drop to use.
mcp.board_tick_items.1: Automatically skips the current swashbuckler's turn. Use if stuck (operators only).
mcp.board_tick_items.2: Automatically skips the current swashbuckler's turn. Use if stuck (operators only).
mcp.board_tick_items.3: Type %1$s t' return avast t' adventure mode.
mcp.board_tick_tp.1: You must roll first before forking a %1$s.
mcp.board_tick_tp.2: %1$s Using your %2$s or %3$s will teleport you to the %4$s that is flickering when holding the item.
mcp.board_tick_tp.3: %1$s Using your %2$s or %3$s will move the %4$s that is flickering when holding the item.
mcp.board_tick_turn_order.2: Adjust thar music volume in thar %1$s sound port
mcp.boat_race.1: Race in yer boat along thar track!
mcp.boat_race_rules.1: You will go through different ice curves n' bubble columns.
mcp.boat_race_rules.2: Drop flag t' bring yer boat t' ye if yer boat gets stuck
mcp.boat_race_rules.3: First person t' finish 2 laps wins!
mcp.bombs_away.1: Throw TNT at yer enemies t' knock them off their island.
mcp.bombs_away.2: You can throw TNT by dropping thar TNT trinkets in yer inventory (by pressing %1$s).
mcp.bombs_away.3: The TNT will fly in thar direction that ye be facing.
mcp.bombs_away.4: TNT will ignite after coming in contact wit' a block. It can also explode instantly upon a direct hit o' another swashbuckler.
mcp.bombs_away.5: You will receive one TNT every 5 seconds (maximum o' 5).
mcp.bombs_away.6: The last tribe t' survive wins.
mcp.boom_carts.1: Redirect TNT minecarts towards yer enemies' side.
mcp.boom_carts.2: A TNT minecart will explode when it reaches a tribe's side n' will take away one o' their lives.
mcp.boom_carts.3: The voyage ends when one tribe loses all their lives.
mcp.boom_carts.4: Each swashbuckler controls a miner that can redirect thar minecart that it be aligned wit'.
mcp.boom_carts.5:
Controls:
Swing Port: %1$s
Swing Starboard: %2$s
Redirect Minecart: %3$s or %4$s (on key press)
mcp.boom_carts.6: Yer miner must finish its swinging animation before ye can move it again.
mcp.boom_carts.7: Be careful! Yer miner will get briefly stunned if it be next t' a minecart when it explodes.
mcp.boss_battle.1: As a group o' swashbucklers, defeat thar boss together.
mcp.boss_battle_rules.1: The boss ye will face be thar %1$s.
mcp.boss_battle_rules.2: The Ender Mutant spawns endermite minions n' shoots dragon breath once in a while.
mcp.boss_battle_rules.3: The Ender Mutant will teleport ye t' one o' its endermite minions when it hits ye.
mcp.boss_battle_rules.4: Deal thar most overall damage t' thar boss t' plunder! However be careful as ye lose half o' yer glory tallies fer walkin' the plank.
mcp.boss_battle_rules.5: The voyage ends after thar boss gets sent to Davy Jones.
mcp.boss_brawl.1: The electro-skeleton has returned t' Minecraft Party 2 n' will be played by %1$s.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.1: %1$s will try t' kill %2$s using their swords n' bows.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.2: The attackers will receive one arrow every 8 seconds. Maximum o' 2.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.3: %1$s can summon fireballs by dropping or clicking wit' thar fire charge.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.4: The electro-skeleton also has a lightning strike wit' a full hit n' can summon minions by dropping or clicking wit' thar egg.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.5: Yer Axe does 6 attack damage on a full blow.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.6: Yer rod has sharpness level 4 n' knockback level 8.
mcp.boss_brawl_rules.7: Kill thar other tribe t' plunder thar voyage!
mcp.boss_brawl_tick.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.boss_brawl_tick.2: You died. Ye be now a spectator.
mcp.bridge_crossing.1: You n' yer enemy be on opposite sides o' a bridge.
mcp.bridge_crossing_rules.1: You must make yer way t' their island while stopping yer enemy from reaching yer island.
mcp.bridge_crossing_rules.2: You will play this gamemode in survival mode.
mcp.bridge_crossing_rules.3: Use blocks n' weapons t' help reach yer enemy's island.
mcp.bridge_crossing_rules.4: Once ye reach yer enemy's island, ye must jump into their pit at thar end o' thar island t' plunder a round.
mcp.bridge_crossing_rules.5: If ye die, ye will respawn after a few seconds.
mcp.bridge_crossing_rules.6: The first swashbuckler t' jump into their enemy's pit two times wins thar dust-up!
mcp.bs_player_death.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.bs_player_death.2: You died. Ye be now a spectator.
mcp.button_search.1: You will get 30 seconds t' hide a button in a room that looks identical t' yer enemy's room.
mcp.button_search_release_players.1: Both swashbucklers have hid their button. Time t' set sail!
mcp.button_search_rules.1: You may place it, put it in a container, or drop it at yer feet where ye be standing.
mcp.button_search_rules.2: When thar time be up, each swashbuckler will attempt t' find their enemy's button n' press it.
mcp.button_search_rules.3: If thar button be still in yer inventory when thar time be up, then it will get put wherever ye be standing.
mcp.button_search_rules.4: First swashbuckler t' press their enemy's button wins!
mcp.button_search_start.1: Click here t' confirm hiding spot
mcp.buy_bag_o_items.3.2.hover: Player uses two dice for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.buy_bag_o_items.4.2.hover: Player uses three dice for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.buy_star_safe.1: You do not have enough coins to buy a Star Safe.
mcp.buy_treasure_bag.11.2.hover: %1$s%2$s Doubloons from every swashbuckler that ye pass n' that passes ye on thar board. Expires after 3 turns.
mcp.buy_treasure_bag.14.2.hover: Teleports you to the main star seller and gives you any Coins needed to buy a Star.
mcp.cancel_game.1: You must finish or strip thar current swashbuckler's helm run in order t' cancel thar voyage
mcp.cancel_game_confirm.1: This will end thar current voyage in progress. All data n' scores will be be sunk. Use only if necessary.%1$s
mcp.cancel_game_confirm.2: This will end thar current voyage in progress. All data n' scores will be be sunk. Use only if necessary.%1$s
mcp.candyland_approach_star.1: %1$s%2$s, ye finally made it! Would ye like t' plunder a %3$s%4$s
mcp.candyland_approach_star.2:
If not, click the button below.
%1$s
mcp.candyland_approach_star.3: %1$s%2$s, ye finally made it! Would ye like t' plunder a -hold on a second, ye can't afford a %3$s.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.candyland_cutscene.2: %1$sCandyland be a linear board that has tricks n' reckonin's that offer SWEET rewards.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s be positioned on top o' thar cake at thar center o' thar board. There be multiple paths that can be taken t' reach here, each wit' different tradeoffs. When reaching thar %3$s, ye can plunder a single %4$s fer 20 %5$s. If ye cannot afford a %6$s, thar %7$s will automagically send ye back t' thar start. Thar shinin' spiker hawker does not move after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.4: %1$sTake a visit t' Chester's Humble Abode. Sometimes he be grumpy. Depending on his mood, he will either give ye a hearty treat, or play ye fer a fool.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.5: %1$sVisiting Bew lets ye steal 5-10 %2$s (fer free) or steal a %3$s (fer 50 %4$s) from another swashbuckler o' yer choice.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.6: %1$sLanding on this magenta landmark will melt thar ice cream opening up thar blocked path next t' it. If thar path be already open, thar ice cream above it will melt n' block off thar path.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on this magenta landmark will switch which path in thar chocolate biome be open.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.8: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that spends thar most cumulative %3$s in thar shops.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.11: %1$sPay a visit to the %2$s’s quarters and finish the trial by snatchin’ the honey bottle. That sweet bottle o’ honey be the prize fer yer troubles.
mcp.candyland_description.1: %1$sThe Shinin' Spiker Hawker be at thar center o' thar board on top o' thar cake n' does not move. When ye reach thar end o' thar board, ye will get sent back t' thar start if ye plunder a Shinin' Spiker or select thar "<RETURN TO START>" option fer forking for a Shinin' Spiker. If ye can't afford a Shinin' Spiker, ye will automatically be sent back t' thar start. Thar board specific shinin' spiker goes t' thar swashbuckler that spends thar most doubloons in thar shops.
mcp.candyland_enter_toll.1: Ye don't have enough doubloons t' enter through thar path.
mcp.candyland_house_fail.1: %1$s did not beat thar gingerbread house reckonin'.
mcp.candyland_house_success.1: %1$s beat thar gingerbread house reckonin' n' won a %2$s!
mcp.candyland_house_success.2: %1$s beat thar gingerbread house reckonin' n' won a %2$s!
mcp.candyland_no_star.1: %1$s Oh darn, it's a shame that ye didn't want t' plunder one.
mcp.candyland_no_star.2: %1$s Shimmer me timbers, it's a shame that ye didn't have enough %2$s t' plunder one. Maybe next time...
mcp.candyland_pass_spot.1: %1$s Retrieve thar honey bottle in me basement. Thar honey bottle be an trinket that adds 8 (or 12) t' yer roll. Careful! There be zombies. Ye must CROUCH on thar spot that matches thar colors on thar four faces o' each wall then immedately disembark wit' thar honey. Crouching on thar wrong spot will give ye slowness.
mcp.candyland_pass_spot.2: %1$s A path will get shown n' stay on fer 5 seconds. Ye must memorize thar route n' step on those blocks t' reach thar other side n' back. If ye can grab thar cookie n' come back without stepping on a wrong block, I will award ye wit' more doubloons depending on how hard thar path be.
mcp.candyland_pass_spot.3: %1$s Come t' me fer something sweet!
mcp.candyland_pass_spot.4: %1$s I have some SWEET trinkets fer ye!
mcp.candyland_path_fail.1: %1$s did not beat path thar reckonin'.
mcp.candyland_path_success.1: %1$s beat thar path reckonin' n' won %2$s%3$s
mcp.candyland_tick.1:
%1$s Be ye sure ye want t' forfeit forking thar %2$s?
%3$s
mcp.candyland_trick_or_treat4.2: %1$s I plundered %2$s doubloons o' yers while ye be staring abyss!

mcp.cannoneers.1: You must aim yer cannonball over thar wall n' hit yer enemy's cannon.
mcp.cannoneers_rules.1: The controls will be as follows:
mcp.cannoneers_rules.2:
Change target: %1$sChange power level: %2$sSet target: %3$s
Fire/Lock shot: %4$s
mcp.cannoneers_rules.3: The wind n' platform heights will change throughout thar voyage.
mcp.cannoneers_rules.4: The first swashbuckler t' get a shot on their enemy without getting shot in thar same round wins.
mcp.cannoneers_tick.2: Shot set. Press %1$s to lock shot.
mcp.cannoneers_tick.4: Shot set. Press %1$s to lock shot.
mcp.capture_the_flag.1: Steal thar other tribe's sail n' bring it back t' yer base.
mcp.capture_the_flag_rules.1: Grab yer enemies' sail by mining it wit' yer sword.
mcp.capture_the_flag_rules.2: After grabbing their sail, bring it back t' yer base.
mcp.capture_the_flag_rules.3: If ye take damage while holding thar flag, ye will drop it.
mcp.capture_the_flag_rules.4: PvP be enabled (No hit cooldowns). If ye die, ye will respawn at yer base after a few seconds.
mcp.capture_the_flag_rules.5: First tribe t' capture thar other tribe's flag wins.
mcp.ccc.4: Players will take turns pressing buttons.
mcp.ccc_rules.1: Press a button t' end yer turn.
mcp.ccc_rules.2: One o' thar buttons will blow up thar swashbuckler when pressed.
mcp.ccc_rules.3: After all swashbucklers take their turn or someone blows up, thar buttons get reset n' a new round begins.
mcp.center_park_approach_slot_machine.1: %1$s Step right up! Step right up! Test yer skills on thar grog guzzler n' earn a sweet reward if ye match three o' a kind in thar middle row within 30 seconds!
mcp.center_park_board_description.1: %1$sCenter park be a board that takes place in a city surrounding an urban park. In this city, ye travel on thar right side o' thar road. When entering an intersection, there be always two exits available. Right away, thar East n' West exits at every intersection be open. When a swashbuckler lands on a magenta spot these exits close n' thar North n' South exits open. Thar exit states swap every time a swashbuckler lands on a magenta spot.
mcp.center_park_bonus_star_description.1: %1$sThis board features a Ticket Bonus Shinin' Spiker. At thar end o' thar voyage, a random ticket that has been forked for by any swashbuckler will be selected. Thar owner o' that ticket receives thar bonus star. Tickets can be forked for from thar two Ticket Masters on thar board.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_end.1: %1$s did not beat thar doubloon robbing reckonin'.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_end.2: %1$s completed thar doubloon robbing reckonin' n' won %2$s%3$s.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_tick.1: %1$sHere's a master key t' this apartment building that unlocks every room. Ye have 30 seconds t' stash as many doubloons as possible in thar building. If thar time runs out n' ye be still in thar building, ye plunder nothing. Higher floors have more doubloons.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_tick.3: Right click door wit' key t' set sail reckonin'
mcp.center_park_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.center_park_cutscene.2: %1$sCenter park be a board that takes place in a city surrounding an urban park. In this city, ye travel on thar right side o' thar road.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.3: %1$sThis board has two %2$s active at all times wit' each o' them selling a %3$s fer 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.4: %1$sWhen entering an intersection, there be always two exits available. Only thar exits wit' thar traffic lights in thar %2$s state be able taken. Thar exits wit' thar blockades be not able t' be taken. Right away, thar East n' West exits at every intersection be open.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.5: %1$sWhen a swashbuckler lands on a magenta landmark, thar East n' West exits close n' thar North n' South exits open. Thar exit states swap every time a swashbuckler lands on a magenta spot.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.6: %1$sTickets can be forked for by visiting a Ticket Master each located at one o' thar two Casinos on thar board. At thar end o' thar voyage, a random ticket that has been forked for by any swashbuckler will be selected. Thar owner o' that ticket receives thar bonus star. Each ticket cost 1 %2$s n' ye can plunder as many as ye can afford per visit t' a Casino.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.7: %1$sAdditionally, ye can use tolls t' get inside thar park which can help ye get across thar board quicker n' easier. Using a toll costs 5 %2$s.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.8: %1$s%2$s and %3$s can be used t' take any exit in an intersection as well as go through thar tolls without paying.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.9: %1$sTest yer skills on thar Grog Guzzler! Match 3 in a row fer a nice cash prize.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.10: %1$sTry out yer thievery skills in this reckonin'! Don't be slow or ye will get locked in thar building.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.11: %1$sMr. P loves chilling in thar park n' gambling! Try t' take advantage o' this n' see if ye can plunder some money off o' him.
mcp.center_park_enter_toll.1: Ye don't have enough doubloons t' enter through thar path.
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.1: %1$s%2$s Come plunder some tickets! I will draw a random ticket at thar end o' thar voyage n' thar owner o' that ticket will get a %3$s!
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.2: %1$s%2$s Welcome t' Center Park! Admission will be 5 %3$s.
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.3:
%1$sHello human, can I interest you in some gambling?
%2$s %3$s
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.4: %1$sI have a reckonin' fer ye t' complete. Come talk t' me!
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.5: %1$s%2$s I have some nifty trinkets t' trade ye.
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.6: %1$s%2$s Come visit me shop n' get yerself something cool.
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.7: %1$s%2$s Could I interest ye in any trinkets?
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.8: %1$s%2$s Trinkets! Trinkets! Trinkets! Get yer trinkets here!
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.9: %1$s%2$s Got any doubloons t' burn? Buy some trinkets here at me stand.
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.10: %1$s%2$s Special trinket deal! Buy one trinket n' get thar second at normal price!
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.11: %1$s%2$s May I interest ye some some o' thar scurviest trinkets?
mcp.center_park_pass_spot_messages.12: %1$s%2$s I plundered some fancy trinkets fer ye!

mcp.coin_pile.1: A coinpile o' %1$s %2$s has appeared on thar board!

mcp.coin_shower.2: Doubloon Shower! All swashbucklers will receive a %1$s fer each landmark passed fer an additional turn!

mcp.collect_coin_pile.2: %1$s has stashed %2$s%3$s from thar Doubloon Rain!
mcp.colorchaos2.1: The time t' reach thar correct color will get shorter as thar voyage goes on.

mcp.colortrails1.1: If ye step over any swashbuckler's trail, then ye be out o' thar voyage!
mcp.colortrails2.1: If ye crouch, avast moving, or fall off ye be out!
mcp.color_chaos.1: Stand on thar correct color block given in yer hotbar before thar floor disappears.
mcp.color_trails.1: As ye run ye leave a colored trail.
mcp.color_trails_eliminate.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.color_trails_rules.1: If ye step over any swashbuckler's trail, then ye be out o' thar voyage!
mcp.color_trails_rules.2: If ye crouch, walk, avast moving, run into water, or fall off thar course ye get eliminated!
mcp.color_trails_rules.3: Each swashbuckler gets one jump where they can jump over any path
mcp.communism.2: %1$s%2$s%3$sThe %4$s have been redistributed evenly among all comrades!

Can be acquired from s%4$s landmarks.
mcp.crazy_clock_description.2:
%1$s%2$s%3$
Can be acquired from s%4$s landmarks.
mcp.crazy_clock_description.3:
%1$s%2$sTurn Mode: %3$s
Spiker Race Mode: Increases the number Shinin' Spikers to win by 1 if a high tide affair has occurred. Decreases the number of Shinin' Spikers to win by 1 if a high tide affair has not occurred.
Only one swashbuckler can hold a twisted ticker at a time.%4$s%5$s%6$s
mcp.creeper_catchers.1: Cats be scared o' ye n' will run away from ye!
mcp.creeper_catchers_rules.1: Cats will move away from ye.
mcp.creeper_catchers_rules.2: Guide as many cats as possible into yer pit. A new cat will appear every few seconds.
mcp.creeper_catchers_rules.3: Each cat that ye capture in yer pit be worth one doubloon each.
mcp.creeper_catchers_rules.14: Black cats be worth two doubloons each.
mcp.creeper_catchers_rules.15: The voyage ends when thar time runs out.
mcp.cuckoo_clock_description.3:
%1$s%2$s
Turn Mode: Select the next turn number. Choose any turn between the last 7 turns and the last 3 turns. Runs a high tide affair after the current turn is over.
Spiker Race Mode: Increases the number Shinin' Spikers to win by 2 if a high tide affair has occurred. Decreases the number of Shinin' Spikers to win by 2 if a high tide affair has not occurred.
Only one swashbuckler can hold a Twisted Ticker or Tempest Ticker at a time.%3$s%4$s%5$s
mcp.decryption.1: You will be given a code o' letters on a sign in thar other room.
mcp.decryption_rules.1: You must translate the string of letters into a string of numbers
mcp.decryption_rules.2: The translation fer each letter be shown on thar wall.
mcp.decryption_rules.3: You must rename yer trinket t' thar number code using thar anvil n' drop thar trinket into thar hopper.
mcp.decryption_rules.4: If thar code be correct, thar door will open. If thar code be incorrect, ye will get yer trinket back.
mcp.decryption_rules.5: First swashbuckler t' enter thar other room wins!
mcp.deuce.1: You n' yer enemy will hit a small slime back n' forth over thar bars.
mcp.deuce_rules.1: You hit thar slime by punching it n' it will go where ye be looking.
mcp.deuce_rules.2: The slime must go up n' over thar bars n' land in on yer enemy's side on thar oak slabs.
mcp.deuce_rules.3: If ye miss a shot or fail t' return yer enemy's shot, ye lose thar point.
mcp.deuce_rules.4: The server will rotate every two serves starting wit' one serve from %1$s.
mcp.deuce_rules.5: You must serve by dropping thar slime ball n' punching thar slime that appears. Tip: Serve at a 45° angle upward fer best results.
mcp.deuce_rules.6: The first swashbuckler t' plunder by a margin o' two glory tallies wins thar duel!
mcp.dev_reset_game.1: Default Settings have been set. Go t' thar Master Settings room t' change any.
mcp.disable_ship.1: %1$s's Ship be now disabled fer two turns!
mcp.disable_ship.2: The ship be now disabled fer two more turns!
mcp.double_star_discount_voucher_descrip: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be acquired in thar Airborne Isles, Candyland, Mooshroom Grotto, Arcane Atoll, n' Dusty Dunes boards.
mcp.double_star_voucher_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be acquired in thar Airborne Isles, Candyland, Mooshroom Grotto, Arcane Atoll, n' Dusty Dunes boards.
mcp.double_trouble.1: Double Trouble! For an additional turn, all doubloon rewards n' losses from landmarks n' scallywags will be doubled!
mcp.double_trouble.2: Double Double Trouble! For an additional turn, all doubloon rewards n' losses from landmarks n' scallywags will be quadrupled!
mcp.double_trouble.3: Double Trouble! For thar next turn, all doubloon rewards n' losses from landmarks n' scallywags will be doubled!
mcp.double_trouble.4: Double Double Trouble! For thar next turn, all doubloon rewards n' losses from landmarks n' scallywags will be quadrupled!
mcp.double_trouble_special_event.2: All %1$s rewards n' loses be now doubled!
mcp.dpmb.4: Press thar buttons t' change thar block behind it t' yer color.
mcp.dpmb.5: The winning threshold represents thar number o' blocks that ye must have as yer color t' plunder.
mcp.dpmb.6: The winning threshold starts at 9 (thar whole wall) then decreases as thar voyage goes on.
mcp.dpmb.7: The first swashbuckler t' reach thar winning threshold wins.
mcp.dpmb2.1: The swashbuckler who has thar most colored blocks at thar end o' 20 seconds wins!
mcp.dragon_doom.2: Yer sky islands be under attack by dragons!
mcp.dragon_doom_rules.1: Dragons will fly around n' break thar land.
mcp.dragon_doom_rules.2: Avoid falling or getting knocked off by a dragon.
mcp.dragon_doom_rules.3: You have four enderpearls that ye can use t' move positions. Ye will ride yer enderpearl when ye throw it instead o' teleporting where it lands.
mcp.dragon_doom_rules.4: Warning! This voyage gets loud. It be recommended that ye turn down yer %1$s sound volume.
mcp.dropper.1: Fall t' thar bottom o' thar dropper starting from thar world height limit.
mcp.dropper0.1: Fall t' thar bottom o' thar dropper.
mcp.dropper2.1: Follow thar pattern on thar signs above. Drop through thar green O's in order from left t' right.
mcp.dropper2_1.1: The green O's on thar signs represent thar path t' drop through starting from thar leftmost sign.
mcp.dropper3.1: First swashbuckler t' complete all 4 droppers wins!
mcp.dropper_rules.1: Weave yer way through thar rings. Ye cannot go around thar rings.
mcp.dropper_rules.2: If ye die, ye set sail back up at thar top.
mcp.dropper_rules.3: To plunder thar voyage, ye must be thar first swashbuckler t' reach thar bottom.
mcp.dropper_rules.4: For swashbucklers that do not reach thar bottom, thar rumlin be chosen between whoever makes it thar farthest.
mcp.drop_minigame_slimeball.1: This will terminate thar current scallywag in progress n' not save scores. %1$sto confirm this.
mcp.drop_minigame_slimeball.2: This will terminate thar current scallywag in progress n' not save scores. %1$sto confirm this.
mcp.duel2.1: %1$s will select thar opposing swashbuckler n' thar wager o' thar dust-up!
mcp.duel2.3: %1$s will select thar wager o' thar dust-up!
mcp.dusty_dunes_approach_ztar_seller.2: Single Use Dark Spiker Spiker Seller>
mcp.dusty_dunes_approach_ztar_seller.3: %1$sWho dares t' entrench on MY oasis?!
mcp.dusty_dunes_approach_ztar_seller.4.1: Single Use Dark Spiker Spiker Seller>
mcp.dusty_dunes_approach_ztar_seller.4: %1$sWho dares t' bother me in me slumber?
mcp.dusty_dunes_approach_ztar_seller.7: %1$s%2$s! I shall punish ye wit' a %3$s!
mcp.dusty_dunes_approach_ztar_seller.8: %1$sCurse ye %2$s n' yer protected shinin' spiker!
mcp.dusty_dunes_cactus.3: %1$sSlow down, partner! Need some help crossing these schorchin' sands o' mine? Hold on, let’s see what I’ve plundered…
mcp.dusty_dunes_cactus.4: %1$sHalt, peon! These be me dunes, n' ye’ve been a real thorn in me side! Now, how t' take a jab at ye…
mcp.dusty_dunes_cactus.16: %1$sOh, I see that ye be poor. Take these%2$s. Ye'll need them more than I do.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cactus.19: %1$sI sent ye back t' thar start!
mcp.dusty_dunes_cactus.21: %1$sI was going t' steal a%2$s, but ye don't have any.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.1: be a linear desert themed board that has two different board states.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.2:
Would you like to get an Overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.3: %1$s%2$s be a linear desert themed board that has two different board states.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.4: %1$sStarting off, thar board takes place in thar daytime. In this state o' thar board only, ye can plunder one %2$s when ye reach thar oasis at thar end. %3$s be forked for from thar %4$s fer thar cost o' 20 %5$s. Passing thar %6$s will send ye back t' thar start n' switch thar board t' night time regardless o' ye buying a %7$s. Thar %8$s does not move after a %9$s gets forked for.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.5: %1$sDuring thar day time, thar majority o' thar landmarks on thar board be blue, wit' no red landmarks being present.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.6: %1$sIf ye pass in front o' %2$s during thar day time, he will give ye a random reward.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.7: %1$sThe %2$s takes place o' thar %3$s during thar night time. Approaching thar %4$s will punish ye wit' a %5$s, which will destroy one o' yer %6$s. If ye do not have a %7$s, thar %8$s will steal 20 %9$s instead. Ye will also get sent back t' thar start n' thar board will switch t' day time. Thar %10$s does not move after being approached.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.8: %1$sDuring thar night time, thar blue landmarks on thar board get swapped t' red landmarks.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.9: %1$sIf ye pass in front o' %2$s during thar night time, he will give ye a random punishment.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.10: %1$sWhen thar board switches t' thar night time state, any %2$s on thar board get turned into %3$s which will steal a %4$s from ye if ye pass them.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.11: %1$s%2$s and %3$s can be used t' bypass thar %4$s and %5$s without losing anything n' skip past Spike thar Cactus (fer both day n' night). Skipping past thar %6$s will toggle thar board back t' day time.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.12: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark that has a clock n' bookshelves next t' it will toggle thar daytime state o' thar board.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.13: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark wit' dynamite next t' it will ignite thar dynamite which will blow up n' launch ye back t' thar start.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.14: %1$sPassing by a pyramid will give thar ye thar ability t' warp t' thar next pyramid fer thar cost o' 7 %2$s.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.15: %1$sPassing a temple gives ye thar opportunity t' complete a reckonin' n' earn %2$s. Each temple consists o' three randomly selected temple stages. Each temple stage be its own mini reckonin' which can range from parkour, treasure finding, navigating a maze, fighting monsters n' more. If ye get t' thar end, ye will receive 15 %3$s plus 5 bonus %4$s if ye complete it without taking any damage.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.16: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that completes thar most temple stages.
mcp.dusty_dunes_description.1:
%1$sThis board has two phases; night and day. Day/Night can change when the swashbuckler lands on a magenta clock landmark or by reaching the end of the board.

%2$s The %3$s sells a %4$sfor 20 %5$s during thar day. But beware! Druing thar night, thar %6$s takes the place of the shinin' spiker hawker and will destroy one of yer stars (or 20 doubloons if you do not have a spiker) when passed. Spooky/Haunter Mode can be used to bypass the Dark Spiker Hawker without penalty.

%7$s Landmarks next to a mini clock tower will change the day/night phase when landed on. Landmarks next to TNT will launch you back to the start when landed on.

%8$sThere be two temples on thar board that ye can attempt n' reward 15 %9$s if completed or 20 %10$s if completed without taking any damage. Each temple has three randomly generated stages.

%11$sThe bonus shinin' spiker fer this board be thar %12$s. It be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that completes thar most temple stages.
