mcp.fi_lava_pit_death.1: %1$s That looked like it hurt!%2$s t' %3$s fer burning up.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.1: %1$s I plundered a sweet reward fer ye if ye complete this quest fer me.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.2: %1$s I have a great trinket fer ye if ye help me quickly.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.3: %1$s I have an trinket fer ye t' find. Talk t' me.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.4: %1$s Come inside me house if ye choose t' go down this path. I have a task fer ye.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.5: %1$s There be something I have fer ye. No catch.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.6: %1$s Catch a man a fish. Feed him fer a day. Teach a man t' fish? Nah I'm too lazy fer that. But I will reward ye if ye fish fer me.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.7: %1$s Psst. Come here in thar cave. Ye won't be sorry
mcp.fi_pass_spot.8: %1$s I've plundered an easy task fer ye t' help me out wit'. Come inside.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.9: %1$s I've plundered a secret t' tell ye. Come here fer more details.
mcp.fi_pass_spot.10: %1$s Ahoy traveler. I am selling some trinkets. Be ye interested in forking for any?
mcp.fi_quest_advance.1: %1$s returned thar netherite n' won a %2$s!
mcp.fi_quest_advance.5.3.hover: Player uses three dice for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.fi_quest_advance.12: %1$s Please choose an trinket first, then click on me
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.1.2: Click on Mason to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.1: %1$s Bring me back me netherite scrap that I dropped in thar lava pit. Here be a fire resistance potion t' help ye, but be careful as it only lasts fer 30 seconds. If ye successfully retrieve it, I will award ye wit' a star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.2:
%1$s%2$s
Click on Mason to accept this quest.

Hello young adventurer. Boy something crazy happened to me! I recently dropped a valuable piece of netherite in the lava pit in the desert. It was something I've had for a while. My very first ancient debris I found is that. Well nevermind the fact that my uncle has given me hundreds of acient debris for my birthdays. I am 209 in villager years. Can you believe it? And I get one every time! Do not tell him I lost this. The netherite scrap is the pit in the red sand area. I couldn't tell you exactly where it is in the pit. It changes every time I go there. The lava flows a lot so it could be anywhere. If you can retrieve it for me, I will reward you with a star. Now that sounds like a deal doesn't it? Nothing to lose. Everything to gain. This potion should help you with the lava, but be careful! It only lasts for 30 seconds. If you burn up, you will lose some coins and are not allowed to try again until you get back. I can only give you one potion because of how few I have, but hopefully that is all you will need. Be quick. Get there before someone else retrieves it first. I'm Counting on you!
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.3.2: Click on Mason to receive another potion.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.3: %1$s Do ye have me netherite scrap? I can give ye another fire resistance potion if ye need one.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.4.2: Click on Mason to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.4: %1$s Thank ye fer returning me trinket. As promised, here be yer star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.5: %1$s Thanks again fer returning me trinket t' me.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.6: %1$s Me needs have been taken care o' by another swashbuckler.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.7.2: Click on Lucas to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.7: %1$s I have been seeking thar ultimate diamond blade. It be located in thar black bastion that ye just passed. Thar problem be that it be stuck inside thar rock. Ye will need this potion t' pull it out. If ye bring thar blade t' me, I will award ye a voucher than can be used t' plunder two shinin' spikers at once when crossing thar main shinin' spiker hawker.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.8.2: Click on Lucas to receive another potion.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.8: %1$s Do ye have me blade? I can give ye another strength potion if ye need one.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.9.2: Click on Lucas to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.9: %1$s Thank ye fer bringing me thar ultimate blade. Here be yer reward.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.10: %1$s Thanks again fer bringing me trinket.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.11: %1$s Me needs have been taken care o' by another swashbuckler.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.12: %1$s Thieves have stolen a drink from me stand. Thar drink be at (1136,20,122) in thar sandstone structure on thar opposite corner o' thar map. If ye retrieve it fer me, I will reward ye wit' 25 doubloons. But if ye want thar reward, make sure t' grab thar drink before someone else gets there!
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.13.2: Click on Tim to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.13: %1$s Thank ye fer retrieving me me drink back. Those thieves will pay. But fer now, here be yer 25 doubloons I promised ye earlier.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.14: %1$s Thanks again fer bringing me trinket.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.15: %1$s Me needs have been taken care o' by another swashbuckler.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.16.2: Click on Arnold to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.16: %1$s I need t' cook this steak but me oven be broken! Would ye take this raw beef n' cook it fer me in one o' me neighbors' houses? I have coal fer ye t' use. I will reward ye if ye bring me back a cooked steak. Thar raw beef expires in 5 turns. As a reward, I have a magic dice, a swashbuckler swapper, n' a thrice dice lying around. I only have one o' each.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.17.2: Click on Arnold to receive another raw steak.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.17: %1$s Have ye cooked thar steak yet? I can give ye another raw steak that I have.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.18.2: Thank ye fer cooking me steak. Please choose a reward below:
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.18:
%1$s%2$s
Choose an trinket by clicking it in chat then click on Arnold to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.21: %1$s Thanks again fer cooking me steak fer me.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.22.2: Click on Greg to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.22: %1$s Hey adventurer. I have a secret. I have this eye o' ender. What thar other villagers don't know be that if ye activate thar portal down in thar cave, ye will get supernatural luck! This means ye will be immune t' red n' black spots n' get double doubloon payouts from blue n' yellow spots. %2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.23: %1$s Still working on filling thar portal I see...
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.24: %1$s I see that ye have unleashed thar portal. Nice job! I have nothing else fer ye.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.26.3: Click on Jeff to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.26: %1$s I have a quick chore ye could do fer me. Ye can catch a cod in thar pond n' bring it back t' me. Ye must catch a cod. I will provide ye a fishing rod, but it only has two uses left. Thar cod will go bad if ye don't bring it back within four turns after catching it. I will reward ye wit' a %2$s.%3$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.27.2: Click on Jeff to receive another fishing rod.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.27: %1$s Have ye caught thar fish yet? I can give ye another rod if ye need one. No more than one at a time though.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.28.2: Click Jeff to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.28: %1$s Thank ye fer bringing me a fish. As promised, here be yer warp t' star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.29: %1$s Thanks again fer catching me a fish.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.30.2: Click on Barry to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.30: %1$s Howdy! There be a couple sacred emeralds hidden in thar ravine in thar mesa badlands island, But it be too dangerous fer me t' go there. If ye went down there fer me, n' mined one o' thar ores n' brought it back, I will reward ye wit' a star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.31: %1$s Still working on mining thar ore I see.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.32.2: Click on Barry to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.32: %1$s Thank ye fer obtaining thar emerald. I like emeralds as ye can probably tell. As promised, here be yer star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.33: %1$s Thanks again fer pickin' thar emerald.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.34: %1$s Me needs have been taken care o' by other swashbucklers.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.35.2: Click on Skylar to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.35: %1$s I'm hungry n' I have a craving fer some stew. Some suspicious stew. I have a flower n' a bowl. If ye can go t' thar mushroom island, n' feed thar brown cow thar flower n' milk it, ye will get thar stew that I want. I will give ye 25 doubloons if ye come back wit' that type o' stew. Sorry fer sounding demanding; ye aren't ye when ye're hungry.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.36: %1$s Have ye stashed thar suspicious stew yet?
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.37.2: Click on Skylar to claim yer reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.37: %1$s Thank ye fer obtaining thar stew. Here be yer reward.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.38: %1$s Thanks again fer getting thar stew fer me.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.39.2: Click on Chancellor to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.39: %1$s Psssssst. Hey there adventurer. Thar underground altar has a secret. It be located at below thar desert teleporter. Thar secret be that ye can drop this enchantment shard in thar altar before sacrificing yer doubloons. This will make yer sacrifice more powerful n' can award ye wit' more n' better trinkets!%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.40:
%1$s%2$s
Click on Chancellor t' restock an enchantment shard.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.41: %1$s I see that ye're still making progress towards making it t' thar altar.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.42: %1$s Ye already have a sacrificial enchantment shard. Use it first before I can give ye another one.
mcp.fi_teleport_to_desert.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' teleport.
mcp.fi_teleport_to_mesa.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' teleport.
mcp.fi_teleport_to_savana.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' teleport.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.2: %1$sThis board has quests that ye can complete fer various rewards as well as other fun gimmicks.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.4: %1$sQuests can be started by talking t' a villager in a house. Quest related trinkets can be viewed by dropping yer quest barrel trinket. Green signs point t' villagers where ye can set sail on quests.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.5: %1$sWhen someone lands on a magenta spot, all swashbucklers' pawns will move t' a random landmark on thar map.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.6: %1$sAdditionally, there be three teleporters across thar board. Ye can use them on yer turn t' teleport t' any o' thar other teleporters in thar board fer a cost o' 7 %2$s.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.7: %1$s Located beneath thar desert teleporter, thar Bloodstone can be used t' get big heaps o' trinkets. When visiting, drop yer %2$s into thar altar n' then click thar button on thar wall t' confirm yer sacrifice.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.8: %1$sThe board specific shinin' spiker fer this board be awarded t' thar first swashbuckler who completes thar most laps. A swashbuckler completes a lap each time they pass thar checkered spot (thar one that all swashbucklers spawn at). A tie in number o' laps completed will award thar Trip Sailor Shinin' Spiker t' thar swashbuckler(s) that completed their last lap earlier.
mcp.floating_islands_description.1: %1$sThis board has quests that ye can complete fer various rewards. Quests can be started by talking t' a villager in a house. Quest related trinkets can be viewed by dropping yer quest barrel trinket when it be yer turn. Green signs point t' villagers where ye can set sail on quests.
mcp.floating_islands_description.2: %1$sThe board specific shinin' spiker fer this board be thar racing star. This shinin' spiker be awarded t' thar first swashbuckler t' complete thar most laps. Ye complete a lap each time ye pass thar checkered spot (thar one that all swashbucklers spawn at).
mcp.floating_islands_description.3: %1$sWhen someone lands on a magenta spot, each swashbuckler's spot will move t' a random landmark on thar map.
mcp.floating_islands_description.4: %1$sThe bloodstone be located underground in thar deep desert area. Sacrifice some doubloons into thar altar fer a reward (or even multiple rewards).
mcp.fort_suits_copper_tick.1: %1$s did not beat the copper hunt challenge.
mcp.fort_suits_copper_tick.2: %1$s found the copper ingot and won %2$s%3$s
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.1:
Would ye like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.2: %1$s%2$s%3$s%4$s be a gameboard fit for a crew o’ card sharks. She be split into four quarters, each flyin’ the flag of a suit from the deck.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.3: %1$sThis here board runs on karma, aye. Each matey holds both Good Karma (blessed winds ) and Bad Karma (cursed tides ). Think of it as extra booty, capped at 10 Doubloons apiece.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.4: %1$sGood Karma () be earned by doin’ noble deeds—treatin’ NPCs kindly, tradin’ fair with merchants, payin’ tribute to the Diamond Queen, conquerin’ trials, and usin’ yer gear for good. Triggering green spaces be good too.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.5: %1$sBad Karma () be gained by stirrin’ trouble—snubbin’ merchants, refusin’ the Queen’s toll, dodgin’ trials, usin’ cursed items on yer mates, pickin’ pockets, layin’ traps, or stirrin’ up duels and games o’ chance.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.6: %1$sThis board has two %2$s always be active, like a lookout in the crow’s nest. One Star Seller sails the red seas (Hearts or Diamonds), and one patrols the black waters (Clubs or Spades).
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.7: %1$sThe red quadrant’s Star Seller hawks a Star for 30 Coins, but if ye spend yer Good Karma (), ye'll get a discount, savvy?
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.8: %1$sThe black quadrant’s Star Seller offers the same deal—30 Coins for a Star, with Bad Karma () makin’ the price drop like anchor.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.9: %1$sOnce ye’ve bought a Star, the seller sets sail to the other suit of the same color, changin’ ports.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.10: %1$sOffer yer Good Karma () to the fountain, and she’ll spit out random treasures. The more ye give, the richer the haul!
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.11: %1$sTrade yer Bad Karma () to visit a spirit and claim a prize of yer choosin’. But mind ye—only one trinket per visit!
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.12: %1$sDrop anchor at %2$s to boost or clone yer loot. Enhancin’ costs 25%% o’ the item’s worth, duplicatin’ be 50%%, or 75%% if it’s already enchanted. %3$s only allows one visit per voyage.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.13: %1$sYe must pay 8 %2$s to cross into the Diamond waters. Payin’ full earns ye 1 Good Karma (). Refusin’ the toll ends yer voyage early, but grants ye 1 Bad Karma (). %3$s and %4$s let ye sneak past the guards and earn 1 Bad Karma ().
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.14: %1$sWhen ye pass %2$s, he’ll weigh yer deeds by yer karma balance (Good Karma () minus Bad Karma ()). %3$s favors the righteous and scorns the black-hearted swashbucklers. %4$s and %5$s will make ye vanish from Freyr's gaze and ye will sneak past his reckonin'.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.15: %1$sYe’ve got 15 ticks o’ the clock to find the copper ingot hid among the shiny baubles. Snag it in time and ye’ll earn 15 Coins!
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.16: %1$sAdjust the lava pump to match the arrow’s mark. Nail the height within 1 block and the %2$s will toss ye 10 Coins for lendin’ a hand.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.17: %1$sAid the %2$s in clearin’ the haunted graveyard. Ye’ll wield an axe and battle 4 bony fiends risin’ from their tombs. Dodge their shots and slay ‘em all without takin’ three hits, and the %3$s will reward ye with 10 shiny Coins.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.18: %1$sLandin’ on a magenta space’ll swap two random quadrants like a ship changin’ course.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.19: %1$s%2$s and %3$s> This board holds two trinkets that let ye shift the lay o’ the land.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.20: %1$sThe prized Majestic Star be given to the crew that sails back and forth ‘twixt red and black waters the most times.
mcp.fort_suits_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s%4$s be a gameboard fit for a crew o’ card sharks. She be split into four quarters, each flyin’ the flag of a suit from the deck.
mcp.fort_suits_description.2: %1$sThis here board runs on karma, aye. Each matey holds both Good Karma (blessed winds ) and Bad Karma (cursed tides ). Think of it as extra booty, capped at 10 Doubloons apiece.
mcp.fort_suits_description.3: %1$sGood Karma () be earned by doin’ noble deeds—treatin’ NPCs kindly, tradin’ fair with merchants, payin’ tribute to the Diamond Queen, conquerin’ trials, and usin’ yer gear for good. Triggering green spaces be good too.
mcp.fort_suits_description.4: %1$sBad Karma () be gained by stirrin’ trouble—snubbin’ merchants, refusin’ the Queen’s toll, dodgin’ trials, usin’ cursed items on yer mates, pickin’ pockets, layin’ traps, or stirrin’ up duels and games o’ chance.
mcp.fort_suits_description.5: %1$sThis board has two %2$s always be active, like a lookout in the crow’s nest. One Star Seller sails the red seas (Hearts or Diamonds), and one patrols the black waters (Clubs or Spades).
mcp.fort_suits_description.6: %1$sThe red quadrant’s Star Seller hawks a Star for 30 Coins, but if ye spend yer Good Karma (), ye'll get a discount, savvy?
mcp.fort_suits_description.7: %1$sThe black quadrant’s Star Seller offers the same deal—30 Coins for a Star, with Bad Karma () makin’ the price drop like anchor.
mcp.fort_suits_description.8: %1$sOnce ye’ve bought a Star, the seller sets sail to the other suit of the same color, changin’ ports.
mcp.fort_suits_description.9: %1$sOffer yer Good Karma () to the fountain, and she’ll spit out random treasures. The more ye give, the richer the haul!
mcp.fort_suits_description.10: %1$sTrade yer Bad Karma () to visit a spirit and claim a prize of yer choosin’. But mind ye—only one trinket per visit!
mcp.fort_suits_description.11: %1$sDrop anchor at %2$s to boost or clone yer loot. Enhancin’ costs 25%% o’ the item’s worth, duplicatin’ be 50%%, or 75%% if it’s already enchanted. %3$s only allows one visit per voyage.
mcp.fort_suits_description.12: %1$sYe must pay 8 %2$s to cross into the Diamond waters. Payin’ full earns ye 1 Good Karma (). Refusin’ the toll ends yer voyage early, but grants ye 1 Bad Karma (). %3$s and %4$s let ye sneak past the guards and earn 1 Bad Karma ().
mcp.fort_suits_description.13: %1$sWhen ye pass %2$s, he’ll weigh yer deeds by yer karma balance (Good Karma () minus Bad Karma ()). %3$s favors the righteous and scorns the black-hearted swashbucklers.
mcp.fort_suits_description.14: %1$sYe’ve got 15 ticks o’ the clock to find the copper ingot hid among the shiny baubles. Snag it in time and ye’ll earn 15 Coins!
mcp.fort_suits_description.15: %1$s Adjust the lava pump to match the arrow’s mark. Nail the height within 1 block and the %2$s will toss ye 10 Coins for lendin’ a hand.
mcp.fort_suits_description.16: %1$sAid the %2$s in clearin’ the haunted graveyard. Ye’ll wield an axe and battle 4 bony fiends risin’ from their tombs. Dodge their shots and slay ‘em all without takin’ three hits, and the %3$s will reward ye with 10 shiny Coins.
mcp.fort_suits_description.17: %1$sLandin’ on a magenta space’ll swap two random quadrants like a ship changin’ course.
mcp.fort_suits_description.18: %1$s%2$s and %3$s> This board holds two trinkets that let ye shift the lay o’ the land.
mcp.fort_suits_description.19: %1$sThe prized Majestic Star be given to the crew that sails back and forth ‘twixt red and black waters the most times.
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.1: Crept into Diamond Terretory without forking over loot : %1$s%2$s%3$s fer %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.2: %1$s%2$sShimmer ye for forking over yer dues to yer Royal Highness. %3$s%4$s
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.3: Owed coin forked To Diamonds: %1$s%2$s%3$s fer %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.4: %1$s%2$sThank ye fer payin’ yer— hold fast! Ye ain’t got the gold pockets fer the fee o’ %3$s. Nay matter... I’ll be takin’ what little doubloons ye got, an’ yer helm run ends here.
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.5: Failed to pay owed coin to Diamond Terretory: %1$s%2$s%3$s fer %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.1: %1$s%2$s Blimey! I’ve toppled an’ can’t haul meself up! Help me set the pump gauge t’ the proper height — marked by them golden arrows. Yank the lever t’ drop the platform, then pull it again when she hits the right mark. Get it within half a plank’s width, an’ I’ll be partin’ ye %3$s from me stash.
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.2: %1$s%2$s The graveyard be cursed with rattlin’ bones! I be old an’ weary, but take me hatchet an’ send them undead bones t’ Davy Jones. Do it without meetin’ yer own end, an’ I’ll be rewardin’ ye with %3$s%4$s
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.3: %1$s%2$s Got trinkets? Need more? Me trade offers ye the chance t’ enhance or mirror yer gear fer but a few doubloons — though mark me words, only once per helm run, matey!
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.6:
%1$s%2$s The Queen’s gone an’ stashed a Bullion o' copper in the heap o’ jewels! Any noble deckhand who digs it out in fifteen ticks o’ the glass shall be granted %3$s. Dare to face thar reckonin'?
Use %4$s on me to start thar reckonin'.
 Use %5$s on thar bullion o' copper to collect it.
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.7: %1$s%2$s Ahoy there! Me fountain be touched by sea magic! If ye’ve kept yerself in fair favor, ye may toss in some o’ yer Positive Karma %3$s into the well — an’ the waters may grant ye trinkets from the deep!
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.8: Ooooh… Step aboard, matey, an’ cleanse yer blackened soul o’ bad karma (%1$s) and ye' be able to pick o’ any booty ye spy in the spirit’s spellbound logbook.
mcp.fort_suits_graveyard_tick.1: %1$s got shot into pieces in thar Boneyard Reckonin'.
mcp.fort_suits_graveyard_tick.2: %1$s fended off thar bags o' bones and won %2$s%3$s
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.2: %1$s%2$sHold fast, mate — it’s judgement time. Let’s see how true yer colors be.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.3: %1$s%2$sYe’re in deep waters, ye scurvy dog. Plead fer me mercy…
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.4: %1$s%2$sYe’ve been a rotten swashbuckler. Brace yerself — yer punishment’s comin’
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.5: %1$s%2$sYe’ve been a wee nuisance. Time t’ square yer debt.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.6: %1$s%2$sYe’ve been neither boon nor bane. Off with ye — carry on.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.7: %1$s%2$sYe’ve been a small boon t’ these shores. Here be yer modest reward.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.8: %1$s%2$sYe’ve set the course fer us all — take this prize, fine example.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.9: %1$s%2$sYe be an angel o’ the tides! Here be extra special treasure fer ye.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.29.3.hover: Any foe that crosses this trap gets zapped and gives 2 coins to the trap setter for every spot they pass until the end of their turn. This is a single use trap.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.44: %1$s%2$s I set yer current roll t' 1!
mcp.fort_suits_magenta_event.1: Yer picked quadrant be glowlined in white.
mcp.fort_suits_pass_spot.1: Turned blind eye to map reckonin': %1$s%2$s%3$s fer %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_pass_spot.2: Turned blind eye towards Trader: %1$s%2$s%3$s fer %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_pass_spot.3: %1$s Help me matey! I'm looking to salvage some of these prized trinkets. Will you help a matey out and fork one off of me?
mcp.fort_suits_pass_spot.4: %1$s Help me matey! I'm looking to salvage some of these prized trinkets. Will you help a matey out and fork one off of me?
mcp.fort_suits_quadrant_swap_cutscene.1: The %1$s and %2$s quadrants have been swapped!
mcp.fort_suits_spirit_room_tick.1: Yer Foul Karma attainment not be met fer this trinket.
mcp.fort_suits_spirit_room_tick.34.2.hov: Teleports you to the main star seller, and gives you any coins needed to buy the star.

mcp.fort_suits_water_pump_tick.1: %1$s did not rig thar pump t’ the right height.
mcp.fort_suits_water_pump_tick.2: %1$s rigged thar pump to the right height and won %2$s%3$s
mcp.freeze_trap_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be acquired from %4$s landmarks n' from free trinket pickups.
mcp.gametheory3.1: Yer swashbuckler color indicates how many glory tallies get handed out wit' each decision combination.
mcp.gametheory4.1: The swashbuckler wit' thar most glory tallies at thar end wins!
mcp.game_theory.1: Make decisions t' earn more glory tallies than all o' thar other swashbucklers.
mcp.game_theory.2: Make decisions t' earn yer tribe more glory tallies than %1$s
mcp.game_theory_rules.1: The final handout fer glory tallies will be determined by what choices both swashbucklers make.
mcp.game_theory_rules.2: Yer swashbuckler color indicates how many glory tallies get handed out wit' each decision combination.
mcp.game_theory_rules.3: There will be six rounds, n' each swashbuckler on thar tribe o' three will face %1$s twice.
mcp.game_theory_rules.4: The payouts fer thar swashbucklers on thar tribe o' three will be greater than thar lone swashbuckler generally.
mcp.game_theory_rules.5: Whichever tribe that has thar swashbuckler wit' thar most glory tallies will plunder! In thar event o' a tie fer thar highest glory tallies, %1$s will plunder.
mcp.ghast_blast.1: %1$s will shoot fireballs at %2$s by dropping or right-clicking their fireball trinket .
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.1: Fireballs deal high damage n' destroy thar map. Non-deflected ghast fireballs will disappear if shot t' close t' another ghast.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.2: Ghasts can move down by crouching n' move up by uncrouching.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.3: %1$s can deflect thar fireballs by left clicking them as they get close. Thar fireballs will go where ye be looking.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.4: %1$s can also hit ghasts wit' their sword if they get too close.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.5: The ghasts plunder if they kill %1$s and %2$s wins by outlasting thar ghasts.
mcp.ghast_blast_tick.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.ghost_hunt.1: %1$s will play as thar ghosts n' %2$s will play as thar hunter.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.1: %1$s be invisible n' emit faint white particles but can still see each other.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.2: The ghosts' goal be t' haunt thar villagers by hitting them until they get converted. Villagers turn into zombies when converted.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.3: The hunter has a sword wit' a short cooldown, but be able t' hit villagers on accident.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.4: %1$s must defend thar village by sending all thar ghosts off thar plank before all thar villagers get haunted.
mcp.ghost_hunt_tick.2: The sun be now rising. Ghost will now die from thar sun.
mcp.ghost_mode.2: Tip> Ye can crouch over thar covered manhole t' go through it.

mcp.give_items.21: %1$s If ye roll a 0, ye can use yer %2$s as long as ye don't move.
mcp.give_items.22: %1$s If ye roll a 0, ye can use yer %2$s as long as ye don't move.
mcp.give_items.23: %1$s If ye roll a 0, ye can use yer %2$s%3$s as long as ye don't move.
mcp.give_random_item.65: %1$s could not give an trinket t' %2$s!
mcp.weapon_devolution.1: Fight other swashbucklers in one massive brawl!
mcp.weapon_devolution.2: Feel free to build your own gladiators arena if you want it to look different from this one ;)
mcp.weapon_devolution3.1: Placement be determined by order eliminated.

%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be acquired from free trinket pickups or forked for from the shop.

mcp.gold_rush.1: Gold will fall down from thar moving conveyor belts.
mcp.gold_rush.2: This be a weird voyage isn't it?
mcp.gold_rush2.1: Pick up gold nuggets n' gold ingots t' earn glory tallies.
mcp.gold_rush3.1: To pick up a trinket, crouch directly above it.
mcp.gold_rush4.1:
The point values are as follows:
Gold Nugget: 1 Point
Gold Ingot: 3 Glory Tallies
Mine Gold Block: 6 Glory Tallies
Mine Gold Ore: 2 Glory Tallies
mcp.gold_rush5.1: You can pick up Peg-legs that give ye a speed or jump effect by equipping them.
mcp.gold_rush6.1: You can jump t' a higher belt wit' thar jump effect.
mcp.gold_rush7.1: Beware o' slime snares that slow ye down. Ye can also use a pickaxe t' mine thar gold blocks.
mcp.gold_rush8.1: stash thar most gold glory tallies t' plunder thar voyage!
mcp.gold_rush_rules.1: Pick up gold nuggets n' gold ingots by crouching on top o' them t' earn glory tallies.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.2:
The point values are as follows:
Gold Nugget: 1 Glory Tally
Gold Ingot: 3 Glory Tallies
Mine Gold Block: 6 Glory Tallies
Mine Gilded Blackstone: 2 Glory Tallies
mcp.gold_rush_rules.3: You can pick up diamond Peg-legs that give ye a speed effect by equipping them.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.4: You can pick up Peg-legs that give effects by equipping them. Diamond = Speed. Netherite = Jump Boost.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.5: %1$s can jump t' a higher belts while thar tribe o' three cannot.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.6: Netherite Peg-legs be used t' get t' higher belts n' diamond Peg-legs remove slowness when strapped on.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.7: Slime snares slow ye down when ye touch them. Ye can also use a pickaxe t' mine thar gold blocks n' thar gilded blackstone.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.8: The voyage ends once all o' thar trinkets be gone from thar conveyor belt.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.9: Whichever tribe accomplishes thar most glory tallies wins thar voyage!
mcp.gold_rush_tick.1: Equip to get a temporary jump boost!
mcp.gold_rush_tick.2: Equip to get a temporary jump boost!

Cost: %4$s
mcp.gp_end_minigame.2: Press thar button t' set sail on thar next scallywag.
mcp.gp_modified_minigame.1: A modified scallywag will occur next!
mcp.gp_modified_minigame3.1: Rumlin takes all thar doubloons fer thar next scallywag!
mcp.gp_modified_minigame3.2: Coin rewards be doubled fer thar next scallywag!
mcp.gp_modified_minigame3.3: A doubloon scallywag will now occur!
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.4: Time t' award bonus doubloons t' swashbucklers!
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.5: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that crouches thar least number o' times.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.6: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that gives thar most doubloons in dust-ups n' into thar bloodlust scallywag pot.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.7: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that spectates scallywags fer thar most amount o' time.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.8: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that most frequently tied in scallywag placement.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.9: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that takes thar least amount o' damage.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.10: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that stays still thar most during scallywags.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.11: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that places 2nd in thar most scallywags.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.12: The %1$s be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that has thar least number o' top n' bottom deck finishes in scallywags.
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.13: The swashbuckler that crouched thar least number o' times be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.14: The swashbuckler that gave away thar most doubloons be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.15: The swashbuckler that spectated fer thar most time be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.16: The swashbuckler that tied thar most often be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.17: The swashbuckler that took thar least amount o' damage be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.18: The swashbuckler that stood still fer thar longest time be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.19: The swashbuckler that plundered 2nd place most frequently be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.20: The swashbuckler that finished first n' last thar least be...
mcp.grand_prix_bonuses.28: %1$s wit' %2$s top n' bottom deck finishes!
mcp.grand_prix_rules.1: This gamemode be constant scallywags back-t'-back encompassing all scallywag types.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.2: Players will play %1$s rounds o' scallywags; each round consisting in order o': a 4 fer all scallywag, a 2v2 scallywag, a 1v3 scallywag, a dust-up, n' a modified 4 fer all scallywag.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.3: Players will play %1$s rounds o' scallywags; each round consisting in order o': a Free fer all scallywag, a 3v3 scallywag, a 1v3 scallywag, a dust-up, n' a modified Free fer all scallywag.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.4: Players will play %1$s rounds o' scallywags; each round consisting in order o': a Free fer all scallywag, a 4v4 scallywag, a 2v6 scallywag, a dust-up, n' a modified Free fer all scallywag.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.5: Players will play %1$s rounds o' scallywags; each round consisting in order o': a Free fer all scallywag, a 5v5 scallywag, a 2v6 scallywag, a dust-up, n' a modified Free fer all scallywag.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.6: The tribe arrangements will be randomized, but every combination o' tribes fer each scallywag type will occur.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.7: The tribe arrangements will be semi-randomized depending on their voyage type.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.8: You will earn doubloons fer winning scallywags.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.9: Modified Free For All scallywags change thar doubloon distribution fer that voyage.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.10: Dust Up wagers will always be 10 doubloons. Swashbucklers can have negative doubloons if they lose a dust-up early on.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.11: In total, %1$s scallywags will be played. Final placements will be determined by whoever has thar most doubloons at thar end!
mcp.grand_prix_rules.12: Whenever everyone be primed for sail, they can drop their ready-up trinket t' set sail thar first scallywag.
mcp.grand_prix_start.1: Welcome t' Minecraft Party 2's scallywag Grand Prix Mode!
mcp.grave_diggers.1: Doubloons be hidden in thar suspicious gravel at each grave.
mcp.grave_diggers.2: Brush thar doubloon out o' thar grave t' stash it while avoiding thar zombies.
mcp.grave_diggers.3: Zombies will knock ye away from thar graves.
mcp.grave_diggers.4: Stash thar most doubloons t' plunder!
mcp.ground_mark.1: You must jump from thar helicopter n' land as close t' thar black banner as possible.
mcp.ground_mark_rules.1: The swashbuckler that lands closest t' thar banner wins!.
mcp.gt_round_start.1: Drop item to select choice A
mcp.gt_round_start.2: Drop item to select choice B
mcp.gt_round_start.3: Drop item to select choice A
mcp.gt_round_start.4: Drop item to select choice B
mcp.gt_round_start.5: Drop item to select choice C
mcp.gt_round_start.6: Drop item to select choice C
mcp.guardian_boss_fight_end.1: %1$s defeated thar guardian reckonin' n' scouraged %2$s doubloons!
mcp.guardian_boss_fight_end.2: %1$s did not defeat thar elder guardian.
mcp.hardini_rejection.1: %1$s Hold on a second... Ye don't have any shinin' spikers fer me t' use this trick on. Come back later when ye have a spiker.
mcp.hideandseek.2: Hide from thar randomly designated seeker. Seeker tries t' find everyone.
mcp.hideandseek3.1: Seeker starts at 4th place n' gains a spot fer each hider found. (Hiders will be invisible wit' gold chestplates)
mcp.hideandseek4.1: The randomly chosen seeker be %1$s. Hiders stay hidden t' plunder! Seeker finds everyone t' plunder!
mcp.hideandseek5.3: %1$s Thar hiders be invisible n' wearing golden chest pieces
mcp.hideandseek5.4: Hiders have 45 seconds t' hide before thar seeker gets unchained!
mcp.hideandseek5_2.1: Hiders lose their elytra after thar hide time be up.
mcp.hide_and_seek.1: %1$s will have 45 seconds t' hide from thar seekers: %2$s.
mcp.hide_and_seek_rules.1: After thar 45 seconds be up, thar seekers get %1$s seconds t' find thar hider.
mcp.hide_and_seek_rules.2: After thar 45 seconds be up, thar seekers get 1.5 minutes t' find thar hider.
mcp.hide_and_seek_rules.3: The seekers can drop their sword t' toggle speed boost.
mcp.hide_and_seek_rules.4: The seekers must find n' kill thar hider t' plunder!
mcp.hide_and_seek_rules.5: The hider must outlast thar seekers t' plunder!
mcp.highpingmode_setting.1: This will get rid o' a few scallywags that have had issues fer swashbucklers wit' bad ping from thar list that can be played. Some other scallywags will have their mechanics modified t' accomodate fer these swashbucklers as well.
mcp.high_roller_hat.1: You must plunder a voyage o' Minecraft Party 2 t' unlock this hat
mcp.hole_in_the_wall.1: Walls will spawn on thar outside o' thar arena n' move towards thar platform.
mcp.hole_in_the_wall.2: Avoid colliding wit' thar blocks o' thar walls by moving t' thar holes.
mcp.hole_in_the_wall.3: Colliding wit' a wall will push ye over in thar direction thar wall be moving.
mcp.hole_in_the_wall.4: The wall movement speed n' spawning rate increases as thar voyage goes on.
mcp.honey_boost_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be picked from thar gingerbread reckonin' in Candyland, thar bloodstones in Mooshroom Grotto, n' Goodie Bags.
mcp.honey_zoom_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be picked from thar gingerbread reckonin' in Candyland, thar bloodstones in Mooshroom Grotto, n' Treasure Bags.
mcp.horse_race2.1: Race yer horse along thar track!
mcp.horse_race_rules.1: Go through thar course while jumping over thar obstacles.
mcp.horse_race_rules.2: Hold down jump key (spacebar by default) t' charge up yer jump. Look at xp bar t' see how much yer jump be charged up.
mcp.horse_race_rules.3: Run over gold blocks wit' yer horse t' reach anchor points.
mcp.horse_race_rules.4: If yer horses catches on fire, then ye reset t' yer last anchor point.
mcp.horse_race_rules.5: You can drop yer flag at any time t' reset t' yer anchor point.
mcp.horse_race_rules.6: Be thar first t' complete two laps t' plunder!
mcp.horse_race_tick.3: Run over gold blocks wit' thar horse t' reach anchor points.
mcp.hungry_hungry_humans.3: Each swashbuckler be standing on their own island. Animals will spawn on thar center island.
mcp.hungry_hungry_humans.4: Capture animals in yer moat by pulling them wit' yer fishing rod.
mcp.hungry_hungry_humans.5: Animals will spawn fer 90 seconds n' thar voyage will end once all animals be captured.
mcp.hungry_hungry_humans.6: The swashbuckler that stashs thar most doubloons wins.
mcp.hungry_hungry_humans.7: Each animal that ye capture will reward ye wit' a doubloon!
mcp.ice_trap_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be acquired from %4$s landmarks n' from free trinket pickups.
mcp.inferno_trap_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be acquired from %4$s landmarks n' from free trinket pickups.
mcp.in_the_zone.1: Capture thar zone in thar middle by being on top o' thar tough rock tile slabs.
mcp.in_the_zone.2: The bar at thar top o' thar screen will fill up as ye capture thar zone.
mcp.in_the_zone.3: The bar at thar top o' thar screen will fill up as yer tribe captures thar zone.
mcp.in_the_zone.4: The bar at thar top o' thar screen will fill up as yer tribe captures thar zone.
mcp.in_the_zone.5: Knock thar swashbucklers from thar other tribe away from thar zone t' prevent them from capturing it.
mcp.in_the_zone.6: Knock thar swashbucklers from thar other tribe away from thar zone t' prevent them from capturing it.
mcp.in_the_zone.7: Knock %1$s away from thar zone t' prevent them from capturing it.
mcp.in_the_zone.8: The first tribe t' finish capturing thar zone wins!
mcp.in_the_zone.9: %1$s be strapped wit' a knockback IV rod n' %2$s be strapped wit' their fists.
mcp.in_the_zone.10: %1$s be strapped on wit' a knockback III rod n' %2$s be strapped wit' their fists.
mcp.in_the_zone.11: All swashbucklers be strapped wit' knockback I rods.
mcp.japan_shuffle_check.1: There be not enough swashbucklers eligible fer a shinin' spiker shuffle!
mcp.japan_shuffle_check.2: There be not enough swashbucklers eligible fer a doubloon shuffle!
mcp.japan_star_shuffle2.1: Players will each put in 20-30 doubloons. Each swashbuckler that puts in doubloons will grow a bamboo plant. Thar higher thar plant grows, thar more doubloons that swashbuckler wins.
mcp.japan_star_shuffle2.2: Players will each put in 1 shinin' spiker into a pot. Each swashbuckler that puts in a shinin' spiker will grow a bamboo plant. Thar higher thar plant grows, thar more shinin' spikers that swashbuckler wins.
mcp.japan_star_shuffle_end.2: %1$s did not lose or gain any shinin' spikers.
mcp.japan_star_shuffle_next.2: %1$s does not have any shinin' spikers t' give.
mcp.japan_star_shuffle_next.4: %1$s does not have enough doubloons t' give.
mcp.just_joust.1: You will play in a minecart where ye must hit yer enemy on thar other minecart.
mcp.just_joust_rules.1: Hit yer enemy wit' a full hit as ye pass them.
mcp.just_joust_rules.2: When ye reach thar end, hit thar button t' move yer minecart backwards t' try t' hit yer enemy again.
mcp.just_joust_rules.3: The first swashbuckler t' deal two more hits t' their enemy wins!
mcp.knockout.1: Knock each other off o' thar platforms.
mcp.knockout2.1: Punching another swashbuckler off earns ye a knockback 2 stick
mcp.knockout3.1: Each swashbuckler has 3 lives. Last swashbuckler alive wins!
mcp.knockout_respawn.1: %1$s has be sunk all their lives!
mcp.labyrinth.1: In yer tribes, one swashbuckler be on top n' guides thar swashbuckler below through thar maze.
mcp.labyrinth.2: In yer tribes, one swashbuckler be on top n' guides two swashbucklers below through thar maze.
mcp.labyrinth.3: In yer tribes, two swashbucklers be on top n' guide two swashbucklers below through thar maze.
mcp.labyrinth.4: In yer tribes, two swashbucklers be on top n' guide three swashbuckler below through thar maze.
mcp.LabyrinthNoRotate: You cannot rotate a section that a swashbuckler be standing inside o'.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.1: Both swashbucklers will be switchin' from thar top deck and bottom deck using thar nightlight.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.2: %1$s will play as thar top swashbuckler n' %2$s will play as thar bottom swashbuckler.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.3: %1$s will play as thar top swashbuckler n' %2$s will play as thar bottom swashbuckler.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.4: %1$s will play as thar top swashbuckler n' %2$s will play as thar bottom swashbucklers.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.5: %1$s will play as thar top swashbuckler n' %2$s will play as thar bottom swashbucklers.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.6: %1$s will play as thar top swashbucklers n' %2$s will play as thar bottom swashbucklers.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.7: %1$s will play as thar top swashbucklers n' %2$s will play as thar bottom swashbuckler.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.8: One swashbuckler will play as thar top person n' thar other will play as thar bottom swashbuckler.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.9: Some swashbucklers will play on top n' thar others will play on thar bottom.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.10: The top swashbucklers can click thar button above a piece o' thar maze t' rotate it clockwise, but cannot rotate sections that a swashbuckler be standing in.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.11: The bottom swashbucklers move through thar maze n' can set snares fer thar other tribe t' walk into.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.12: The bottom swashbucklers can set snares by dropping their 'set snare trinket' n' must mine out o' snares using their pickaxe.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.13: The bottom swashbucklers must stash two pieces o' gold; one from thar other tribe's coffer using their key, n' another hidden within thar maze.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.14: The bottom swashbucklers must stash two pieces o' gold each; one from thar other tribe's coffer using their key, n' another hidden within thar maze.
mcp.labyrinth_rules.15: The first tribe t' return wit' two gold ingots wins!
mcp.labyrinth_rules.16: The first tribe that gets all their bottom swashbucklers t' return wit' two gold ingots each wins!
mcp.labyrinth_tick.4.1: Now return back t' yer base
mcp.labyrinth_tick.11: You have completed yer task. Stay at yer base n' wait fer yer tribe t' finish.
mcp.labyrinth_tick.12: You have completed yer task. Stay at yer base n' wait fer yer tribe t' finish.
mcp.land_on_black.10: %1$s plundered sent back t' thar start o' thar board.
mcp.land_on_blue.2: %1$s snagged an additional %2$s%3$s from thar %4$s set
mcp.land_on_lightblue.1: There be no opposing swashbucklers eligible fer a dust-up against %1$s!
mcp.land_on_magenta.1: The traffic lights have been switched!
mcp.land_on_magenta.4: The Chocolate Path has been switched!
mcp.land_on_magenta.22: There be no food that can be replenished!
mcp.land_on_yellow.8: %1$s snagged an additional %2$s%3$s from thar %4$s set
mcp.laser_evaders.1: Avoid getting hit by thar lasers or touching thar floor n' ceiling.
mcp.laser_evaders_rules.1: Press n' hold %1$s t' fall slowly. Release %2$s t' levitate slowly.
mcp.laser_evaders_rules.2: You will take damage if hit by a laser or touching thar ceiling/floor n' will be eliminated if hit 4 times.
mcp.laser_evaders_tick.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.lava_pit_death.1: %1$s died from thar lava n' be sunk 5 doubloons!
mcp.lc_free_item_tick.1: Tip> If ye be unable t' pick up thar free trinket, try rejoining thar voyage.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.1: %1$s Do ye have what it takes t' beat thar elder guardian boss? I will give ye %2$s doubloons fer defeating thar boss n' it costs nothing t' enter in thar fight. Jump in thar pit t' enter thar fight!
mcp.lc_pass_spot.2: %1$s Thar elder guardian boss be not at sea fer a fight right now. Try again later...
mcp.lc_pass_spot.3: %1$s It be me, %2$s! I have a magic trick that can turn one shinin' spiker into two! Step right up if ye have a shinin' spiker that ye want t' duplicate.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.4: %1$s It be me, %2$s! I have a magic trick that can turn one shinin' spiker into three! Step right up if ye have a shinin' spiker that ye want t' duplicate.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.5: %1$s Ahoy. These old coffers here could contain some doubloons. For 5 doubloons ye can plunder a key that unlocks a coffer fer potential t' earn even more! Care t' try it out?
mcp.lc_pass_spot.6: %1$s Sorry, I am sold out n' all me coffers have been looted.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.7: %1$s Ahoy. These old barrels here could contain a shinin' spiker. Ye can plunder a key n' there be a 50%% chance ye find a shinin' spiker in a barrel. Otherwise ye will find nothing. Care t' try it out?
mcp.lc_pass_spot.8: %1$s Sorry, I am sold out n' all me barrels have been looted.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.9: %1$s Want t' take a shortcut t' thar shinin' spiker? Just come through me toll. It will cost ye %2$s doubloons t' enter n' thar price increases by 5 doubloons fer each time ye enter.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.10: %1$sHi there. I can offer ye up t' three shinin' spikers at thar cost o' %2$s%3$s each.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.11: %1$sHi there. I can offer ye up t' three shinin' spikers at thar cost o' %2$s%3$s each.
mcp.lc_pass_spot.15: %1$s Hey! Over here! Care t' plunder some Doubloons from a fellow swashbuckler or a Shinin' Spiker fer only double thar cost o' one?
mcp.lc_pass_spot.16: %1$s May I interest ye in some sweet trinkets? Avast by t' check them out!
mcp.lc_pass_spot.17: %1$s Trinkets fer sale! Interested in forking for anything?
mcp.lc_pass_spot.18: %1$s Ahoy there! I have some trinkets ye might like here.
mcp.leave_coin_chests.1: %1$s won %2$s doubloons from Rick's coffer shop.
mcp.leave_coin_chests.2: %1$s be sunk %2$s doubloons from Rick's coffer shop.
mcp.leave_coin_chests.3: %1$s won a %2$s from Nick's barrel shop!
mcp.leave_coin_chests.4: %1$s be sunk %2$s doubloons from Nick's barrel shop.

mcp.ll_bucket_tick.1: %1$s I have a dare fer ye. Use this water bucket t' clutch off thar table (land on thar timber) t' clean up thar stain on thar floor n' I will award ye wit' %2$s. Ye have slightly more gravity than usual.
mcp.ll_bucket_tick.2: %1$s won %2$s from thar water bucket clutch reckonin'.
mcp.ll_bucket_tick.3: %1$s failed thar water bucket clutch reckonin'.
mcp.ll_burger_tick.1: %1$s laid paws on thar doubloons in thar sesame seed n' won %2$s.
mcp.ll_burger_tick.2: %1$s failed thar sesame seed bun reckonin'.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an Overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.2: %1$sLofty Luncheon be a board in a Giant's Dining Room.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.4: %1$sWhen thar voyage starts, a random diner will request a random food/drink available on thar table. Thar swashbuckler that brings thar food/drink trinket back t' thar diner will be awarded wit' a %2$s.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.5: %1$sThe food/drink can be grabbed by passing thar gray post next t' it n' clicking on thar sign. Thar food/drink will be removed from thar table.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.6: %1$sAny swashbuckler that passes by thar swashbuckler currently in possession o' thar trinket will steal it from them.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.7: %1$sThe magenta landmark on this board replenishes a random food or drink that be missing from thar table.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.8: %1$sComplete thar water bucket reckonin' n' %2$s will reward ye wit' 8 %3$s.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.9: %1$sThere be Doubloons hidden inside o' a random sesame seed on thar burger. Find thar correct sesame seed n' %2$s will reward ye wit' 10 %3$s.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_cutscene.10: %1$sThe %2$s on this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that triggers thar most Dust Ups, Micro Dust Ups n' Bloodlust Scallywags.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_description.1:
%1$sThis board takes place on a dining room table with some hungry diners.

%2$s%3$s can be scouraged by either forking for one from thar %4$s fer 20 %5$s or by bringing food/drinks to any diners requesting them.

%6$s The magenta landmark on this board replenishes a missing food or drink trinket on the board.

%7$sThere be two reckonin's on thar board that ye can attempt which each reward 15 %8$s%9$s%10$sThe bonus shinin' spiker fer this board be thar %11$s. It be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that activates thar most Dust Ups, Micro Dust Ups n' Bloodlust Scallywags.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.1.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.2.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.3.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.

mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.5.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.6.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.7.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_grab_food.8.2.hover: Return this item to %1$s t' earn a %2$s. This trinket can be stolen by passing whoever current holds thar trinket on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.9: %1$s%2$s I am craving a %3$s right now.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.10: %1$s%2$s I would like some %3$s. Could anyone bring me thar bowl?
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.11: %1$s%2$s It's time fer dessert! Could a swashbuckler get thar %3$s fer me?
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.12: %1$s%2$s I'm feeling fancy. Can anyone grab that glass o' %3$s?
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.13: %1$s%2$s I could really go fer some %3$s right about now. Be there anyone that could get it fer me?
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.14: %1$s%2$s I desire some %3$s. Will anyone get it fer me?
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.15: %1$s%2$s I'm parched. May someone please bring me that glass o' %3$s t' help quench me thirst.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.16: %1$s%2$s I need me greens. Could anyone get that bowl o' %3$s fer me please?
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.17: %1$s%2$s Thar swashbuckler that brings it back t' me will be rewarded wit' a %3$s!
mcp.lofty_luncheon_new_food_request.18: The trinket can be nabbed here. Be careful! If ye be in possession o' thar trinket. Other swashbucklers can steal it from ye by passing ye on thar board.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.1: %1$s There be %2$shidden in a sesame seed on thar burger. Press thar correct one within 15 seconds t' plunder thar doubloons.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.2: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.3: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.4: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.5: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.6: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.7: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.8: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.9: %1$s%2$s%3$s, make sure t' grab me %4$s by clicking on thar sign.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.10: %1$s%2$s Ahoy there %3$s, I see that ye have brought me me %4$s. Drop thar trinket on thar white square n' I will reward ye wit' thar %5$s that I promised!
mcp.lofty_luncheon_pass_spot.19: %1$s%2$s Ahoy %3$s, I see that ye be still making progress towards grabbing me %4$s fer me.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_return_food.1: %1$s%2$s Please stand nearby thar white square n' drop thar %3$s t' return it.
mcp.lofty_luncheon_return_food.2: %1$s%2$s Yum! Thank ye fer yer efforts %3$s! Here be that %4$s that I promised!
mcp.lose_random_item.1: %1$s had no trinkets t' lose from thar %2$s spell.
mcp.lose_random_item.2: %1$s be sunk their %2$s from thar %3$s spell.
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene.1: Three helm runs left o' daytime
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene.2: Two helm runs left o' daytime
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene.3: One helm run left o' daytime
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene.4: Three helm runs left o' nighttime
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene.5: Two helm runs left o' nighttime
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene.6: One helm run left o' nighttime
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene2.1: %1$s It be day time again! That means that shinin' spikers will cost 20 doubloons as usual.
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene2.2: %1$s It be night time! Ye know what that means. Time t' see how much thar shinin' spiker will cost fer thar next three turns!
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene5.1: %1$s Shinin' Spikers now cost %2$s doubloons each! Better get them while they're hot!
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene5.2: %1$s Shinin' Spikers now cost %2$s doubloons each! It's a buyer's market. Get them while ye can!
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene5.3: %1$s Shinin' Spikers now cost %2$s doubloons each! Enjoy yer slightly discounted shinin' spikers.
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene5.4: %1$s Shinin' Spikers now cost %2$s doubloons each! Boy, we be having a little bit o' shinin' spiker shortage now.
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene5.5: %1$s Shinin' Spikers now cost %2$s doubloons each! Good luck being able t' plunder one now.
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene5.6: %1$s There we be! Back at 20 doubloons.
mcp.lost_city_board_cutscene6.1: %1$s Farewell n' good luck t' all o' ye. Until next time!
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.2: %1$sLost City's board gimmicks be determined by its day n' night cycle. Thar day n' night cycle goes fer 6 turns (3 turns o' daytime followed by 3 turns o' nighttime) n' repeats when done.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s be positioned on top o' thar temple n' stays there thar entire voyage. When a swashbuckler approaches thar %3$s, they can plunder up t' 3 %4$s at a time. During thar daytime, %5$s cost 20 %6$s each but during thar nighttime, %7$s can cost 5, 10, 15, 30 or 40 %8$s. This value be randomly determined at thar beginning o' thar first nighttime turn in thar cycle.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.4: %1$sPassing thar key shop gives ye an opportunity t' acquire more currency. During thar daytime, Rick runs thar shop n' will trade ye a key fer 5 %2$s which can open a coffer that will have 0-25 %3$s in it. Nick takes over thar night shift. For thar cost o' 60%% o' thar current %4$s price, he will trade ye a key t' fer a barrel that has a 50%% chance o' containing a %5$s. Thar keys restock at thar beginning o' thar next cycle after running out. Rick n' Nick each trade 6 keys before running out.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.5: %1$sPassing %2$s's magic hut will grant ye an oppurtunity t' duplicate a %3$s. Select a box out o' 3 choices (6 during thar nighttime phase) t' deposit yer %4$s into n' %5$s will swirl thar boxes around in thar air. If ye can correctly track down yer box, ye will be rewarded wit' an extra %6$s (2 during thar nighttime phase). If ye fail, ye lose yer %7$s.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.6: You cannot use %1$s in this reckonin'.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.7: %1$sDo ye have what it takes t' defeat thar Elder Guardian Boss? Enter his cave t' initiate thar fight. Defeating him will reward ye wit' 20 %2$s. Every time thar boss be defeated, he will get stronger n' reward more %3$s on thar next kill. When killed, thar Elder Guardian will need 1 turn t' respawn n' cannot be fought during this time.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.8: %1$sVisiting Bew lets ye steal 5-10 %2$s (fer free) or steal a %3$s (fer thar cost o' double thar current %4$s price) from another swashbuckler o' yer choice.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.9: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark will open up any blocked path next t' it. If thar path be already open, thar event will close thar path.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.10: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that uses thar most trinkets.
mcp.lost_city_description.1: %1$sThe shinin' spiker hawker be at thar center o' thar board n' does not move. Ye can plunder up t' three shinin' spikers at a time. Thar voyage follows a 6 turn day/night cycle. Thar shinin' spiker costs 20 doubloons during thar day n' can vary at night. Thar board specific shinin' spiker goes t' thar swashbuckler that uses thar most trinkets in a voyage.
mcp.lost_city_fill_barrels.1: Nick's Barrel Shop has been restocked.
mcp.lost_city_fill_coin_chests.1: Rick's Coffer Shop has been restocked.
mcp.lost_city_next_turn.4: One turn until thar guardian boss be respawned!
mcp.lost_city_next_turn.5: The elder guardian boss has been respawned!
mcp.lucky_path.1: %1$s made it t' thar lucky path!
mcp.magic_dice_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.magic_dice_select_player.1: %1$s The %2$s event be active. This will add 3 onto yer %3$s Roll.
mcp.magic_dice_select_player.2: %1$s Yer %2$s be active. This will add %3$s onto yer %4$s Roll.
mcp.magic_dice_select_player.3: %1$s Ye have one or more trinket(s) active that increase yer roll. This bonus will get added on t' yer %2$s Roll.
mcp.magic_dice_select_roll.5: Unleash trinket on enemy swashbuckler: %1$s%2$s%3$s fer %4$s
mcp.market_mayhem.1: Stash trinkets in coffers scattered around thar map.
mcp.market_mayhem.2: Use those trinkets wit' thar emeralds that be given t' ye t' trade wit' thar villagers fer doubloons.
mcp.market_mayhem.3: Some trinkets can be traded directly fer doubloons, while other trinkets can be traded fer trinkets that lead t' doubloons in another trade.
mcp.market_mayhem.4: Every trade that ye can make be t' yer benefit.
mcp.market_mayhem.5: Every doubloon ye stash be yers t' keep.
mcp.market_mayhem.6: The swashbuckler that stashs thar most doubloons wins.
mcp.market_mayhem.7: Coffers will progressively restock wit' random trinkets as thar voyage goes on.
mcp.match_me_not.1: Choose one o' four materials t' build yer platform (by dropping thar trinket).
mcp.match_me_not.2: Choose one o' five materials t' build yer platform (by dropping thar trinket).
mcp.match_me_not.3: Choose one o' six materials t' build yer platform (by dropping thar trinket).
mcp.match_me_not.4: Choose one o' seven materials t' build yer platform (by dropping thar trinket).
mcp.match_me_not_rules.1: If ye choose a material that nobody else chooses, yer platform raises by one block.
mcp.match_me_not_rules.2: If someone else chooses thar same material as ye, neither o' yer platforms gets raised.
mcp.match_me_not_rules.3: The swashbuckler wit' thar highest platform after 8 rounds wins!
mcp.maze_navigator.1: Navigate yerself through thar randomly generated maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.1: %1$s%2$s, must find one o' each o' yer tribe's colored orb within thar maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.2: %1$s%2$s, must find one o' each o' yer tribe's colored orb within thar maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.3: %1$s%2$s, must find one o' each o' yer tribe's colored orb within thar maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.4: %1$s%2$s, must find one o' each o' yer tribe's colored orb within thar maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.5: %1$smust find one o' each o' yer tribe's colored orb within thar maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.6: Ye must scourage both of yer hued orbs before yer enemy does.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.7: %1$smust find one o' each o' yer tribe's colored orb within thar maze.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.8: After both o' ye have laid ya hand on yer orbs, ye must meet together.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.9: After everyone on yer tribe has grabbed yer orb, ye must meet together.
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.10: First swashbuckler to acquire ye orbs be victorious!
mcp.maze_navigator_rules.11: First tribe t' find their orbs n' meet wins!
mcp.meatslap.1: One swashbuckler be it. Slap another swashbuckler wit' thar flesh t' tag them.
mcp.meatslap2.1: Be it fer thar least amount o' time t' plunder thar voyage. A tag only counts if it be a full hit.
mcp.meat_slap.1: One swashbuckler be it. Slap another swashbuckler wit' thar flesh t' tag them.
mcp.meat_slap_rules.1: Be it fer thar least amount o' time t' plunder thar voyage. A tag only counts if it be a full hit.
mcp.meat_slap_tag.1: YOU ARE IT! TAG SOMEONE ELSE!
mcp.meat_slap_tick.1: You must get a full hit t' tag someone
mcp.memory.1: A canvas o' blocks will appear. Ye will have 10 seconds t' memorize it.
mcp.memory_rules.1: After thar viewing time be up, ye will be given a random ore in yer hand.
mcp.memory_rules.2: Press thar button on yer canvas t' match thar spot o' thar ore.
mcp.memory_rules.3: If ye be correct, thar ore will show on yer canvas n' ye will be given a new ore.
mcp.memory_rules.4: If ye be incorrect, ye will get a four second penalty then get a few seconds t' view thar original canvas again.
mcp.memory_rules.5: At any point when viewing thar original model canvas, ye may press yer jump key t' bring yerself t' yer canvas.
mcp.memory_rules.6: Whoever fills their canvas back first wins!
mcp.mg_altar_reward_item.3.2.hover: Passive ability. Upon activation, protects you from the next player that tries to steal a Star or Coins from you.
mcp.mg_altar_reward_item.34.2.hover: Teleports you to the Star Seller and gives you any coins needed to buy the star.
mcp.mg_choose_altar_setup.1: Drop thar trinket o' thar altar that ye would like t' visit or drop thar Exit Menu trinket t' skip.
mcp.mg_elavator_10.1: This be pretty raw, isn't it?
mcp.mg_elavator_5.1: This be pretty raw, isn't it?
mcp.mg_elavator_6.1: This be pretty raw, isn't it?
mcp.mg_elavator_7.1: This be pretty raw, isn't it?
mcp.mg_elavator_9.1: This be pretty raw, isn't it?
mcp.mg_elavator_setup.1: This be pretty raw, isn't it?
mcp.mg_spider_spawners.1: %1$s Oh be sure t' take this sword as well! It was passed onto me from thar mayor. Good luck in there!
mcp.micro_duel.2: It's time fer a micro dust-up!
mcp.mineshaft_madness.1: Mine ores t' score glory tallies!
mcp.mineshaft_madness_end.13: You scouraged two bonus doubloons fer surviving!
mcp.mineshaft_madness_end.14: You scouraged two bonus doubloons fer surviving!
mcp.mineshaft_madness_rules.1: As thar voyage progresses, thar lava level will rise.
mcp.mineshaft_madness_rules.2: If ye die, ye be out n' cannot earn any more glory tallies
mcp.mineshaft_madness_rules.3:
The glory tallies for ores are as follows:
Coal ore: 1 Glory Tally
Iron ore: 2 Glory Tallies
Gold Ore: 4 Glory Tallies
Emerald Ore: 6 Glory Tallies
Diamond Ore: 10 Glory Tallies
mcp.mineshaft_madness_rules.4: stash as many glory tallies as possible. Every 10 glory tallies earned gives ye one doubloon.
mcp.mineshaft_madness_rules.5: You will also earn 2 bonus doubloons fer surviving thar lava by making yer way up t' thar top.
mcp.mineshaft_madness_tick.1: Lava will now begin t' rise!
mcp.mine_and_kill.1: Dig yer way through thar 12x10x12 area t' find yer enemies!
mcp.mine_and_kill_rules.1: This voyage be played in survival mode.
mcp.mine_and_kill_rules.2: When digging, ye may find crates wit' loot, diamond ore, or even lava.
mcp.mine_and_kill_rules.3: You can also find a glow trinket activator which glows thar other tribe fer 5 seconds when dropped.
mcp.mine_and_kill_rules.4: First tribe t' eliminate thar other tribe wins!
mcp.mine_and_kill_tick.2: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.minigame_coin_tellraws.22: %1$s won an additional %2$s from a full %3$s set
mcp.minigame_free_for_all_tellraw.4: %1$s vs. %2$s vs. %3$s vs. %4$s vs. %5$s vs. %6$s vs. %7$s
mcp.minigame_free_for_all_tellraw.5: %1$s vs. %2$s vs. %3$s vs. %4$s vs. %5$s vs. %6$s vs. %7$s vs. %8$s

mcp.minigame_free_for_all_tellraw.7: %1$s vs. %2$s vs. %3$s vs. %4$s vs. %5$s vs. %6$s vs. %7$s vs. %8$s vs. %9$s vs. %10$s
mcp.mining_away.1: You will mine blocks below ye.
mcp.mining_away_rules.1: You must switch t' thar correct tool required t' break thar block.
mcp.mining_away_rules.2: Pickaxe breaks stone n' cobblestone. Axe breaks logs n' planks. Shovel breaks dirt n' sand.
mcp.mining_away_rules.3: The first swashbuckler t' reach thar bottom wins!
mcp.minionarmydeath.2: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.minions3.1: Guide yer minions by moving around n' they will follow ye.
mcp.minions4.1: If an enemy minion be directly in front o' one o' yer minions, it will convert t' yer army.
mcp.minions5.1: Converted minions will change t' thar color o' yer army n' will set sail following ye.
mcp.minions6.1: Win thar voyage by eliminating thar other swashbuckler's army!
mcp.minion_swap.1: You must be standing on a spot t' swap places.
mcp.minion_swap.2: Arrr, ye be needin’ to cross the landmark ye be standin’ on afore ye can trade spots with yer deckhand pet. (Hint: take a wee step forward, matey!)
mcp.minion_swap.3: You must proceed t' thar next landmark after forking for a trinket.
mcp.mini_dice_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be acquired from %4$s landmarks, free trinket pickups, or forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %5$s
mcp.mob_royale.1: This voyage has two phases; thar recruitment phase n' thar battle phase.
mcp.mob_royale_phase2.2: Right click thar monster eggs t' spawn thar mobs
mcp.mob_royale_rules.1: During thar recruitment phase, ye must knock monsters into yer tribe's holes. This will add them t' yer army.
mcp.mob_royale_rules.2: If ye die during thar recruitment phase, ye will respawn during thar spawning phase.
mcp.mob_royale_rules.3: During thar spawning phase, ye spawn thar mobs that ye lashed down in preparation fer thar battle phase.
mcp.mob_royale_rules.4: Once thar recruitment phase be over, yer tribe's army will fight against thar opposing tribe's army in thar battle phase.
mcp.mob_royale_rules.5: Whichever tribe's army be left standing wins!
mcp.monster_shoot.1: Monsters will fall from thar sky. Shoot n' hit them t' earn glory tallies.
mcp.monster_shoot_rules.1: The point values be as follows:
mcp.monster_shoot_rules.2:
Zombie: 1 Glory Tally
Creeper: 2 Glory Tallies
Skeleton: 3 Glory Tallies
Silverfish: 5 Glory Tallies
mcp.monster_shoot_rules.3: The voyage ends after 60 seconds. Earn thar most glory tallies t' plunder!
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cauldron_task.1: %1$s Excellent! I need some materials. I will tell ye what t' look fer. Make sure t' put them in order too AND in thar cauldron, or thar potion will fail t' be brewed! Do not drop any trinkets on thar floor or step into thar cauldron. Click on me t' set sail thar reckonin'.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cauldron_task_end.1: %1$s Bah! Ye ruined it! Now I have t' redo this whole thing! Get out! Scram!
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cauldron_task_end.2: %1$s Congrats! I wasn't that trustworthy o' outsiders before, but I'm glad ye've proven that they be indeed capable. Here's 15 doubloons deary.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task.1: %1$s Excellent! Here's a pick t' mine thar ores n' a lantern t' help ye see. I'll use me magic once ye step fully into thar cave t' turn all thar cobblestone in there t' ores fer 15 seconds. Hold onto yer lantern (in yer offhand) t' see but ye can only see a few blocks in front o' ye. Good luck!
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task.2: %1$s Ye will need t' mine 2 diamond ores.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task.3: %1$s Ye will need t' mine 3 emerald ores.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task.4: %1$s Ye will need t' mine 4 copper ores.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task.5: %1$s Ye will need t' mine 5 coal ores.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task_end.1: %1$s Thar magic has ran out. Come back up t' me.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task_end2.1: %1$s Oh darn, this isn't enough. Well thanks fer helping anyways.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cave_task_end2.2: %1$s Hey thanks fer thar materials. Here be 10 doubloons fer yer troubles.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.2: %1$sMooshroom Grotto be a large board wit' many elevation changes. This board offers opportunities t' earn %2$s through a number o' reckonin's.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.4: %1$sThis villager has been turned into a Mooshroom. Help him stash three spider eyes t' revert him back t' normal. Ye will be rewarded wit' 10 %2$s fer doing so.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.5: %1$sHelp thar miner acquire thar ores he needs n' ye will be rewarded wit' 10 %2$s.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.6: %1$sHelp thar Witch get thar materials she needs t' make a potion n' she will reward ye wit' 15 %2$s.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.7:
%1$sVisiting thar beacon on thar bottom level o' thar board grants ye thar opportunity t' use one o' thar four Safricial Altars. A bloodstone gives ye random trinkets n' currencies when ye sacrifice %2$s into it. Thar more %3$s you sacrifice, the better yer reward. Generally, using a Bloodstone is more cost effective than using the shops. There are four different altar types: Benefits, Attack, Spiker and Variety. Each offers a different set of obtainable trinkets.

When an altar gets used, it loses 15%% of its sacrificial power and all the other altars gain 5%% sacrificial power.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.8: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that sacrifices thar most cumulative %3$s in thar Bloodstones.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.9: %1$sVisit this villager's hut t' play thar Posion Mushroom Reckonin'. Ye be given two mushrooms n' ye must correctly guess which one be poisonous. If ye guess correctly, ye will be rewarded wit' an Enchantment Shard which can be dropped into any Bloodstone t' boost yer sacrificial power by 40%%.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.10: %1$sAny magenta landmark that ye land on will break away beneath yer feet n' send ye on a swim down a waterfall. Yer pawn will end up on thar lower level where thar waterfall ends.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_description.1: %1$sIn thar center o' thar board, there be four different altars that ye can sacrifice yer doubloons into t' get trinkets. Thar trinkets be random but also depend on which altar ye drop yer doubloons into. There be three tasks around thar board that can be attempted that award 15 doubloons if completed. Thar board specific shinin' spiker be awarded t' whoever sacrifices thar most doubloons into thar altars.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_entities.2:
Mixed Bag Altar Trinkets:

All Trinkets
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.1: %1$s Hey! I need help! Wait ye can understand me? Oh thank heavens. Look thar Witch put a curse on me n' turned me into this Moohshroom. I need ye t' go into me basement t' grab 3 spider eyes. If ye help, I can get ye something special.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.2: %1$s Well ahoy there outsider. I need some help. Ye see, one o' yer fellow surface dwellers caused me inventory t' be scrambled about. I'm backed up on potion demands n' I require assistance in making a new potion I need t' perfect. Thar ingredients need t' be precise! Think ye're up t' this task?
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.3: %1$s Hey can ye help me? I'm looking fer some materials n' thar only way I can get them be in this dark cave. We have a bunch o' copper, gold, n' iron in thar mines, but this magical cave helps me find trinkets fer me own magical creations.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.4: %1$s How did a surface dweller get down here? Doesn't matter. Come inside me mushroom hut. I've plundered something special fer visitors!
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.5: %1$s I need help creating a mushroom stew meal. One o' these mushrooms be poisonous n' I can't tell which one it be. If ye drop thar non-poisonous mushroom into thar cauldron, I will award ye wit' a sacrificial enchantment shard.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.6: %1$s Greetings surface dweller. I can provide ye wit' any trinkets ye may seek.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_poison_mushroom_end: %1$s Ye poisoned me! Now I'm gonna be sick.
%1$s Ye dropped thar non-poisoned mushroom on thar floor. Now it's ruined!
%1$s Nice job! Ye guessed correctly. Here be thar sacrificial enchantment shard.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_spider_challenge_en: %1$s Thank ye %2$s. Here be 10 doubloons fer yer troubles. There be plenty more o' us cursed mooshrooms t' save.
mcp.mouse_trap.1: Please wait fer voyage t' load...
mcp.mouse_trap.3: %1$s must snare %2$s each into a 1x1 hole.
mcp.mouse_trap_doubles.1: %1$s must snare %2$s into a 1x1 hole whilt %3$s must snare %4$s into a 1x1 hole.
mcp.mouse_trap_rules_doubles.1: The first tribe t' snare thar enemies in a 1x1 hole wins thar scallywag.
mcp.mouse_trap_rules.1: Each swashbuckler on thar hemmin' tribe will receive an egg 1.5 seconds after one be thrown.
mcp.mouse_trap_rules.2: Throw thar egg t' set a block on thar ground where it lands.
mcp.mouse_trap_rules.3: %1$s cannot jump but can break 3 blocks wit' thar axe.
mcp.mouse_trap_rules.4: %1$s wins by avoiding getting hemmed into a 1x1 area fer 70 seconds.
mcp.mouse_trap_rules.5: %1$s plunder by avoiding getting hemmed into a 1x1 area fer 52 seconds.
mcp.mpiq.3: Answer multiple choice questions regarding thar current state o' thar voyage.

mcp.mpiq_new_question.44: %1$sWho has taken thar longest on their turn?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.45: %1$sHow many minutes has thar voyage lasted fer?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.46: %1$sWhich piece o' equipment does %2$s have in their feet?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.47: %1$sWhich piece o' equipment does %2$s have in their legs?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.48: %1$sWhich piece o' equipment does %2$s have in their chest?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.49: %1$sWhich scallywag was played at thar end o' %2$s?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.50: %1$sWhat be thar current sum o' each swashbuckler's%2$s?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.51: %1$sWhat be thar current sum o' each tribe's%2$s?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.53: %1$sHow many free trinket pickups have YE passed?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.54: %1$sWho has tossed thar most trinkets overboard?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.57: %1$sHow many doubloons have YE spent in shop huts?

mcp.mpiq_new_question.63: %1$sHow many doubloons have YE spent in shops?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.65: %1$sHow many times has %2$s purchased shinin' spiker(s)?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.66: %1$sHow many doubloons has %2$s sacrificed in thar altars?
mcp.mpiq_new_question.68: %1$sHow many luck landmarks (yellow/black/chance time) has %2$s landed on?

mcp.mpiq_new_question.74: %1$sHow many times has %2$s traversed from different hue terretories?
mcp.mpiq_rules.1: Questions will appear in thar chat n' ye can answer them by dropping thar trinket wit' thar answer name ye choose.
mcp.mpiq_rules.3: The swashbuckler wit' thar most questions correct after 8 rounds wins!
mcp.mpiq_rules.4: Note: This voyage be being played in quickplay mode, therefore thar answers will be randomly generated.
mcp.mr_p_no.2: %1$sWhat made ye change yer mind? Be ye scared?
mcp.mr_p_no.3: %1$sIt's not like ye can afford it anyways.
mcp.mr_p_no.4: %1$sWe already established that ye be broke.
mcp.mr_p_yes.1: %1$sAlright then, I betchu 10 doubloons that ye can't catch a fish in thar pond in under 25 seconds. Yer time will set sail right after ye pay in.
mcp.mr_p_yes.3: %1$sAlright then, I betchu 10 doubloons that...wait a minute, ye don't even have 10 doubloons ye poor soul.
mcp.mr_p_yes.4: %1$sWhy'd ye change yer mind? It doesn't matter because ye're broke.
mcp.musical_minecarts.1: Music will play. When thar music stops, get in a minecart fast!
mcp.musical_minecarts_rules.1: Minecarts will spawn in random spots around thar dome, but thar spawn area shrinks by one less layer each round.
mcp.musical_minecarts_rules.2: There will be one less minecart that spawns than thar number o' swashbucklers left in thar voyage.
mcp.musical_minecarts_rules.3: If ye be thar only one not in a minecart, ye will be eliminated.
mcp.musical_minecarts_rules.4: Win thar voyage by surviving every round!
mcp.music_disc_challenge_check.1: You can only attempt this reckonin' once per turn!
mcp.music_disc_challenge_end.1: %1$s did not beat thar music disc reckonin'.
mcp.music_disc_challenge_end.2: Play thar music disc in thar jukebox t' receive yer doubloons
mcp.music_disc_challenge_success.1: %1$s won %2$s from thar music disc reckonin'!
