mcp.not_in_front_of_star_seller.1: Make sure ye be directly in front o' thar Shinin' Spiker Hawker.
mcp.obstacle_field.1: Run across thar field o' junk n' ruins towards thar beacon.
mcp.obstacle_field_new_round.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.obstacle_field_new_round.2: There was a tie n' multiple swashbucklers were eliminated!
mcp.obstacle_field_new_round.3: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.obstacle_field_rules.1: If ye be thar last swashbuckler t' reach thar beacon, ye be eliminated.
mcp.obstacle_field_rules.2: After a swashbuckler gets eliminated, thar beacon will move n' a new round will kick off.
mcp.obstacle_field_rules.3: The swashbuckler that survives every round wins thar voyage!
mcp.odd_one_out.1: There will be 20 villagers in thar village. One villager looks different from thar rest.
mcp.odd_one_out.2: There will be 24 villagers in thar village. One villager looks different from thar rest.
mcp.odd_one_out.3: There will be 29 villagers in thar village. One villager looks different from thar rest.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.1: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager first in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.2: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager second in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.3: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager third in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.4: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager fourth in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.5: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager fifth in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.6: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager sixth in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.7: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager seventh in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.8: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager eighth in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.9: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager ninth in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_round_end.10: %1$s laid eyes on thar villager tenth in %2$s%3$s%4$s seconds.
mcp.odd_one_out_rules.1: When thar round begins, ye must find n' right click thar villager that looks different.
mcp.odd_one_out_rules.2: If ye click an incorrect villager, ye will receive slowness fer a short period o' time.
mcp.odd_one_out_rules.3: The first swashbuckler t' find thar odd villager out will earn %1$s Glory Tallies while thar second finder will earn %2$s Glory Tallies n' so on. If ye fail t' find thar villager in time, ye earn 0 glory tallies.
mcp.odd_one_out_rules.4: The voyage ends after 3 rounds. Thar swashbuckler wit' thar most glory tallies at thar end wins!
mcp.odd_one_out_talk.1: You laid eyes on thar correct villager!
mcp.oitq.1: You have a sword, a bow, n' one arrow
mcp.oitq_rules.1: Arrows be always insta-kills on swashbucklers.
mcp.oitq_rules.2: If ye miss yer arrow shot, ye must kill using yer sword.
mcp.oitq_rules.3: You receive yer arrow back if ye kill someone or die.
mcp.oitq_rules.4: You respawn after a few seconds. Thar voyage ends after 90 seconds.
mcp.oitq_rules.5: The swashbuckler wit' thar most kills at thar end o' thar voyage wins! Ye will not get credit fer killing yer tribemate.
mcp.oitq_rules.6: The swashbuckler wit' thar most kills at thar end o' thar voyage wins!
mcp.on_the_dot.1: This be a timing scallywag. Ye must time 15 seconds as accurately as possible.
mcp.on_the_dot_rules.1: You will be give thar first three seconds.
mcp.on_the_dot_rules.2: Press thar button as close t' thar zero second mark as possible.
mcp.on_the_dot_rules.3: The swashbuckler who presses thar button thar closest t' thar zero second mark wins!
mcp.op_skip_turn_confirm.1: This will strip thar current swashbuckler's helm run. Only use this trinket if ye be stuck.%1$s
mcp.op_skip_turn_confirm.2: This will strip thar current swashbuckler's helm run. Only use this trinket if ye be stuck.%1$s
mcp.pac_cube.1: The voyage be thar ghosts %1$s vs. thar Pac Block %2$s.
mcp.pac_cube.2: The voyage be thar ghosts %1$s vs. thar two Pac Blocks %2$s.
mcp.pac_cube_last_life.1: %1$s has been caught! One more life remaining.
mcp.pac_cube_last_life.2: %1$s have been caught! One more life remaining.
mcp.pac_cube_respawn_powerup.1: A new power-up has spawned in a corner!
mcp.pac_cube_rules.1: %1$s must stash all o' thar orbs scattered across thar maze while avoiding thar ghosts.
mcp.pac_cube_rules.2: %1$s must hunt down %2$s by running into them.
mcp.pac_cube_rules.3: Pac Cube can also stash power-ups in thar four corners which will allow them t' kill thar souls by running into them.
mcp.pac_cube_rules.4: The power-ups activate immediately after walking over.
mcp.pac_cube_rules.5: After thar Pac Cube remains vulnerable fer 20 seconds, a new power-up will spawn in a random empty location.
mcp.pac_cube_rules.6: Pac Cube has two lives. Ghosts respawn after 10 seconds if hit by Pac Cube wit' a power-up active.
mcp.pac_cube_tick.1: The Pac Cube can now kill ye. Keep away!
mcp.pac_cube_tick.2: You can now kill ghosts fer 5 seconds!
mcp.pac_cube_tick.3: The Pac Cube can now kill ye. Keep away!
mcp.pac_cube_tick.4: You can now kill ghosts fer 5 seconds!
mcp.pac_cube_tick.5: Pac Cube can no longer kill ye.
mcp.pac_cube_tick.6: You can no longer kill ghosts.
mcp.pac_cube_tick.7: You plundered hit by Pac Cube. Ye will respawn in 10 seconds.
mcp.pac_maze_approach_shop.1: %1$s Ahoy sailer! I plundered some epic stuff that I'm selling.
mcp.pac_maze_choose_warp.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' choose yer warp.
mcp.pac_maze_choose_warp2.1: The warp that ye be will go be highlighted in white.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.2: %1$sPac Maze be a big board wit' lots o' twists n' turns themed after thar popular arcade voyage Pac-Man.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.3: %1$sThis board has two %2$s active at all times wit' each o' them selling a %3$s fer 20 %4$s. A %5$s will move after a %6$s gets forked for from it.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.4: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that stashs thar most Pellets on thar board. A Pellet be stashed by passing over thar landmark around it. Pellets can only be stashed once n' do not respawn.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.5: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that stashs thar most Pac-Dots on thar board. A Pac-Dot be stashed by passing over thar landmark around it. Pac-Dots can only be stashed once n' do not respawn.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.6: %1$sPower Pellets activate a passive ability on thar swashbuckler that stashs it. Any enemy swashbuckler that this swashbuckler passes on thar board during their turn will steal 8 %2$s from thar enemy swashbuckler n' send them back t' thar start. After being stashed, a Power Pellet stays active fer thar rest o' that swashbuckler's helm run n' three more additional whole turns. Once thar ability expires, thar Power Pellet will respawn allowing fer other swashbucklers t' stash it.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.7: %1$sThere be 8 warps on this board that ye can take which will teleport ye t' another warp on thar board. When entering a warp, ye have thar option t' teleport t' thar linked warp across from it (costs 5 %2$s), teleport t' a random warp (costs 5 %3$s), or teleport t' a warp o' yer choice (costs 10 %4$s).
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark will toggle thar opened/closed state o' thar blocked off path right next t' it.
mcp.pac_maze_description.1: %1$sIn this board, there be two shinin' spiker hawkers. Thar path be marked by arrow blocks. When ye approach a warp, ye have thar option t' go t' thar linked warp (across), choose yer warp, or warp randomly. Thar bonus shinin' spiker can be won by stashing thar most pellets across thar board. Pellets do not respawn. Power pellets (ender eyes) allow ye t' steal others' doubloons n' send them back t' thar start if ye pass them fer two turns after being activated.
mcp.pac_maze_linked_warp.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' use a linked warp.
mcp.pac_maze_power_pellet_hit.1: %1$s pinched %2$s%3$s from %4$s n' set them back t' thar start!
mcp.pac_maze_random_warp.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' use a random warp.
mcp.pac_maze_tick.1.1: Where would you like to warp to?
mcp.pac_maze_tick.1: %1$sWarp t' linked location%2$sWarp t' random location %3$sChoose location %4$s
mcp.parkour.1: Make yer way through thar parkour course.
mcp.parkour_difficulty.1: Cannot switch thar parkour when swashbucklers be on it
mcp.parkour_rules.1: Step over redstone lamps t' reach anchor points.
mcp.parkour_rules.2: There be 15 total anchor points. Drop flag t' reset t' anchor point.
mcp.parkour_rules.3: Reach thar end o' thar course first t' plunder or have thar most anchor points completed when thar voyage ends.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.3: %1$sShinin' Spiker fer sale! It's yers fer thar cost o' only %2$s %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.4: %1$sHello Adventurer! I have a shinin' spiker here that ye can plunder fer %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.5: %1$sAhoy Matey! One o' me treasured shinin' spikers here will cost ya %2$s %3$s. Want One?
mcp.pass_colored_spot.6: %1$sHey sailer! I am selling a shinin' spiker fer %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.7: %1$sYou made it! I offer varying number o' shinin' spikers at a wide range o' prices fer ye t' choose from.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.8: %1$sHey surface dweller! Since ye're here I might as well offer ye a shinin' spiker fer %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.9: %1$sYou made it! I can give ye a shinin' spiker in exchange fer %2$s o' yer finest %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.10: %1$sBum Da Bum Bum. I have a shinin' spiker fer ye. I just need %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.11: %1$sI have just what ye need, a shinin' spiker! And only fer thar cost o' %2$s %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.12: %1$sAbrah Cadabrah n' here be a shinin' spiker! %2$s %3$s from ye n' it's yers!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.13: %1$sHo Ho Ho! Tis thar season t' gather a shinin' spiker. I have one fer ye at thar cost o' %2$s %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.14: %1$sAhoy voyager! Here be a shinin' spiker to collect here and I offer less treasures fer it if yer karma be high.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.15: %1$sShinin' Spiker fer sale! It's yers fer thar cost o' only %2$s %3$s!

mcp.pass_colored_spot.17: %1$sAhoy Matey! One o' me treasured shinin' spikers here will cost ya %2$s %3$s. Want One?
mcp.pass_colored_spot.18: %1$sHey sailer! I am selling a shinin' spiker fer %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.19: %1$sYou made it! I offer varying number o' shinin' spikers at a wide range o' prices fer ye t' choose from.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.20: %1$sHey surface dweller! Since ye're here I might as well offer ye a shinin' spiker fer %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.21: %1$sYou made it! I can give ye a shinin' spiker in exchange fer %2$s o' yer finest %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.22: %1$sBum Da Bum Bum. I have a shinin' spiker fer ye. I just need %2$s %3$s.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.23: %1$sI have just what ye need, a shinin' spiker! And only fer thar cost o' %2$s %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.24: %1$sAbrah Cadabrah n' here be a shinin' spiker! %2$s %3$s from ye n' it's yers!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.25: %1$sHo Ho Ho! Tis thar season t' gather a shinin' spiker. I have one fer ye at thar cost o' %2$s %3$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.26: %1$sAhoy voyager! Here be a shinin' spiker fer ye to stash at the cost of %2$s %3$s%4$s!
mcp.pass_colored_spot.27: %1$sHey! Can I interest you in a single star? It will cost 20 %2$s.
mcp.path_finder.1: A 5x5 white square grid will be shown wit' 3 or 4 black squares randomly placed.
mcp.path_finder_end.2: %1$s has sailed the route to the end!
mcp.path_finder_rules.1: You must walk a path that: starts on thar side ye're at, finishes on thar opposite side, n' covers every white square exactly once.
mcp.path_finder_rules.2: Stepping over a black square will send ye back t' thar start.
mcp.path_finder_rules.3: The first swashbuckler t' finish their path wins thar voyage!
mcp.pc_maze_challenge_end.1: %1$s did not beat thar mushroom maze reckonin'.
mcp.pc_maze_challenge_end.2: %1$s completed thar mushroom maze reckonin' n' won %2$s.
mcp.pc_maze_tick.1: Please wait fer maze t' generate...
mcp.pc_maze_tick.2: %1$s Make yer way through a maze in thar basement using colored warps. Crouch inside a warp t' teleport t' thar other warp o' thar same color. After ye press thar button, ye have 25 seconds t' find thar red mushroom n' return before thar door closes. If ye succeed, I will reward ye wit' 10 doubloons.
mcp.pearl_hurl.1: Use enderpearls t' teleport t' different platforms.
mcp.pearl_hurl_rules.1: Follow thar arrows on thar signs n' shown by blocks.
mcp.pearl_hurl_rules.2: Please wait while course gets generated...
mcp.pearl_hurl_rules.3: Yer enderpearl recharges one second after throwing it.
mcp.pearl_hurl_rules.4: First swashbuckler t' complete thar course wins!
mcp.pearl_hurl_rules.5: Ties be determined by thar first swashbuckler t' complete thar most recent anchor point.
mcp.pickpocketer_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be stashed from free trinket pickups
Can be forked for from the shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.pig_pushers.1: Push yer pig into thar barn as fast as ye can!
mcp.pig_pushers.2: The pigs cannot move on their own.
mcp.pig_pushers.3: The first swashbuckler t' push their pig in thar barn before thar time runs out wins!
mcp.pig_pushers_end.2: %1$s pushed their pig into thar barn!
mcp.pig_pushers_end.3: Neither swashbuckler could push their pig into thar barn.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.2: %1$sPipe Canyon be Minecraft Party 2's Mario-Themed board. This board be all about using pipes t' warp t' different places throughout thar board.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.4: %1$sVisit %2$s's Mushroom Hut fer a chance t' complete thar Warp Maze Reckonin'. Winning this reckonin' earns ye 10 %3$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.5: %1$sVisit Bowser's ship n' defuse thar active bomb. A successful defusal will reward ye wit' 10 %2$s. Failing t' defuse thar bomb will blow ye up n' ye will lose 10 %3$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.6: %1$sVisit %2$s t' test yer skills on thar Paint Cube Reckonin'! Match thar block palette on thar floor beneath thar glass in this reckonin' before thar time runs out n' ye will be rewarded wit' 10 %3$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.7.3: . Walking through a warp will teleport ye t' thar corresponding warp o' thar same color.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.7: %1$sIf ye pass by a warp during yer turn, ye can take it fer thar cost o' 7 %2$s%3$s%4$s n' %5$s let ye enter thar warps without paying.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark will warp ye t' thar other magenta landmark on thar board that has thar same type o' timber slab border around thar landmark. There be two pairs o' magenta landmarks on thar board. One pair wit' an acacia slab border n' thar other pair wit' a warped slab border.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.9: %1$s%2$s%3$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that travels through thar most warps. These include thar colored pipes that can be taken as well as magenta landmark warps.
mcp.pipe_canyon_defuse_end.1: %1$s did not defuse thar correct bomb.%2$s
mcp.pipe_canyon_description.1: %1$s Warps! Warps! Warps! Ye have thar ability t' traverse through warps around thar board which will teleport ye t' thar corresponding pipe o' thar same color. Magenta landmarks will move ye t' thar other magenta landmark wit' thar same surrounding colored slabs. Thar board specific shinin' spiker be thar warper shinin' spiker. Any warp tolls or magenta landmark warps (but not thar Bew warp) will count towards this bonus star. In addition t' warping, this board has a Bew portal in thar middle n' a few reckonin's around where ye can earn doubloons.
mcp.pipe_canyon_paint_cube_end.1: %1$s did not beat thar paint cube reckonin'.
mcp.pipe_canyon_paint_cube_end.2: %1$s completed thar paint cube reckonin' n' won %2$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_pass_spot.1: %1$s Come try out me reckonin' t' receive some doubloons if ye plunder! Click on me t' learn how t' play.
mcp.pipe_canyon_pass_spot.2: %1$s Want t' attempt thar paint cube reckonin'? It costs nothing n' ye can plunder some doubloons.
mcp.pipe_canyon_pass_spot.3: %1$s Come t' me fer something toxic!
mcp.pipe_canyon_pass_spot.4: %1$s Welcome t' me shop! Care fer any trinkets?
mcp.pipe_canyon_warp_toll.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' teleport.
mcp.platforms.1: Diamonds will appear on thar platforms.
mcp.platforms2.1: Win thar diamonds on thar platforms by selecting that platform.
mcp.platforms3.1: If another swashbuckler chooses thar same platform, then neither o' ye plunder thar diamonds.
mcp.platforms4.1: Earn thar most diamonds t' plunder!
mcp.platforms_jump2.1: Someone jumped t' thar same platform as ye. Neither o' ye won gems this round.
mcp.platforms_jump4.1: Players will now be invisible fer thar last two rounds!
mcp.platforms_rules.1: Win thar diamonds on thar platforms by selecting that platform.
mcp.platforms_rules.2: If another swashbuckler chooses thar same platform, then neither o' ye plunder thar diamonds.
mcp.platforms_rules.3: Earn thar most diamonds t' plunder!
mcp.player_next_task.2: %1$sEnder pearl t' thar gold block on top o' thar platform in thar center.
mcp.player_next_task.4: %1$sCraft a hatchet o' timber (break timber wit' yer cutlass).
mcp.player_next_task.5: %1$sAcquire a Shinin' Spiker from thar villager.
mcp.player_next_task.6: %1$sVisit every swashbuckler's spawning pedestal then return back t' yer own.
mcp.player_next_task.7: %1$sTune all thar noteblocks t' thar lowest pitch.
mcp.player_reset_task.2: You rang thar bell too many times! %1$s
mcp.player_reset_task.4: %1$sEnder pearl t' thar gold block on top o' thar platform in thar center.
mcp.player_reset_task.7: %1$sAcquire a nether shinin' spiker from thar villager.
mcp.player_reset_task.8: %1$sVisit every swashbuckler's spawning pedestal then return back t' yer own.
mcp.player_reset_task.9: %1$sTune all thar noteblocks t' thar lowest pitch.
mcp.player_spot_scramble.1: The swashbucklers' spots have been scrambled!
mcp.player_swapper_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.player_swiper_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.pocket_plunderer_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be stashed from free trinket pickups
Can be forked for from the shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.port_priority.1: Each swashbuckler will be given a key n' be prompted wit' a random trinket t' scavenge fer.
mcp.port_priority.2: The trinket will be contained in a coffer at one o' thar seven beacons.
mcp.port_priority.3: The key given will only be able t' open that coffer.
mcp.port_priority.4: Upon finding thar trinket, thar swashbuckler will be given a new key n' prompted fer a new trinket t' look fer.
mcp.port_priority.5: All swashbucklers will be tasked wit' finding thar same three trinkets, but thar order will vary fer each swashbuckler.
mcp.port_priority.6: The swashbuckler that finds all three trinkets first wins.
mcp.port_priority.7: Coffers be marked wit' trinket frames that show thar trinket contained.
mcp.port_priority.8: Use this information t' remember thar trinket corresponding t' any previous beacons that ye have visited.
mcp.port_town_approach_bew.1: %1$s Come visit me ship, hop in thar portal t' yur right n' plunder from one o' yur mateys!
mcp.port_town_approach_captain_jones.1: %1$s Ahoy %2$s! Can ye help me out wit' a quick task on me vessel?
mcp.port_town_approach_captain_jones.2: %1$s Me treasure has been possessed n' be flying amuk! Sailor, I'll give ye 20 %2$s if ye can shoot it down wit' a trident n' plunder me loot back.
mcp.port_town_approach_lighthouse.1: %1$s Come meet me at thar top o' thar lighthouse. Ye won't regret it.
mcp.port_town_board_description.1: %1$sPort Town be all about plunder! Visit Bew's portal on his ship t' steal 10 Doubloons (fer free) or steal a Shinin' Spiker (costs 40 Doubloons) from another swashbuckler. Help Captain Jones recover his loot fer a lucrative reward. Shoot TNT at other swashbucklers from thar cannon on top o' thar lighthouse. Yellow landmarks have a 10%% chance o' sending ye t' thar lucky path where ye can stash a free shinin' spiker.
mcp.port_town_board_description.2: %1$sThis bonus shinin' spiker fer this board gets awarded t' thar swashbuckler that steals thar most Doubloons. Any Doubloons stolen through Stash Picker, Doubloon Pincher, Electro/Tool Grind'r snares, lighthouse cannon, n' Bew count towards this bonus shinin' spiker.
mcp.port_town_cannon_setup.1: %1$s Do ye see thar cannon on top o' this lighthouse? Ye can use it t' launch TNT at yer mateys n' steal their doubloons. Select any spot on thar board by looking at it (highlighted in white) n' then drop thar TNT t' shoot thar cannon . Thar closer thar TNT hits, thar more doubloons it will steal!
mcp.port_town_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.port_town_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.4: %1$s When visiting Bew's ship, ye can steal 10 %2$s from another swashbuckler o' yer choice or steal a %3$s fer thar cost o' 40 %4$s. Landing on thar magenta landmark by%5$swill block visitors from his ship fer two turns but can be bypassed with %6$s/%7$s unleashed.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.5: %1$sWhen passing thar lighthouse, ye can pick a spot on thar board t' fire an explosive. Thar explosive steals %2$s from nearby foes. Thar closer thar pawn be, thar more%3$swill be stolen.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.6: %1$sVisit Captain Jones's ship n' help him retrive his treasure n' he will reward ye wit' 20 %2$s.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark nearby thar whirlpool will suck thar swashbuckler inside o' thar whirlpool n' then teleport them t' a random landmark on thar board.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.8: %1$sAll%2$sspaces have a small chance t' send ye t' thar start o' thar lucky path. Reaching thar end o' thar Lucky Path will reward ye wit' a free%3$sand return ye back t' yer previous location.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.9: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that steals thar most %3$s. Any %4$s stolen through Bew, thar Lighthouse Cannon, or any trinket that transfers Doubloons from one swashbuckler t' another will count towards this %5$s.
mcp.port_town_flying_chest_end.1: %1$s Thank ye %2$s! Here be yer 20 %3$s as promised.
mcp.port_town_flying_chest_end.2: %1$s Shimmer me timbers! Me treasure be floating away!
mcp.port_town_pass_spot.1: %1$s Ahoy matey! I plundered some scurvy trinkets fer ye but it's going t' cost ye a few doubloons.
mcp.port_town_ship_decrement.1: %1$s turns until thar ship be unlocked!
mcp.port_town_ship_decrement.2: %1$s turn until thar ship be unlocked!
mcp.port_town_whirlpool.1: %1$s has been sucked into thar whirlpool!
mcp.power_towers.1: Tune yer noteblock as rapidly as possible fer 10 seconds.
mcp.power_towers.2: Whoever mashes their noteblock thar most within 10 seconds wins!
mcp.pp_cave_end.1: %1$s won %2$s%3$s%4$s from thar Grinch's Cave reckonin'.
mcp.pp_cave_end.2: %1$s won %2$s%3$s%4$s from thar Grinch's Cave reckonin'.
mcp.pp_cave_end.3: %1$s did not stash any presents from thar Grinch's Cave.
mcp.pp_cave_setup.2: %1$s Thar Mean Grinch has stolen some o' our presents. They be locked in thar barrels in thar cave. When ye go in thar cave, dripstone will fall from thar ceiling n' may break open a barrel which reveals a present (ye will hear thar sound). stash presents by right clicking them n' use this ender pearl t' escape.
mcp.pp_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an Overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.pp_cutscene.2: %1$sPresent Palace be a festive Christmas themed board.
mcp.pp_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 30 %4$s. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.pp_cutscene.4: %1$s%2$s can be spawned on thar map by landing on %3$s n' be stashed by passing them on thar board. They can also be stashed by winning reckonin's.
mcp.pp_cutscene.5: %1$sYou can deliver %2$s t' any o' thar two timber shacks (on thar west n' east side) on thar board. For each present ye deliver, ye will receive 4 Doubloons. Ye do not have t' return every present that ye be holding when passing thar shack.
mcp.pp_cutscene.6: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that delivers thar most presents.
mcp.pp_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark will spawn 3-5 presents on thar board, each in a random vacant spot.
mcp.pp_cutscene.8: %1$sSwim through thar pit o' snow n' find a be sunk pile o' %2$s before getting frost bite.
mcp.pp_cutscene.9: %1$sDrop down thar pit n' land in thar water t' earn %2$s.
mcp.pp_cutscene.10: %1$sThe Grinch has stolen some %2$s from thar barrels that thar dripstone breaks.
mcp.pp_cutscene.11: %1$sAll%2$sspaces have a small chance t' send ye t' thar start o' thar lucky path. Reaching thar end o' thar Lucky Path will reward ye wit' a free%3$sand return ye back t' yer previous location.
mcp.pp_deliver_tick.1: %1$s Ahoy. If ye have any presents t' deliver, come this way
mcp.pp_deliver_tick.2: %1$s Ahoy. If ye have any presents t' deliver, come this way
mcp.pp_deliver_tick.3: Right click any %1$s t' deliver 1 present
mcp.pp_ice_plunge_tick.1: %1$s I have a dare fer ye. Jump into thar water below. I will give ye one present plus one additional present per ice block that ye land next t'. If ye miss thar water, ye lose n' get nothing.
mcp.pp_ice_plunge_tick.2: %1$s won %2$s%3$s%4$s from thar ice plunge reckonin'.
mcp.pp_ice_plunge_tick.3: %1$s won %2$s%3$s%4$s from thar ice plunge reckonin'.
mcp.pp_pass_spot.1: %1$sAye matey! Ye left thar door open. It gets cold when ye do that. One more crack like that n' ye may end up on thar naughty list!
mcp.pp_pass_spot.2: %1$sAye matey! Ye left thar door open. It gets cold when ye do that. One more crack like that n' ye may end up on thar naughty list!
mcp.pp_pass_spot.3: %1$s Ho! Ho! Ho! Ahoy there jolly one! Interested in any trinkets?
mcp.pp_snow_tick.1: %1$s There be some doubloons buried in this pile o' snow. Grab thar doubloons t' plunder them. Do not spend too much time in thar snow or ye will get frost bite (indicated in actionbar). Here be some leather Peg-legs t' help ye out. Crouch t' go into thar snow.
mcp.pp_snow_tick.2: %1$s won %2$s%3$s from thar snow pit reckonin'.
mcp.pp_snow_tick.3: %1$s froze from thar snow pit reckonin'.
mcp.pp_stage1.1: One swashbuckler presses buttons on thar right side t' set a bridge o' that corresponding color on thar opposite side
mcp.pp_stage2.1: Take turns pressing thar buttons t' set temporary blocks fer yer partner t' jump on.
mcp.pp_stage3.1: You will get three colors o' wool in yer coffer n' yer partner has three different colors. Copy yer own build on yer own side.
mcp.pp_stage4.1: One door leads t' thar exit. Thar others bring ye back t' this room. Figure out together which button sets ye free!
mcp.pp_stage5.1: Press yer buttons quickly. Ye must alternate presses. Keep alternate pressing until thar meter reaches thar top n' ye hear a ding sound. If ye be too slow, thar meter goes down.
mcp.pp_stage6.1: Climb up thar waterfall dam on opposite sides t' finish!
mcp.present_palace_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s> This holiday themed board has a few special gimmicks.

%4$s: Presents can be nabbed across thar map n' stashed from reckonin's. Presents can be delivered at any o' thar timber shacks fer 4 doubloons each.%5$s%6$s can be stashed by forking for one from thar %7$s fer 30 %8$s.

%9$s The magenta landmark on this board spawns 3-5 presents randomly across the map.

%10$sThere be three reckonin's on this board. Thar ice plunge n' thar Grinch's cave reckonin' awards %11$s n' thar snow pit reckonin' awards %12$s%13$s%14$sThe bonus shinin' spiker fer this board be thar %15$s. It be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that delivers thar most presents t' thar timber shacks.
mcp.prison_pals.1: Cooperate wit' yer partner t' escape thar gulag.
mcp.prison_pals.2: Cooperate wit' yer partners t' escape thar gulag.
mcp.prison_pals_rules.1: Complete different reckonin's as a tribe.
mcp.prison_pals_rules.2: Step over chiseled stone bricks t' set spawn.
mcp.prison_pals_rules.3: First tribe t' complete thar five stages wins!
mcp.pusher.2: %1$s must avoid getting pushed into thar water.
mcp.pusher_rules.1: %1$s can push thar tribe o' three in thar water by pressing thar buttons.
mcp.pusher_rules.2: The buttons push out thar corresponding block on thar wall when pressed.
mcp.pusher_rules.3: If a swashbuckler if right in front o' that spot that pushed them off, they will fall down into thar water.
mcp.pusher_rules.4: %1$s must push all swashbucklers off thar platform before thar time ends!
mcp.pusher_rules.5: %1$s must have at least one swashbuckler left after 60 seconds o' play!

mcp.puzzled.1: Recreate thar image shown on thar right side.
mcp.puzzled_rules.1: The image will be scrambled n' randomly rotated on thar left side.
mcp.quest6_choose.1: You chose %1$s (Click again t' select a different trinket)

mcp.quickplayminigame.1: Cannot play this scallywag in realms mode
mcp.quickplayminigame.2: Cannot play this scallywag in realms mode
mcp.quick_draw.1: You will set sail on thar voyage walking n' facing away from yer enemy.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.1: Once ye reach thar end o' thar field, some time will pass n' ye will receive a loaded crossbow.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.2: When ye receive thar crossbow, immediately turn around n' fire yer shot at yer enemy.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.3: Arrows be instant kills. Swashbucklers will receive another loaded crossbow three seconds after each shot.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.4: Hit yer enemy without getting hit yerself t' plunder!
mcp.quick_play_1v3.1: Ye be needin’ a crew o’ three mateys online and lined up as swashbucklers afore ye can set sail fer this scallywag!
mcp.rainbow_run.2: Wind charges'll be spawnin’ from that dark gray cloud yonder, flyin’ straight toward thar rainbow ye be standin’ on.
mcp.rainbow_run.3: If ye collide with a wind charge, it’ll smack ye good and launch ye sky‑high in t' air.
mcp.rainbow_run.4: Thar last swahbuckler still breathin’ be thar victor!
mcp.rainbow_run.5: Thar spawn rate o’ them wind charges'll rise as thar minigame sails on.
mcp.rainbow_run.6: Beware, ye fool! Fall damage be active, natural healin’ be gone, and ye’ll perish instantly if ye tumble off thar rainbow.
mcp.randomize_spots_event.1: The board spots have been re-randomized!
mcp.random_special_event_repeat.6: Red Spots <=> Black Spots n' Blue Spots <=> Yellow Spots
mcp.ravager_rodeo.1: %1$s has %3$s seconds t' knock all o' thar %2$s's swashbucklers out o' thar arena while riding on top o' a Arravager.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.2: %1$s and %2$s have %4$s seconds t' knock all o' thar %3$s's swashbucklers out o' thar arena while riding on top o' Arravagers.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.3: %1$s must eliminate swashbucklers by colliding their Arravager's head wit' thar opposing swashbucklers.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.4: %1$s and %2$s must eliminate swashbucklers by colliding their Arravager's head wit' thar opposing swashbucklers.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.5: %1$s gets a charge ability which dashes thar Arravager in a straight line at a high speed in thar direction thar rider be facing. Any aqua tribe members in its path will get launched t' oblivian.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.6: %1$s and %2$s get a charge ability which dashes their Arravager in a straight line at a high speed in thar direction thar rider be facing. Any aqua tribe members in its path will get launched t' oblivian.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.7: The charge ability recharges 10 seconds after thar previous use n' can be used by hitting %1$s.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.8: At least one member on thar %1$s must survive until thar time runs out t' grant their tribe thar plunder.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.9: %1$sYer Arravager will move in thar direction that ye be looking.
mcp.reactor_reactor.2: A counter will ensue at 9 on thar lamp display
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.1: When it be yer turn, ye can lower thar counter by 1 or by 2 by choosing a button.
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.2: After ye press a button, it then becomes yer enemy's helm run t' press a button.
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.3: After each swashbuckler's first turn, thar counter be not displayed.
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.4: Whichever swashbuckler reduces thar counter t' zero or below loses thar voyage.
mcp.ready_up_tellraw.1: All swashbucklers can drop their primed-for-sail trinket when they be ready t' begin thar voyage.
mcp.realmsmode_setting.1: This will prevent a couple scallywags from being played that exist in a custom dimension. Realms has issues wit' loading custom dimensions. Additionally, this mode allows fer all swashbucklers t' use operator trinkets.

mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.2: %1$sRhythmic Room be a music room themed board.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s fer thar cost o' 20 %4$s. But once a swashbuckler buys a %3$s, the cost be shiftin’ at random to 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, or 40 %4$s, and the %2$s sets sail for a new landmark on the map.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.4: %1$sLanding on one o' thar two magenta landmarks wit' a metronome next t' it will run thar Metronome Event. This event will randomly change thar price o' a %2$s t' either 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30 or 40 %3$s.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.5: %1$sLanding on one o' thar two magenta landmarks on thar piano will run an event that has a 50%% chance t' give all swashbucklers 5 %2$s t' take 5 %3$s away from all swashbucklers.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.6: %1$sLanding on one o' thar two magenta landmarks on thar drum will launch thar lander t' a random landmark on thar board.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on one o' thar two magenta landmarks wit' a horn next t' it will launch thar lander directly in front o' thar %2$s.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on thar magenta landmark on thar chair will launch thar lander t' a random swashbuckler's spot.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.9: %1$sHelp %2$s tune his noteblock n' he will reward ye wit' 10 %3$s.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.10: %1$sTest yer rolling skills on thar snare drum! Thar faster ye roll, thar more %2$s ye will get.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.11: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that lands on thar most good/bad luck landmarks. These include yellow landmarks, black landmarks, n' chance time.
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.1: Ring thar bell as fast as ye can!
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.2: Each ring adds one point t' yer ring score n' subtracts one from yer enemy's score!
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.3: The first swashbuckler t' 20 rings wins!
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.4: The winning threshold will go down slowly as thar voyage goes on t' prevent stalemates.
mcp.rlgl.1: The voyage be Red Flare, Green Flare.
mcp.rlgl_rules.1: When thar light turns green, ye may go forward.
mcp.rlgl_rules.2: You must avast immediately when thar light turns red or else ye get sent back t' thar start
mcp.rlgl_rules.3: The color o' thar light will be shown in thar chat.
mcp.rlgl_rules.4: Be thar first swashbuckler t' reach thar end t' plunder!
mcp.rocket_launch.1: You have elytra wings n' one firework rocket.
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.1: You must jump off thar platform in thar indicated direction n' use yer rocket t' boost yerself as far as possible.
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.2: Once ye land on thar ground, ye be finished.
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.3: The swashbuckler that travels thar farthest wins!
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.4: The field ends at 2160 blocks. Any extra height gained at thar finish will add on t' yer score wit' a tiebreaker being who landed first.
mcp.roll_off.2: Each swashbuckler will roll a dice.
mcp.roll_off.3: The swashbuckler that rolls thar highest wins doubloons equivalent t' their roll.
mcp.roll_off.4: %1$s will roll first, followed by thar next swashbuckler in thar turn order.
mcp.roll_off_end.2: %1$s won thar Roll Off n' scouraged %2$s%3$s!
mcp.roll_queue_tip.1.3.hover: Player uses two dice for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.1: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.2: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.3: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.4: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.5: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.6: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.7: %1$s Ye have a %2$s unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, ye will roll it on yer next turn.
mcp.roll_queue_tip.8: %1$s Ye have a multiple special dice unleashed on ye. If ye use this trinket on yerself, it will be added t' yer roll queue.
mcp.rpsc.4: Decide as a tribe whether t' throw rock, paper, or scissors against thar other tribe.
mcp.rpsc_rules.1: Rock beats scissors. Scissors beats paper. Paper beats rock.
mcp.rpsc_rules.2: After both tribes decide, everyone gets moved up t' thar front line.
mcp.rpsc_rules.3: On thar ding, thar choices will be revealed as trinkets on top o' thar chiseled stone brick.
mcp.rpsc_rules.4: If yer choice beats thar choice o' thar other tribe, then ye may attack them.
mcp.rpsc_rules.5: If yer choice loses t' thar other tribe's choice, then ye should run back t' yer safety zone.
mcp.rpsc_rules.6: Your health will not regenerate between rounds.
mcp.rpsc_rules.7: First tribe t' eliminate thar other tribe wins!
mcp.rpsc_shoot.1: The choices be about t' be revealed!
mcp.rpsc_start_round.1: Select an trinket t' play by dropping it. One swashbuckler drops fer both.
mcp.rr_board_description.1.2: The shinin' spiker price on this board starts at 20 doubloons n' can change t' 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, or 40 doubloons.
mcp.rr_board_description.1.3: The bonus shinin' spiker fer this board be thar fortune shinin' spiker n' be awarded t' whoever lands on thar most yellow, black, n' chance time landmarks.
mcp.rr_board_description.1:
%1$s%2$s
Magenta landmarks do the following:
Piano: Gives or takes 5 doubloons from all swashbucklers
Drum: Launches swashbuckler to a random landmark
Chair: Launches swashbuckler to a random swashbuckler
Horn: Launches swashbuckler to spiker landmark
Metronome: Changes spiker price. 
%3$s
mcp.rr_drum_challenge.1: %1$s I need a drummer who can drum fast. Let's see how fast ye can drum. Thar faster ye drum thar more doubloons ye will earn. Click me t' learn about thar reckonin'. Click thar sign t' set sail thar reckonin'.
mcp.rr_drum_challenge_tick.1: %1$s Alternate right n' left click t' hit thar drum. Thar more hits ye can do, thar more doubloons ye will plunder.
mcp.rr_drum_event.1: %1$s got shot up t' a random landmark!
mcp.rr_horn_event.1: %1$s got shot up t' thar shinin' spiker landmark!
mcp.rr_pass_spot.1: %1$s Me noteblock be out o' tune. Can ye get it t' match thar pitch o' thar one on thar right?
mcp.rr_pass_spot.5: %1$s Welcome! Welcome! I've plundered some trinkets that may be o' use t' ye!
mcp.rr_piano_event.1: All swashbucklers have be sunk 5 doubloons each
mcp.rr_piano_event.2: All swashbucklers have gained 5 doubloons each
mcp.rr_tuner_challenge_end.1: %1$s did not beat thar note tuning reckonin'
mcp.rr_tuner_challenge_end.2: %1$s completed thar note tuning reckonin' n' won %2$s.
mcp.runner.1: As ye run, thar blocks below ye will disappear.
mcp.runner.2: A falling block will kill any swashbuckler that it comes in contact wit'.
mcp.runner.3: The falling blocks will also destroy thar ground beneath it.
mcp.runner.4: Run n' jump t' avoid falling t' yer death.
mcp.runner.5: If ye walk or crouch at any point, ye will be eliminated.
mcp.runner_tick2.3: %1$s fell off n' has been eliminated
mcp.set_up_micro_duel.4: Dust Up wager has been set t' %1$s%2$s
mcp.set_up_micro_duel.5: Dust Up wager has been set t' %1$s%2$s
mcp.set_up_trap_selectors.1: No available snare placement spots nearby
mcp.set_up_trap_selectors.2: The spot that yer snare will be placed be highlighted in white.
mcp.sheep_scramble.1: Hundreds o' sheep will spawn in thar area beneath ye.
mcp.sheep_scramble_end.2: There were %1$s sheep on thar field
mcp.sheep_scramble_rules.1: You will have 10 seconds t' view thar entire herd.
mcp.sheep_scramble_rules.2: When thar time be up, ye must guess thar number o' sheep in thar herd by triggering an objective in thar chat.
mcp.sheep_scramble_rules.3: Whoever guesses closest t' thar actual number o' sheep wins!
mcp.sheep_scramble_tick.1: type: '/trigger SheepGuess set [Guess]' t' input yer guess
mcp.show_landing_spot.32:
Chair Event
(launch to a random player)
mcp.show_landing_spot.33:
Horn Event
(launch t' thar Shinin' Spiker Hawker)
mcp.show_landing_spot.34:
Horn Event
(launch t' thar Shinin' Spiker Hawker)
mcp.show_landing_spot.35:
Drum Event

mcp.show_landing_spot.36:
Drum Event

mcp.show_landing_spot.39:

mcp.show_landing_spot.44: Open The Hatch For One Helm Run
mcp.show_landing_spot.48:
Dynamite Event
(launch back t' thar start of t' map)
mcp.show_landing_spot.49:
Dynamite Event
(launch back t' thar start of t' map)
mcp.show_landing_spot.53:
Ye Vanishin' Snare
(get sent back t' thar start of t' map)
mcp.skipturn.1: %1$s's helm run has been stepped over!
mcp.sky_fly.1: Glide downward wit' yer elytra through thar rings.
mcp.sky_fly_rules.1: The course moves in a large counter-clockwise spiral going inwards.
mcp.sky_fly_rules.2: The rings get smaller as thar course goes on.
mcp.sky_fly_rules.3: You get one attempt. Thar further ye make it through thar course, thar more glory tallies ye earn.
mcp.sky_fly_rules.4: The voyage ends once all swashbucklers be on thar bottom.
mcp.sky_fly_tick.1: You missed thar hoop. Jump down fer thar scallywag t' end.
mcp.slime_time.1: %1$s will play as slow slimes. %2$s will play as thar runner.
mcp.slime_time.2: %1$s will play as slow slimes. %2$s will play as thar runners.
mcp.slime_time_rules.1: %1$s each control a large slime beneath them by moving.
mcp.slime_time_rules.2: The runner must keep away from thar slimes at all costs.
mcp.slime_time_rules.3: The runner may run over feathers fer an instant speed boost or glass fer temporary invisibility.
mcp.slime_time_rules.4:
The runners can get the following temporary effects:
Run Over Feather: Speed
Run Over Glass Invisibility
Drop Ender Eye/Right Click: Warp To Tribemate
mcp.slime_time_rules.5.1: The voyage lasts 55 seconds. In order fer thar tribe o' three t' plunder, one o' their slimes must touch %1$s.
mcp.slime_time_rules.5: The voyage lasts 55 seconds. In order fer thar aqua tribe t' plunder, one o' their slimes must touch %1$s.
mcp.slime_time_rules.6: %1$s wins by avoiding all thar slimes until thar time runs out.
mcp.snow_wars.1: Throw snowballs at thar opposing tribe.
mcp.snow_wars.2: Each snowball that hits a swashbuckler will do damage.
mcp.snow_wars.3: You will receive a new snowball every 3 seconds (maximum o' 6).
mcp.snow_wars.4: The tribe that eliminates thar other wins!
mcp.solidify_fail.1: Cannot solidify into water as this block
mcp.solidify_fail.2: You can only solidify on top o' a grass block as a piece o' grass
mcp.solidify_fail.3: You can only solidify on top o' a grass block as a dandelion
mcp.solidify_fail.4: You may only solidify into air.
mcp.solidify_fail.5: You cannot solidify on thar edge o' a block as gravel
mcp.solidify_fail.6: You can only solidify on thar ground as a solid block.
mcp.space_description.1: %1$s +3 Doubloons fer swashbuckler that lands on it.%2$s
mcp.space_description.2: %1$s -3 Doubloons fer swashbuckler that lands on it.%2$s
mcp.space_description.3: %1$s Random fortunate outcome t' swashbuckler that lands on it. Such event could include: Gaining 7-10 doubloons, Enemys lose 6 doubloons, Receive Minion Pet, Receive Coin Snatcher, Receive Twisted Ticker (rare trinket).%2$s
mcp.space_description.4: %1$s Random unfortunate outcome t' swashbuckler that lands on it. Such event could include: Losing 7-10 doubloons, Enemys gain 6 doubloons, Lose all yer trinkets, Lose yer next turn.%2$s
mcp.space_description.5: %1$s Random neutral event fer all swashbucklers. Such event could include: Roll off, Coin minigame, Spawn single use shinin' spiker hawker, Coin pile, Chump Charity, Stimulus, Double Trouble, Communism, Coin Shower. This landmark counts towards Storm-Fester Shinin' Spiker.%2$s
mcp.space_description.6: %1$s Swashbuckler that lands on it receives a movement or snare trinket. Such trinkets could include: Cursed Cube, Duo Bones, Trio Bones, Flamin' Snare, Tool Grind'r Snare, Slippin' Snare, Shock Snare, Nect'r o Hive Spur, Ender Snare (some boards).%2$s
mcp.space_description.7: %1$s Initiates a dust-up! Thar swashbuckler that lands on thar landmark must choose someone else t' go against in a dust-up minigame where both swashbucklers will bet doubloons or a shinin' spiker. Thar wager be chosen by thar swashbuckler that lands on thar spot.%2$s
mcp.space_description.8: %1$s A board specific event occurs. Usually this will move swashbuckler(s) positions or open/close a path. This landmark counts towards Storm-Fester Shinin' Spiker. Rarity o' landmark varies between each board.
mcp.space_description.9: %1$s%2$s Initiates a bloodlust scallywag! All swashbucklers will put in a certain number o' doubloons (if they have them) into a pot. 1st place wins thar majority o' thar pot n' 2nd place wins their bid back. Coin distributions be adjusted in mega-party mode so that thar top half o' finishers will earn doubloons.%3$s
mcp.space_description.10: %1$s%2$s Initiates chance time! Chance time be an event that will involve a transaction between two swashbucklers. Thar transaction can include giving or swapping o' doubloons, trinkets, or shinin' spikers. This landmark counts towards Storm-Fester Shinin' Spiker.%3$s
mcp.space_jumpers.1: Each tribe will have a shooter n' a jumper.
mcp.space_jumpers.2: Each tribe will have two shooters n' a jumper.
mcp.space_jumpers.3: Each tribe will have two shooters, a griefer, n' a jumper.
mcp.space_jumpers.4: Each tribe will have two shooters, a griefer, n' two jumpers.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.1: The shooters must hit thar buttons on thar end stone bricks t' extend thar block out.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.2: The jumpers have jump boost 4 n' can jump on any o' thar extended platforms.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.3: The jumpers have jump boost 4 n' can jump on any o' thar extended platforms. Thar griefers can shoot tridents on thar front o' thar other tribe's platform blocks t' get rid o' them.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.4: First tribe t' have their jumper reach thar end wins!
mcp.special_event.3: There be %1$s more helm runs left in this voyage!
mcp.special_event.4: As o' right now, %1$s has %2$s shinin' spikers.
mcp.special_event.5: As o' right now, %1$s have %2$s shinin' spikers.
mcp.special_event_2.1: Because o' this, a high tide affair will take place.
mcp.special_event_3.1: The swashbuckler at bottom deck will decide between two randomly given events.
mcp.special_event_3_.1: One event will be randomly generated by %1$s
mcp.special_event_4.1: %1$s be at bottom deck n' will determine thar fate o' thar rest o' thar voyage.
mcp.special_event_5.1: %1$s: All trinkets (including currently held trinkets) become galleon'd
mcp.special_event_5.2: %1$s: Five random spots get changed t' chance time spots
mcp.special_event_5.3: %1$s: Five single-use shinin' spiker hawkers get spawned
mcp.special_event_5.4: %1$s: All rewards n' losses be doubled fer thar remainder o' thar voyage
mcp.special_event_5.5: %1$s: All red spots swap wit' black spots n' all blue spots swap wit' yellow spots
mcp.special_event_5.7: %1$s: Big Dice! All regular dice roll 1-20 fer thar remainder o' thar voyage
mcp.special_event_5.8: %1$s: Flip thar map! All hands be marchin’ backward, and every path be wide open
mcp.special_event_5.9: %1$s: All trinkets (including currently held trinkets) become galleon'd
mcp.special_event_5.10: %1$s: Five random spots get changed t' chance time spots
mcp.special_event_5.11: %1$s: All rewards n' losses be doubled fer thar remainder o' thar voyage
mcp.special_event_5.12: %1$s: Five single-use shinin' spiker hawkers get spawned
mcp.special_event_5.13: %1$s: Big Dice! All regular dice roll 1-20 fer thar remainder o' thar voyage
mcp.special_event_5.15: %1$s: All red spots swap wit' black spots n' all blue spots swap wit' yellow spots
mcp.special_event_5.16: %1$s: Flip thar map! All hands be marchin’ backward, and every path be wide open
mcp.speed_builders.1: A design will spawn on thar one o' thar white squares.
mcp.speed_builders.2: Copy thar build on t' thar other concrete square.
mcp.speed_builders.4: If ye get stuck, ye can push thar button t' reset yer build.
mcp.speed_builders.5: First swashbuckler t' copy 4 builds wins.
mcp.spirit_shield_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be acquired from thar Shinin' Spiker Altar n' Variety Altar in thar Mooshroom Grotto board or from a Goodie Bag.
mcp.spleef.1: Spleef each other off thar map
mcp.ssarmorputon.1: Steve did not say t' put on a body shell
mcp.ssendclickchat.1: Steve did not say t' click thar sign
mcp.ssendclickchat.2: Steve did not say t' click thar sign more than once
mcp.ssendcrouch.1: Steve did not say t' crouch
mcp.ssenddrop.1: Steve did not say t' drop that
mcp.ssenddropconcrete.1: Steve did not say t' drop that
mcp.ssendeatcake.1: Steve did not say t' eat cake.
mcp.ssendeatcake.2: You ate thar wrong number slices o' cake.
mcp.ssendjump.1: Steve did not say t' jump
mcp.ssendjumpop.1: Steve did not say t' go off thar platform
mcp.ssendnoteblocks.1: Steve did not say t' tune noteblocks
mcp.ssendnoteblocks.2: You did not tune thar noteblocks exactly three times.
mcp.ssendpunch.1: Steve did not say t' punch anyone
mcp.ssendstaystill.1: Steve did not say t' stay still.
mcp.ssendstaystill.2: Steve did not say t' move.
mcp.ssnexttask2.5: Steve says put on diamond Peg-legs
mcp.ssnexttask2.6: Steve says put on golden Peg-legs
mcp.ssnexttask2.7: Steve says put on leather Peg-legs
mcp.ssnexttask2.11: Steve says put on diamond Peg-legs
mcp.ssnexttask2.12: Steve says put on golden Peg-legs
mcp.ssnexttask2.13: Steve says put on leather Peg-legs
mcp.ssnexttask2.15: Steve says go off thar platform
mcp.ssnexttask2.18: Steve says click thar sign once
mcp.ssnexttask2.21: Steve says tune thar noteblock 3 times
mcp.ssnexttask2.24: Steve says drop thar stone block
mcp.ssnexttask2.25: Steve says drop thar cobblestone block
mcp.ssnexttask2.26: Steve says drop thar dripstone block
mcp.ssnexttask2.30: Steve says drop thar dripstone block
mcp.ssnexttask2.31: Steve says drop thar stone block.
mcp.ssnexttask2.32: Steve says drop thar cobblestone block

mcp.ss_approach_pablo.1: Aye, welcome! In need o' me services, eh? I’ll steal some doubloons from whoever ya want, free o' charge! Though, I can’t help but notice that

mcp.ss_picnic_challenge_end.1: %1$s Well done! Here be yer reward.
mcp.ss_picnic_challenge_end.2: %1$s Sorry. These be thar wrong trinkets.
mcp.startspin.1: You do not have enough doubloons t' spin thar grog guzzler!
mcp.startspin.2: You can only use thar grog guzzler once per turn!
mcp.start_duel.3: %1$s used %2$s t' wager 30 %3$s fer 1 %4$s as thar duel wager!
mcp.start_game_sign.1: Click on thar gamemode that ye would like t' play.
mcp.start_game_sign.2: Click on thar board that ye would like t' play.
mcp.start_game_sign.3: %1$s%2$sMinecraft Party 2 be lettin’ up t’ 10 swashbucklers aboard fer play. At minimum, one o’ ye mateys must jump ship or take up the post o’ watchful  (yellowbelly).
mcp.start_game_sign.4: %1$s%2$sThere need be at least four swashbucklers online and set as a swashbuckler to begin this voyage.
mcp.start_game_sign.5: %1$s%2$sGrand Prix Mode requires an even number o' swashbucklers t' be playing.
mcp.start_game_sign.9: Please have command blocks enabled before starting thar voyage
mcp.star_counterfeiter_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.star_dupe_end.1: %1$s Select thar box (right click) that ye believe thar shinin' spiker be in. Then right click me n' I will let ye know if ye plundered it correct.
mcp.star_dupe_end2.1: %1$s Better luck next time! Thar shinin' spiker was hidden here (blue outline).
mcp.star_dupe_end2.2: %1$s Well done %2$s! Ye've been awarded a net gain o' 1 shinin' spiker!
mcp.star_dupe_end2.3: %1$s Well done %2$s! Ye've been awarded a net gain o' 2 shinin' spikers!
mcp.star_dupe_setup.1: %1$s Select a box (right click) t' put one o' yer shinin' spikers into. Then press one o' thar buttons in thar center t' set sail. Thar boxes will move around very fast fer 10 seconds. Ye must keep track o' which box ye select then identify it correctly afterwards in order fer thar trick t' work.
mcp.star_protector.1: You need at least one shinin' spiker purchased from thar board t' use this trinket.

%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s

mcp.star_shard_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be acquired from thar Shinin' Spiker Altar n' Variety Altar in thar Mooshroom Grotto board.

mcp.step_into_altar.1: Welcome t' thar sacrificial alter. Drop yer doubloons into thar lava cauldron t' sacrifice them. When ye're done, press thar button n' a reward will be given t' ye. Thar more doubloons ye sacrifice, thar higher thar chances be o' getting more n' better trinkets.
mcp.step_into_altar.2: Drop doubloons into thar altar n' press thar button t' sacrifice them t' get some trinkets!
mcp.stevesays2.1: You must do thar action in chat only if Steve says so.
mcp.stevesays3.1: If ye do an action that ye be not supposed t', then ye get kicked out o' thar voyage!
mcp.stevesays4.1: You earn 3 Glory Tallies fer completing each action on time, 4 Glory Tallies fer completing thar action first n' 0 Glory Tallies fer not completing thar action at all.
mcp.stevesays5.1: The voyage ends after 22 actions. Earn thar most glory tallies t' plunder!
mcp.steve_says.1: Do exactly what Steve tells ye t' do.
mcp.steve_says_rules.1: You must do thar action in chat only if Steve says so.
mcp.steve_says_rules.2: If ye do an action that ye be not supposed t', then ye get kicked out o' thar voyage!
mcp.steve_says_rules.3: You earn 3 Glory Tallies fer completing each action on time, 4 Glory Tallies fer completing thar action first n' 0 Glory Tallies fer not completing thar action at all.
mcp.steve_says_rules.4: The voyage ends after 22 actions. Earn thar most glory tallies t' plunder!
mcp.steve_says_start.1: Steve says thar voyage has begun!
mcp.stickyglueunstuck.2: %1$s be unstuck from one o' their %2$s snares!
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.2: %1$sSuburbia Scramble be all about investing in properties. %2$s do not spawn on this board.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.3: %1$sPlayers' %2$s counts be based on thar number o' %3$s they have invested in each parcel. Thar more %4$s a swashbuckler has invested in a parcel that they own, thar more %5$s they will get from it.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.4: %1$s Passing by a parcel gives ye an opportunity t' invest in it. Ye can invest any amount o' %2$s that ye have into thar parcel. Use thar "+1 %3$s" n' "-1 %4$s" signs t' add n' subtract thar amount that ye would like invested. Click on thar confirmation sign in thar middle t' confirm yer investment.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.5: %1$sWhenever any changes t' a parcel investment occurs, thar text on top will update t' show who owns it as well as thar %2$s payouts fer thar parcel.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.6: Shinin' Spikers can also be given out to the 2nd place swashbuckler in a parcel if they have enough %1$s invested.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.7: Shinin' Spikers can also be given out to the 2nd and 3rd place swashbuckler in a parcel if they have enough %1$s invested.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.8: %1$sThe building on thar parcels will also update depending on thar number o' %2$s invested by thar parcel owner (thar swashbuckler wit' thar most %3$s invested in thar parcel).
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.9: %1$sThis be thar Tier 1 Building. It awards 1 %2$s t' thar parcel owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.10: %1$sThis be thar Tier 2 Building. It awards 2 %2$s t' thar parcel owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.11: %1$sThis be thar Tier 3 Building. It awards 3 %2$s t' thar parcel owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.12: %1$sThis be thar Tier 4 Building. It awards 4 %2$s t' thar parcel owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.13: %1$sThis be thar Parcel 5 Building. It both looks n' works differently from thar other parcels. It gives 3 %2$s (regardless o' thar amount o' %3$s invested) t' thar parcel owner. This parcel can only be accessed by going through thar manhole.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.14: %1$sThis be thar manhole. When thar manhole be open, it will bring swashbucklers t' thar path where Parcel 5 be located. Swashbucklers that reach thar end o' thar path will take thar manhole exit by thar start o' thar board. Thar manhole's initial state be closed.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.15: %1$sThe manhole opens when a swashbuckler lands on thar magenta landmark right before it n' stays open fer one turn. A swashbuckler can also travel through thar manhole in its closed state if thar swashbuckler has %2$s or %3$s activated.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.16: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark on a corner o' thar board automatically invests 10 %2$s in thar nearest parcel fer thar swashbuckler that lands on thar landmark.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.17: %1$sVisit Pablo thar Pincher's Humble Abode! Ye can choose an enemy n' Pablo will steal from a random parcel o' theirs n' deposit thar investment into yers. If ye have a spare trinket t' offer that Pablo wants, Pablo will Pinch extra hard.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.18: %1$sHelp Tyren organize his picnic basket n' he will reward ye wit' 10 %2$s.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.19: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that has thar highest minimum %3$s invested across all parcels.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_description.1:
%1$sShinin' Spikers are acquired by investing into parcels. Whoever invests the most doubloons into a parcel becomes the owner of that parcel and earns spikers depending on how many doubloons they have invested into the parcel.
%2$sDoubloon: Tier 1 Parcel
%3$s Doubloons: Tier 2 Parcel
%4$s Doubloons: Tier 3 Parcel
%5$s: Tier 4 Parcel
Parcel 5 can be visited by going through the manhole. Parcel 5 always remains at tier 3.
%6$sManhole: Opens the manhole for one turn. Jumping in there leads to the part of the board with Parcel 5.
Corner landmarks: Automatically invests 10 %7$s (for free) in the nearest parcel for the swashbuckler that lands on the landmark.
%8$sThe Diversification Shinin' Spiker be awarded t' thar swashbuckler wit' thar highest minimum number o' %9$s invested across all parcels.

mcp.summon_chance_time_spots.2: Five random spots will now be changed t' chance time!
A single use Shinin' Spiker Hawker has been summoned!
mcp.summon_star_sellers.1: %1$s has chosen t' summon Shinin' Spiker Hawkers!
mcp.summon_star_sellers.2: Five single use shinin' spiker hawkers will now be summoned!
mcp.swapstars.2: %1$s o' %2$s's%3$s were protected using shinin' spiker protectors.
mcp.swapstars.3: %1$s o' %2$s's%3$s were protected using shinin' spiker protectors.
mcp.swap_colors.1: %1$s has chosen t' swap blue wit' yellow spots n' red wit' black spots!
mcp.swap_colors.2: Blue spots now swap wit' yellow spots n' red spots swap wit' black spots!
mcp.szb.1: Similiar t' rock, paper, scissors, ye must pick either snowman, zombie or blaze against yer enemy.
mcp.szb_rules.1: Zombie defeats Snowman. Snowman defeats Blaze. Blaze defeats Zombie.
mcp.szb_rules.2: Choose thar correct option against yer enemy t' plunder. If both swashbucklers choose thar same mob, thar voyage be replayed.
mcp.szb_tick.1: Drop thar head o' thar mob that ye want t' choose.
mcp.take_flight.1: You have elytra wings. Ye must race through thar course by flying n' using yer rockets.
mcp.take_flight_rules.1: There be a 1/2 second minimum cooldown between each rocket use.
mcp.take_flight_rules.2: Soar though yellow squares for a speed boost. If ye die, ye lose momentum n' respawn where ye be at.
mcp.take_flight_rules.3: The first swashbuckler t' complete three laps wins!
mcp.tanks.1: This be a battle among two tribes! Shoot thar other tribe t' deal damage.
mcp.tanks_rules.1: %1$s will control thar motor of a bag o' bones below while %2$s will control thar firin' of their bag o' bones.
mcp.tanks_rules.2: Swashbucklers be able to fire bolts (1 second cooldown) by pressing %1$s or %2$s. Bolts will soar where thar end wand be pointin'
mcp.tanks_rules.3: Wither bag o' boness have more Health n' deal more blast o' pain than regular bag o' bones.
mcp.tanks_rules.4: First tribe t' eliminate thar other tribe wins!
mcp.team_hockey.1: Two turtles will spawn in thar center o' thar rink.
mcp.team_hockey_rules.1: Punch thar turtles into yer opposing tribe's goal t' score.
mcp.team_hockey_rules.2: Once one o' thar first two turtles gets scored, a new turtle will get spawned in thar center.
mcp.team_hockey_rules.3: First tribe t' score two goals wins!
mcp.tedious_tasks.1: Complete thar 8 tasks as quickly as ye can.
mcp.tedious_tasks.2: Tasks will be given (in chat) in a random order fer all swashbucklers.
mcp.tedious_tasks.3: You can kill/disrupt other swashbucklers. Do whatever it takes!
mcp.tedious_tasks.4: Tip: Make sure ye have yer %1$s channel at an audible level fer this voyage.
mcp.temple_end.1: %1$s beat thar temple dungeon reckonin' n' won%2$s
mcp.temple_end.2: %1$s beat thar temple dungeon reckonin' wit' no scratches n' won%2$s
mcp.temple_end.3: %1$s died while attempting thar temple dungeon reckonin'.
mcp.temple_end.4: %1$s ran out o' time while attempting thar temple dungeon reckonin'.
mcp.temple_generate.1: %1$s Come journey through this ancient temple n' ye can plunder %2$s if ye complete it. I will award ye wit' an additional %3$s if ye finish without any scratches.
mcp.tetris.1: Welcome t' Betris, a voyage based off tetris.
mcp.tetris_rules.1: In this voyage, ye will drop 2D pieces from thar top into thar gray container.
mcp.tetris_rules.2: The pieces will be made up o' four blocks each.
mcp.tetris_rules.3: For each row o' blocks ye have anywhere that be filled completely wit' pieces, it gets removed n' sent t' yer enemy.
mcp.tetris_rules.4: If ye clear a row that was sent t' ye, it does not get sent back.
mcp.tetris_rules.5: You can also hold or swap yer current piece by moving forward
mcp.tetris_rules.6: If any block o' yers reaches thar top, ye lose.
mcp.tetris_rules.7:
Controls:
Drop Piece: %1$s
Soft Drop Piece: %2$s
Move Piece: Scroll Wheel
Rotate Piece Clockwise: %3$s or %4$s
Rotate Piece Counter Clockwise: %5$s or %6$s
Swap Pieces: %7$s
mcp.tetris_rules.8: Tip: Set yer fingers on thar control keys before thar voyage starts n' keep them there. First swashbuckler t' eliminate their enemy wins thar duel!
mcp.tetris_tick.1: Starting now, every 10 seconds a permanent row will get added n' thar playing area will get smaller!
mcp.thorned_spirit_shield.1.2.hover: Passive ability. Upon activation, protects you from the next player that tries to steal a Star or Coins from you. Any player that attempts to steal coins will instead lose the coins that they would have otherwise stolen.
Can only be acquired from thar Shinin' Spiker Altar n' Variety Altar in thar Mooshroom Grotto board or from a Treasure Bag.
mcp.thorned_spirit_shield_description.1: %1$s%2$sPassive ability. Upon activation protects ye from thar next swashbuckler that tries t' steal a Shinin' Spiker or Doubloons from ye. Any swashbuckler that attempts t' steal doubloons will instead lose thar doubloons that they would have otherwise stolen. If both a %3$s n' a %4$s be active fer thar same swashbuckler, thar %5$s%6$s%7$s
mcp.thrice_dice_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be acquired from %4$s landmarks or forked for from the shop.
Cost: %5$s

mcp.tic_tac_toe_complete: %1$s has scribbled thru thar tic-tac-toe map. Swashbucklers have %2$s helm runs after this time at helm terminates t' scribble thru their map n' scourage thar spoils.
%1$s has scribbled thru thar tic-tac-toe map.
mcp.tic_tac_toe_next_turn.1: %1$s helm runs 'til thar next tic-tac-toe map be set acourse.
mcp.tic_tac_toe_next_turn.2: A new tic-tac-toe map be set acourse. Type '/trigger TaskList' to lay eyes on yer map.
mcp.tiebreaker.1: There be a tie in multiple swashbucklers' scores!
mcp.tiebreaker_2.1: The following swashbucklers be tied fer ninth place: %1$s
mcp.tiebreaker_2.2: The following swashbucklers be tied fer eighth place: %1$s

mcp.tie_message_1.1: Each swashbuckler will roll a dice t' determine their placement!
mcp.tie_message_2.1: The swashbuckler that rolls thar higher number wins!
mcp.tilecapture4.1: You cannot steal tiles from other swashbucklers.
mcp.tilecapture5.1: The swashbucklers wit' thar most tiles captured plunder!
mcp.tile_capture.1: Step over white tiles t' capture land!
mcp.tile_capture_rules.1: You cannot steal nor step over tiles from other swashbucklers.
mcp.tile_capture_rules.2: The swashbucklers wit' thar most tiles captured plunder!
mcp.tips_message.1: %1$s Type %2$s t' learn about thar board
mcp.tips_message.2: %1$s Type %2$s t' toggle between spectator n' adventure mode while watching on thar board
mcp.tips_message.3: %1$s Type %2$s t' review thar voyage settings
mcp.tips_message.4: %1$s Type %2$s t' lay eyes on yer Tic-Tac-Toe map list
mcp.tip_drop.1: Dripstone will fall from thar ceiling.
mcp.tip_drop_rules.1: The dripstone will fall more frequently as thar voyage goes on.
mcp.tip_drop_rules.2: The last swashbuckler t' survive thar falling dripstone wins.
mcp.tip_drop_tick.1: %1$s has been sent to Davy Jones' Locker!
mcp.toggle_spectate.1.1: Return back to yer spot by:
mcp.toggle_spectate.1:
%1$s
Flying back to yer armor stand%2$s
Typing "/trigger Spectate"%3$s%4$s
mcp.too_many_items.1: %1$s has too many trinkets n' must toss one overboard.
mcp.too_many_items.2: %1$s has too many trinkets n' must toss some overboard.
mcp.too_many_items_tick.1: Drop a trinket t' toss it overboard
mcp.too_many_items_tick.67: Drop a trinket t' toss it overboard
mcp.traffic_controller.1: %1$s switched thar traffic lights n' locked them fer a turn!
mcp.traffic_controller_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from the shop or received from free trinket pickups. Only available on the Center Park board in shops and free trinket pickups.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.traffic_whistle_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from the shop or received from free trinket pickups. Only available on the Center Park board in shops and free trinket pickups.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.treasure_bag_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.treetop_hop.1: It's hunting season! Kill thar opposing tribe trying t' hunt ye.
mcp.treetop_hop.2: It's hunting season! Kill %1$s, thar tree hopper who be trying t' hunt ye down from thar trees.
mcp.treetop_hop_rules.1: %1$s will shoot down %2$s from thar tops o' thar tree.
mcp.treetop_hop_rules.2: %1$s gets instant firing arrows that recharge automatically while %2$s must charge up their arrows.
mcp.treetop_hop_rules.3: If thar tree hopper falls off, they get teleported back up.
mcp.treetop_hop_rules.4: First tribe t' eliminate thar other tribe wins!
mcp.trident_tumblers.1: Use yer riptide II trident t' launch yerself up thar platforms.
mcp.trident_tumblers.2: The first swashbuckler t' get t' thar top platform wins.
mcp.trident_tumblers.3: Be careful! Taking any amount o' fall damage or missing a platform will reset ye back t' yer previous platform.
mcp.triple_star_discount_voucher_descrip: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be acquired in thar Airborne Isles, Candyland, Mooshroom Grotto, n' Arcane Atoll boards.
mcp.triple_star_voucher_description.1: %1$s%2$s%3$s Can only be acquired in thar Airborne Isles, Candyland, Mooshroom Grotto, n' Arcane Atoll boards.
mcp.troll_warden_dialogue.1: %1$s If ye want t' enter through this path, ye need t' pay a fee. I will increase thar fee by 5 doubloons fer ye each time ye enter thar path.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.1: Please wait while course gets generated...
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.2: You will levitate upwards through thar tunnel.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.3: stash as many o' thar floating doubloons as ye can.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.4: Move close t' a doubloon t' stash it while ye be rising.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.5: You can also knock yer enemies away t' prevent them from stashing doubloons.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.6: Every doubloon ye stash be yers t' keep.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.7: The swashbuckler that stashs thar most doubloons wins.
mcp.tunnel_o_fun.8: Note: If thar tunnel does not generate thar first time, try dropping thar "End Minigame" trinket n' replaying thar minigame.
mcp.turnrandomizerevent.1: The turn order has been re-randomized!

%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be forked for from thar shop.
Cost: %4$s

mcp.turtle_hockey.1: Knock thar turtle into thar other swashbuckler's goal before thar time runs out!
mcp.turtle_hockey.2: The first swashbuckler t' score a goal wins!

mcp.use_player_swiper.1: Aye, welcome! In need o' me services, eh? I’ll steal some doubloons from whoever ya want, free o' charge! Though, I can’t help but notice that

mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.1: You get glory tallies fer hitting more monsters.
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.2: Each monster requires a full hit from thar axe t' earn glory tallies.
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.3: The point values fer hitting each monster be as follows:
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.4:
Zombies: 1 Point
Zombie with Armor: 3 Glory Tallies
Wither Skeleton: 3 Glory Tallies
Zombified Piglin: 2 Glory Tallies
Enderman: 5 Glory Tallies
Blaze: -1 Point
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.5: Zombies wit' armor take two hits t' kill. Wither skeletons last fer shorter time. Enderman will disappear n' reappear in thar same position.
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.6: The voyage ends after 90 seconds. Score thar most glory tallies t' plunder!
mcp.what_the_cluck.1: Throw hen shells at thar opposing tribe's chickens.
mcp.what_the_cluck.2: Each hen shell that hits an enemy chicken will do damage.
mcp.what_the_cluck.3: Eggs will get thrown from yer chicken in thar direction that ye be looking but wit' 0 motion in thar Y direction.
mcp.what_the_cluck.4: Eggs be immune t' gravity n' can bank shot off o' walls once.
mcp.what_the_cluck.5: You will get a new hen shell in yer inventory twice every second n' ye can hold up t' 10 at a time.
mcp.what_the_cluck.6: Yer chicken will follow yer movement right beneath ye.
mcp.what_the_cluck.7: The tribe that eliminates thar other wins!
mcp.wizard_hut_tick.1: %1$sI see that ye have a shinin' spiker fragment. I've been needing it fer a new spell I'm working on. Click me t' redeem thar fragment fer a shinin' spiker!
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.2: %1$sZen Garden be a large board wit' a few fun reckonin's on it that can be played t' earn bonus %2$s. Thar path o' thar board requires swashbucklers t' turn at every intersection.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board has multiple offers, which gives swashbucklers thar ability t' plunder up t' 5 %3$s at a time. Swashbucklers can choose t' plunder less %4$s at a time fer less %5$s per %6$s, or plunder in bulk at a large cost. Thar shinin' spiker hawker moves after a shinin' spiker gets forked for.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.4: %1$sThe %2$s fer this board be awarded t' thar swashbuckler that makes thar most %3$s purchases.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.5: %1$sCan ye get a skeleton t' kill a 1 HP creeper? If so, thar DJ will reward ye 20 %2$s fer bringing him a new music disc.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.6: %1$sComplete a full lap in thar river using a riptide trident in under 30 seconds n' Poseidon will reward ye wit' 10 %2$s. Each time a swashbuckler completes thar reckonin', thar time limit decreases by 2 seconds n' thar reward increases by 5 %3$s.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.7: %1$sGuess thar correct sequence o' 3 blocks n' ye will be rewarded wit' 10 %2$s. After each incorrect guess, ye will be given a hint based off yer previous guess t' help ye get closer t' thar answer. After 5 incorrect guesses, ye will fail thar reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on this magenta landmark will set sail a %2$s event. All swashbucklers put %3$s into a pot during thar daytime or will put one %4$s each into thar pot during thar nighttime. To be eligible, ye must have at least 20 %5$s (daytime) or at least 1 %6$s (nighttime). Each participant will plant a bamboo n' whichever swashbuckler's bamboo grows thar highest wins thar majority o' thar pot while 2nd place earns their bid back. 3rd place n' below will receive nothing.
mcp.zen_garden_description.1:
%1$s
You must turn at every intersection when traversing the board.
You can fork for up to 5 Spikers at a time from the main Spiker Seller. The more Spikers you buy at once, the more expensive each one is.
There is a passable Music Disc Reckonin' that awards 20 Doubloons if beat.
The Trident Race reckonin' awards you 10 Doubloons if beat. This reckonin' gets harder and the reward increases each time a swashbuckler beats it.
There is also a block guessing reckonin' which awards 15 Doubloons when beat.
The one magenta spot activates a coin shuffle in the beginning portion of the voyage and a shinin' spiker shuffle after a high tide affair has been ran.
The map specific spiker is the Transaction Shinin' Spiker and is awarded to the swashbuckler/team that does the most spiker transactions.
mcp.zen_garden_mastermind_check_guess.1: %1$s beat Thar Block Guessing Reckonin' n' won 10 %2$s
mcp.zen_garden_mastermind_check_guess.2: %1$s did not beat Thar Block Guessing Reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_mastermind_rules.1:
%1$s Ye will be given 6 concrete blocks. Yer goal be t' guess thar correct sequence o' blocks by placing three o' them on thar white terracotta. After very failed guess, yer guess will show up on thar left side along wit' all yer previous guesses. Thar right side tell ye thar number o' blocks that be correct, in thar wrong spot, not included in thar solutions. Ye have 5 guesses t' plunder. There be no time limit.%2$s if you can beat it!
Click on me to start the reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.1: %1$s I am trying t' expand me music booties. If ye can get a skeleton t' kill a creeper n' pick up thar music disc without gettin' slain, falling off, or having thar creeper explode, I will reward ye wit' 15 doubloons. It costs nothing t' attempt thar reckonin', so what be ye waiting fer? Click thar sign ON THE STAGE t' begin thar reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.2:
%1$s Good day matey, do ye think ye can beat thar Atlantis Spear Race reckonin'? Complete ye sail in under %2$s seconds n' I will reward ye wit' %3$s%4$s!
Click on me to start the reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.3:
%1$s Welcome, I have a reckonin' fer ye! I will reward ye wit' 15 %2$s if you can beat it!
Click on me to start the reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.4: %1$s Ahoy humanoid. Welcome t' me humble abode. Care fer any trinkets?
mcp.zen_garden_trident_race_end.1: %1$s did not beat thar Trident Race Reckonin'.
mcp.zen_garden_trident_race_end.2: %1$s beat thar Trident Race Reckonin' n' won %2$s%3$s!
mcp.ImposterStarSellerTradeLore: Here be thar Imposter Shinin' Spiker Hawker. It cannot be traded with.

mcp.hog_riders_rules.1: Ye’ll be racin’ atop a snortin’ swine through a thick jungle run. Once ye set off, the beasts’ll carry ye forward on their own
mcp.hog_riders_rules.2: Charge through treasure coffers t’ snatch any o’ these tools o’ trickery: Mines, a Burst o’ Speed, or Two Bolts, Skull O' Retribution
mcp.hog_riders_rules.4: Ye can knock a rival senseless fer a short spell by crashin’ into ’em while boosted, or by pepperin’ ’em with bolts or layin’ mines in their path.
mcp.hog_riders_rules.5: Trample over them arrow-marked blocks t’ catch yerself a brief gust o’ extra speed!
mcp.hog_riders_use_item.1: %1$s plundered ye wit' a Skull O' Retribution.
