mcp.SignGamemodeInfo: Click on thar seal correspodin' t' thar voyagemode that ye would like to set sail on. Click on thar shiny lined seal t' change thar number o' helm runs/number o' shinin' spikers fer victory.
mcp.crazy_carnival_pass_spot.1: %1$s Items for sale! Get your items here!
mcp.ReturnToHubTip: Type "/trigger ReturnToHub" to return back to the hub
mcp.pass_colored_spot.28: %1$sArrr, so ye finally washed ashore. I can’t be bothered settin’ a price fer this %2$s, so take it an’ shove off.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.29: %1$sAye, ye made it! Fine sailin’ gettin’ here. I’ll be needin’ %2$s %3$s, an’ this %4$s be yers to claim.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.30: %1$sWell lookie ‘ere. %2$s, ye finally arrived. The %3$s be yers so long as ye’ve got %4$s %5$s in yer pockets.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.31: %1$sAhoy %2$s! Thanks fer droppin’ anchor! I’ll hand ye this %3$s I’ve got stashed away fer %4$s %5$s. Do we have a deal?
mcp.pass_colored_spot.32: %1$sAhoy there %2$s. Glad ye managed to make port. Hand over %3$s %4$s an’ the %5$s be yers, matey.
mcp.pass_colored_spot.33: %1$sWell well well! Someone’s lookin’ mighty desperate fer a %2$s if ye’re willin’ to part with %3$s %4$s fer it...
mcp.pass_colored_spot.34: %1$sOh, it be you. Surprised ye even made it aboard, considerin’ me %2$s be worth %3$s %4$s. But if ye’re ready to cough up the booty, I s’pose I can part with it.
mcp.Monorail1TicketLore: Once ye’ve paid the toll, this beauty ferries ye to the next port o’ call (sailin’ clockwise) along the monorail from where ye be standin’.
mcp.Monorail2TicketsLore: Once ye’ve bought it, this fine ticket hauls ye to the second port o’ call (sailin' clockwise) on the monorail from yer current berth.
mcp.Monorail1TicketLoreReverse: Once ye’ve paid the toll, this beauty ferries ye to the next port o’ call (sailin’ counter-clockwise) along the monorail from where ye be standin’.
mcp.Monorail2TicketsLoreReverse: Once ye’ve bought it, this fine ticket hauls ye to the second port o’ call (sailin' counter-clockwise) on the monorail from yer current berth.
mcp.CrazyCarnivalOpenChallenge: %1$s%2$s reckonin' be open fer all ye swahbucklers!
mcp.CrazyCarnivalOpenStarChallenge: %1$s be hawkin’ a %2$s fer 20 %3$s to the next scallywag who wanders up with treasures to spare. He’ll then offer ye a shot at conquerin’ %4$s reckonin' fer 10 more %3$s, and if ye prevail, ye’ll be walkin’ away with an extra %2$s.
mcp.CrazyCarnivalOpenCoinChallenge: %1$s reckonin' be free fer any soul to try, and %2$s will fork over 15 %3$s if ye manage to best it.
mcp.CrazyCarnivalApproachStarChallenge: %1$s> Ahoy %2$s! I be hawkin’ a %3$s fer 20 %4$s, and I’ve even thrown in a special boon fer good measure.
mcp.CrazyCarnivalApproachCoinChallenge: %1$s> Ahoy %2$s! I got an offer for ye. Come talk to me to find out.
mcp.crazy_carnival_challenge_dialogue_ti: %1$s> %2$s, I’ll be handin’ ye an extra %3$s if ye can conquer the %4$s reckonin'. But it’ll cost ye 10 %5$s to take a crack at it. Do ye accept this bid, matey?
%1$s> I will reward you with 15 %2$s if you can complete %3$s challenge. Free of charge! Would you like to attempt the challenge?
%1$s> Yer loss, matey. No %2$s fer ye.
mcp.crazy_carnival_challenge_end.1: %1$s bested %2$s reckonin' and was rewarded with an extra %3$s!
mcp.crazy_carnival_challenge_end.2: %1$s bested %2$s reckonin' and was rewarded with 15 %3$s!
mcp.crazy_carnival_summon_star_challenge:
Cost: 10 %1$s with the purchase of a %2$s
Reward: An additional %2$s
mcp.crazy_carnival_ravager_rattler.1: %1$s> %2$s must dodge the ravager’s wrath fer 30 heart‑poundin’ seconds, or be sent to Davy Jones Locker! Thar beast’ll be charg’n at %2$s every now n' then.
mcp.BoardOverviewPrompt:
Would ye like to get a birdseye view of the map?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.1: %1$s%2$s be a carnival-themed battleground that’ll test yer mettle across all manner o’ rowdy reckonin's.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.2: %1$sThis here board boasts 7 wild reckonin's, each offerin’ plunder to any scallywag clever enough to best ’em.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.3: %1$sThere’ll always be 4 reckonins open fer play—2 o’ ’em be %2$s reckonins, and the other 2 be %3$s reckonins.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.4: %1$s%2$s reckonin's be requirin’ ye to buy a %2$s from the landlubber lurkin’ beside it fer 20 %3$s, n' ye can take a crack at it fer 10 %3$s if ye be feelin’ bold. Conquerin’ one’ll net ye an extra %2$s.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.5: %1$s%2$s reckonin's be free as the open sea. Beat one, and ye’ll pocket 15 %3$s.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.6: %1$sA reckonin’ll slam shut the moment a player takes a stab at it—win or lose—and a fresh one’ll open in its place.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.7: %1$sThis board also sports a monorail contraption to help ye sail across its lands.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.8: %1$sYe can trade 6 %2$s with the %3$s to move one station clockwise, or 12 %2$s to move two. But mind ye—no takin’ multiple monorail rides between spaces.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.9: %1$sFer a fee, ye can hop in the teacups and whirl yerself to the opposite side from where ye boarded. They can be entered from either side. The toll starts at 1 %2$s, and players may pay any amount equal to or greater than the current toll. After each ride, the toll rises by 1 %2$s.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.10: %1$s> The board’s special bonus star be awarded to the matey or crew that lands on the most %2$s spaces.
mcp.board_explanation.28: %1$s board built by %3$s n' developed by %4$s and %5$s.
mcp.boom_carts.scoreboard.title: Souls
mcp.tax_collection.1: Tribute Collectin’! Thar scurvy landlubbers on the board have seized 15%% o’ each swashbucklers’s %1$s!
mcp.tax_collection.2: Tribute Collectin’! Thar scurvy landlubbers on the board have seized 15%% o’ each tribe’s %1$s!
mcp.tax_collection.3: Tribute Collectin’! Thar scurvy landlubbers on the board have seized 15%% o’ each tribe’s %1$s!
mcp.capitalism.1: Prosperous Seas! Each player’s stash o’ %1$s has yielded a fine 15%% in interest!

mcp.start_game_sign.10: %1$s Minecraft Party 2 requires at least two players to be playing for a board game to start.
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_3.2:
-Need at least 4 players
-Render distance = 10
-Brightness = bright
-The more RAM/Bandwidth, the better
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_4.2:
-On your turn, drop the dice block from your hotbar to roll, then move the corresponding number of spaces on the board.

-You can see how many spaces you have left above your hotbar.
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_5.1:
-At the beginning of each turn, you may use an item 

-You must use your items BEFORE you roll
(Drop an item from your hotbar to use it)

-You can toggle board view mode by dropping the lantern from your hotbar.
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_6.3:
turns, the player with the most stars will win the game
-If multiple players have the same number of stars, placement will be based on coins
-You can buy stars from the glowing villager(s) on the board.
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_7.1:
-Once a star is purchased, the villager will move to a new random spot.

-Stars cost 20 coins each, you can get coins from certain board spaces, or by winning minigames
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_8.4:
bonus stars will be distributed before rankings are determined.

mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_9.2: For landing on the most of the following spaces combined: Green, Magenta, Battle Minigame, Duel, and Chance Time
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_10.2: For reaching the higest max coin count.
mcp.guide_book.turn_mode.page_10.4: For winning the most minigames, or the most coins from minigames (change in settings).

mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_1.1: Shimmer' ye t' Minecraft Party 2! This map be a 2-10 swashbuckler voyage loosely based off Mario Party. It imitates a board voyage and features 17 maps (currently), 101 scallywags, 32 pairs o' trinkets, and more! We hope ye have a barrel o fun wit' thar map.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_2.2: Up t' 10 swashbucklers can play but an even number be best. Each swashbuckler tosses thar bones when it be their time at helm and moves the thar number o' landmarks. After everyone has taken their helm time, a scallywag will trigger
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_3.1: n' thar rumlins will earn doubloons. Yer main aim be t’ gather as many shinin' spikers as ye can, with the tie-breaker bein’ the doubloons ye carry in yer purse. The swashbuckler wit' thar most shinin' spikers claims victory. Ye can earn shinin' spikers by forkin’ ’em from a shinin' spiker
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_4.1: hawker, who sets up shop at a random spot upon thar map. The hawker’ll pack up an’ move each time a shinin' spiker be bought. Ye can also spend yer doubloons at the huts t’ grab trinkets that’ll give ye the edge. Each map be different, with its own tricks, trials, an’ strategies t’ master.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_5.3: The voyage ends once the first swashbuckler earns a specified number o' shinin' spikers.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_5.5: The voyage be set for a specified number of helm runs per swashbuckler.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_6.2: Swashbucklers can freely play any scallywag in thar map. Scores not be tracked in this gamemode and scallywag rotation be not affected.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_6.4: Constant scallywags o' various types with no map play. Includes
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_7.1: cycles of 5 scallywags of various categories.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_7.3: Pair up in tribes of two in either Helm Run or Spiker Race mode. Doubloons, spikers, and trinkets be shared among tribemates. 2v2 scallywags keep same pairs n' 1v3s be forbidden.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_8.2: With this mode selected, yer crew can play with up t' 10 swashbucklers. Choose between On Yer Own mode, two large tribes, o' pairs mode (exactly 8 swashucklers). Scallywags will accomadate for the crew size but some may be forbidden.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_9.2: Youtubers or streamers can get their skull on thar wall o' youtubers fer playing n' recording this map. Send the video t' one of thar captains o' thar map to get your swashbuckler skull and ship
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_10.1: on thar wall in the credits hut with a link to the video.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_11.2:
*Normal difficulty
*Minecraft version 1.21.7/8
*Render Distance > 10 feet
*Brightness: Blindin'
*Entity Distance: 500%
*Particles: Decreased o' more
*Glint Strength: 100%

mcp.crazy_carnival_buck_luck.1: %1$s> %2$s be granted %3$s chances t’ tame any wild brumby within 50 seconds. If the last mount be made and the beast still refuses the bridle, %2$s loses thar reckonin'. Tip: Mount thar brumby usin’ yer bare fist, matey.
mcp.crazy_carnival_pot_shot.1: %1$s> %2$s be given three bolts t’ smash as many vases as possible. The vases’ll sway side-t’-side at all manner o’ speeds. %2$s must shatter at least %3$s vases t’ claim victory
mcp.crazy_carnival_maze_craze.1: %1$s> %2$s has %3$s ticks o' thar clock t' snatch the hay from the heart o’ the maze and make it back out again. There be a ladder ye can climb t’ scout the maze from above, but it’ll cost ye precious time.
mcp.crazy_carnival_monster_manor.1: %1$s> %2$s will ride along a track with targets fixed upon the wall. %2$s must fire lasers at the marks (with a 0.6 second wait between shots) usin’ %3$s, and strike at least %4$s targets wit' 60 shots maximum t’ conquer thar reckonin'.
mcp.crazy_carnival_creeper_reaper.1: %1$s> %2$s must strike the creeper heads quick as they pop up. Miss a blow, or let one sink back down unstruck, and thar reckonin' be lost. %2$s must smash 30 creepers t’ win.
mcp.crazy_carnival_bell_buster.1: %1$s> %2$s must charge up their strike by holdin’ down %3$s. Once the charge meter fills to the very brim, %2$s must then use %4$s t’ ring the bell. Time the strike true, and %2$s wins thar reckonin'.
mcp.CrazyCarnivalStarSchmooverDescriptio: Closes the Shinin' Spiker Reckonin' furthest away from thar swashbuckler using the trinket and opens a random closed reckonin'.
mcp.CrazyCarnivalStarSetterDescription: Closes the Shinin' Spiker Reckonin' furthest away from thar swashbuckler using the trinket and has thar swahbuckler select any one of thar closed reckonin's t' open as a Shinin' Spiker Reckonin'.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.11: %1$sLanding on a magenta landmark will set the reckonin's on thar board to be all %2$s, all %3$s or all %4$s.
mcp.BoardDescriptionTip: %1$s Type %2$s to lurk thar lore o' thar board ye be eyein'
mcp.CrazyCarnivalWarpToStarDescription: Warps ye to thar nearest Shinin' Spiker Reckonin'
mcp.CrazyCarnivalStarSupplierDescription: Warps ye to the nearest Shinin' Spiker Reckonin' and gives ye any Doubloons ye need to fork for a Shinin' Spiker or fork for the reckonin' if ye have enough Doubloons for a Shinin' Spiker
mcp.crazy_carnival_ravager_rattler.2: %1$s When thar arravager be distant from ye, it'l lead its attack by stormin' towards thar point that be two blocks away from ye in thar direction ye be sailin'.
mcp.magic_dice_select_player.4: %1$s %2$s's %3$s be active. This will add %4$s onto their %5$s Roll.
mcp.weapon_devolution.1: Clash with other swashbucklers in a gargantuan brawl wit' no life limit and instant respawning.
mcp.weapon_devolution_rules.1: Fer each plunder ye get, yer firepower be downgraded in the following order: Laser Turret, Mighty Hatchet, Poseidon's Fightin' Fork, Dull Cutlass, Pointy Balls o' Snow.
mcp.weapon_devolution_rules.2: The first swashbuckler t' plunder wit' thar final firepower (Pointy Balls o' Snow) wins!
mcp.weapon_devolution_tick.1: Ye got a plunder! Your new firepower be a %1$s.
mcp.tic_tac_toe_award_stars: %1$s be awarded %2$s securrred shinin' spikers fer finishin' thar tic-tac-toe map!
